programme.desc: Allisons mareritt utspiller seg i scener fra den klassiske filmen Night of the Living Dead, og får henne til å våkne opp med merkelige sår, men også med ledetråder i saken om et drap på en begravelsesagent.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Allison leier en SUV etter at bilen hennes er skadet, og hun oppdager at SUVens satellittradio lar henne lytte til andres samtaler.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Når Ariel begynner å date en gutt fra skolen, har Allison visjoner som indikerer at han kan være involvert i et lokalt mord.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Etter på merkelig vis å ha blitt følsom for lys, bruker Allison et par solbriller som viser merkelige tall som kan være relatert til folks forventede levealder.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Allisons visjoner blir en viktig informasjonskilde for myndighetene når prøvene av en dødelig sykdom forsvinner. I mellomtiden tror Scanlon at han er klar til å fri til Lynn.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: The town's Christmas spirit is in question when a family who are Jewish immigrants moves to town.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Sully is appointed Indian agent to the Cheyenne and approaches it in an idealistic fashion. When the food intended for the tribe is diverted and illegal alcohol is plentiful, Sully becomes angry.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: A newspaper report of a comet's imminent collision with Earth causes hysteria in town over the end of the world.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Sam Lindsay, an older independent woman, decides to end her medical treatment and take off into the wilderness.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Colleen and Brian's biological father Ethan returns to town with a new wife, intending to take the children away from Dr. Quinn.

programme.title: Luksusfellen Sverige: Episode 2901
programme.desc: Johan, en kjærlig far til to jenter, ble forlatt av sin kone, som også lot ham i stikken med alle deres dårlig lån. Nå står han uten sitt eget hjem, bor hos moren og er redd for å være en dårlig far.

programme.title: Luksusfellen Sverige: Episode 2902
programme.desc: Fredrick og Ida drømmer om bryllup og barn. Men med Fredricks uholdbare økonomi er drømmen langt borte. Nå som han ikke kan få flere lån, har de begynt å låne sammen i hennes navn...

programme.title: Luksusfellen Sverige: Episode 2904
programme.desc: Lasse har levd som om hver dag er den siste, men det fungerer ikke i lengden. Etter en skilsmisse har han nå måttet flytte hjem til faren, og han klarer ikke å betale lånene sine.

programme.title: Luksusfellen Sverige: Episode 2905
programme.desc: Sandra har vokst opp i fosterhjem og har aldri lært hvordan en voksens økonomi fungerer. På en annen side har hun levd som om hun har hatt en jevn inntekt hele livet, selv om dette ikke var tilfelle...

programme.title: Luksusfellen Sverige: Episode 2906
programme.desc: Mark drømte om et hus med kjæresten sin, men er nå tvunget til å dele et rom med broren hjemme hos foreldrene sine. Inntil nylig hadde han planer om å kjøpe et hus med sitt livs kjærlighet.

programme.title: Luksusfellen Sverige: Episode 2907
programme.desc: Peter og Mathilda har vært sammen i over tjue år og har to barn sammen, men nå eksisterer deres forhold bare gjennom det de sammen skylder bankene.

programme.title: Unga Mammor: Episode 213
programme.desc: Til tross for at Julia Bergman bare er 22 år, er hun redd for å bli gammel og hun forteller om sin barndom, kjærlighet og bokdrømmer.

programme.title: Unga Mammor: Episode 214
programme.desc: Kevin og barna har kollidert med en elg, og nå står de i garasjen og prøver å reparere bilen.

programme.title: Unga Mammor: Episode 215
programme.desc: En lampe velter over Audrina mens hun sover, når Lina skal filme en videoblogg og Lina innser at hun ikke presterer like bra foran kameraet uten Audrina.

programme.title: Unga Mammor: Episode 216
programme.desc: Natalie og familien hennes skal på en hundeustilling. Men morgenkaoset hjemme fører til at de blir sene og glemmer å melde på hunden Rango.

programme.title: Unga Mammor: Episode 217
programme.desc: Johan har tre timers permisjon, og benytter anledningen til å ta med Julia M og Nanja til Torekällberget for å se på dyrene.

programme.title: Unga Mammor: Episode 218
programme.desc: Lina og Audrina går på babymassasje, men Audrina er ikke så interessert i å bli massert. Milan styrer båten til Helsingør når hele familien drar over til Danmark.

programme.title: Unga Mammor: Episode 219
programme.desc: Natalie, Kevin og barna deler alle den store interessen for biler. Derfor drar hele familien på bilutstillingen Elmia.

programme.title: Unga Mammor: Episode 220
programme.desc: I Vinslöv forteller Julia B om sin nye kjærlighet. Lina har aldri skrudd inn en skrue i hele sitt liv, og er ikke veldig gira på oppgaven med å skru sammen et huskestativ til Audrina.

programme.title: Unga Mammor: Episode 221
programme.desc: Bloggeren Linn fra Örebro tok studenten i vår, og nå venter hun sitt første barn sammen med kjæresten Marcus. I løpet av sommeren har det skjedd mye på gården til Natalie.

programme.title: Unga Mammor: Episode 222
programme.desc: Milan, Julia B og bestevenninnen Louise drar til stranden ved Åhus Bryggen. De prater om Julias nye kjæreste Dennis som bor i Russland og om hvordan det er å ha et langdistanseforhold.

programme.title: Magic in the Moonlight
programme.desc: Magikeren Stanley Crawford (Colin Firth) er skeptisk til alt som kan karakteriseres som "overnaturlig", men når han møter den forførende spåkvinnen Sophie Baker (Emma Stone), oppdager han en verden hinsides fysikkens lover.

programme.title: Everyone Says I Love You
programme.desc: I disse Disney-dominerte dager har musicals en lei tendens til å bli smakløse. Allen har derimot hentet inspirasjon fra femtitallets koreografisk enkle, men herlig energiske musicals, tilført det hele en dæsj patentert nevrotisk humor og ristet godt.

programme.title: Rett Vest
programme.desc: Georg Margrethe får et mentalt sammenbrudd etter konens bortgang. For å komme seg vekk fra elendigheten bestemmer de seg for å reise over fjellet til øya Ona, for å representere sin nylig avdøde kone i norgesmesterskapet i quilting.

programme.title: Arctic Apocalypse
programme.desc: A massive influx of glacial melting triggers a new ice age in the Northern Hemisphere, forcing a family to make their away the across ice-covered landscape before they are frozen out for good.

programme.title: The Way Back
programme.desc: The Way Back forteller den sanne historien til syv fangers umulige plan om å flykte fra en sovjetisk fangeleir i 1941. Deres flukt til frihet tar dem på en reise gjennom verdens mest nådeløse landskap.

programme.title: Wild Target
programme.desc: En iskald leiemorder får sitt liv snudd på hodet når han blir forelsket i sitt mål, en sjarmerende svindler med uventede planer.

programme.title: No Stranger Than Love
programme.desc: Hva er merkeligere enn det store hullet som åpner seg i Lucy Sherringtons stuegulv. Kjærligheten, virker det som.

programme.title: The Female Brain
programme.desc: Den strenge nevroforskeren Julias dypdykk i hvordan den kvinnelige og den mannlige hjernen jobber. Men Julias standhaftige oppfatninger blir utfordret når en kjekk ny deltaker melder seg til prosjektet hennes.

programme.title: Humor Me
programme.desc: Humor Me er en varm far-sønn-komedie om en forfatter med skrivesperre som tvinges til å flytte inn sammen med sine vitsebesatte far i et pensjonistsamfunn i New Jersey. Der lærer han, som faren sier, at ”livet skjer, enten du smiler eller ei”.

programme.title: Being Mary Jane: Sparrow
programme.desc: Da Mary Jane fikk de knusende nyhetene om en kjær venns død, tvinges hun til å konfrontere sine livsvalg, håndtere familien og møte David.

programme.title: Being Mary Jane: Being Kara
programme.desc: Karas liv fortsetter å snurre ukontrollert. Samtidig hjelper en uinteressert og stadig sørgende Mary Jane Niecy md sin først jobb.

programme.title: The New Edition Story: Night Three
programme.desc: Da New Edition oppnår en suksess uten sidestykke, vil de endelig kunne legge alle uoverensstemmelser bak seg eller kommer deres uoppgjorte tvister til å føre til undergang?

programme.title: Being Mary Jane: Storm Advisory
programme.desc: Andre stilles ansikt til ansikt med David hos Mary Jane. Samtidig er forandringer i gang hos SNC. Når et anker blir sparket uten avskjed, blir Mary Jane, Kara og Mark urolige for jobbene sine.

programme.title: Being Mary Jane: Girls Night In
programme.desc: Mary Jane har en viktig samtale med Andre, og hun spekulerer over fremtiden. Det utvikler seg spenning mellom Kara og Mary Jane når Kara fikser på Marks forestilling og ei dame nærmer seg Paul sr.

programme.title: Being Mary Jane: The Huxtables Have Fallen
programme.desc: Mary Jane innser at realiteten bak affæren hennes er avslørt. En edruskapsfest driver Patrick til å reflektere over livet, og Mary Jane svarer til slutt Andre om frieriet.

programme.title: Doc Martin: Episode 302
programme.desc: Bert Large forlater rørleggerfirmaet sitt til fordel for å drive en restaurant. Etter restaurantens åpning forekommer det flere tilfeller av matforgiftning.

programme.title: Doc Martin: Episode 303
programme.desc: Et par og sønnen deres flytter inn ved siden av Louisa og skaper problemer for henne, Martin og lokalbefolkningen. Beboere begynner også å oppdage noe uvanlig med PC Penhale.

programme.title: Doc Martin: Episode 304
programme.desc: Fru Wilson, den hypokondriske eieren av Wilson-hotellet, vier all sin oppmerksomhet til Martin, noe som fører til at Louisa blir sjalu.

programme.title: Doc Martin: Episode 305
programme.desc: Paulines spilleavhengighet kommer endelig fram i lyset.

programme.title: Doc Martin: Episode 306
programme.desc: En mystisk luftveisinfeksjon bryter ut i landsbyen.

programme.title: I krig med bestefar
programme.desc: Peter er en vanlig gutt som går i 6. klasse. Han liker å game og henge med vennene sine. Men når bestefaren Ed flytter inn i familiens hus, blir Peter tvunget til å gi bestefar rommet sitt.

programme.title: Picture of Lies
programme.desc: Kunstkritiker James Figueras og kjæresten Berenice Hollis reiser til et overdådig gods ved Lago Cuomo, eid av kunstsamleren Cassidy. Han ber paret om noe nokså uvanlig: de to skal stjele et maleri.

programme.title: American Siege
programme.desc: Den avdankede sheriffen i en liten by i Georgia, Ben Watts, blir presset til raskt å løse en gisselsituasjon – og innser snart at han er en brikke i et større spill blant byens skumle hemmeligheter.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Strat'ed for Cash
programme.desc: On a limited budget in the historic L.A. neighborhood of West Adams, Allen and Ton still win three lockers and find a Maui Blue Fender Stratocaster and a 1930s Schwinn bike.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: The Chicago Grand Slam
programme.desc: 1984 Yamaha SS440 Snowmobile that introduced the revolutionary shock absorber suspension; rare autographed 1920s baseball glove; mint Hank Aaron signed baseball; authentic 1950s Robby the Robot collector toy.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: The Jersey Score
programme.desc: Ton & Allen attend a silent auction in NJ, but that doesn't stop the local buyers from letting them know they're not welcome! They uncover a skeet throwing machine from the 1960's & a vintage vehicle with some real horsepower!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Hula Moola
programme.desc: Ton and Allen jet to the Hawaiian islands where they're joined by a feisty new female assistant! The team uncovers a pair of James Bond-style gadgets designed for high-speed underwater travel and a vintage sled.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Friends in Hawaii Places
programme.desc: Allen &Ton enlist an assistant, Carolyn, and Allen's Hawaiian buddy, Junior, to help them battle local buyers. The guys find a WWII-era motor scooter and a stash of antique Polynesian tattoo tools that get used on Ton!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Home on the Gun Range
programme.desc: Barely making it to an auction in Corona, CA, Allen and Ton buy an overstuffed unit and find an antique crossbow, a rare 10-gauge Winchester shotgun and a 1940s Kiss-o-Meter.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: The Chi-Town Showdown
programme.desc: Metal Victorian-era burial casket; 1870s glass fire extinguisher grenades; a mechanical 1896 handcrafted Chicago fire station alarm box.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Quadzilla Attacks!
programme.desc: Extreme Quadzilla ATV, the fastest 4 wheeler ever; a 1910s Remington Derringer and an 1880s Palm Squeezer pistol; revolutionary 1800s Western Electric telephone with a crank dial.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Gangs of New York
programme.desc: Ton and Allen duke it out with a local thrift store gang at a Brooklyn storage auction. The guys discover a classic arcade redemption game and a mid-century water cannon designed to fight towering infernos!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Hot Wheels
programme.desc: '70s sand rail dune racer with rally hemi heads; 1965 replica Mustang pool table; off-road racing gear.

programme.title: Christmas Party Crashers
programme.desc: Når to bedragere møtes etter å ha krasjet den samme millionærens julefest, blir de enige om å jobbe sammen, uten å vite at de vil finne noe som er viktigere enn penger eller berømmelse: ekte kjærlighet.

programme.title: Jingle Bell Princess
programme.desc: Strandet i Tucker, Maine, blir prinsesse Jasmine Arcelus trukket inn i livene til to 9 år gamle tvillingjenter og deres enkefar Sam, i løpet av julen.

programme.title: Married by Christmas
programme.desc: Carrie har viet hele livet til farens virksomhet og har ikke mye tid til overs for et sosialt liv. Men så bestemmer bestemorens testamente at virksomheten går til søsteren som gifter seg først.

programme.title: Meet Me Under the Mistletoe
programme.desc: To rivaliserende eiendomsmeglere blir tvunget til å samarbeide for å selge et spesielt hus, eid av en anerkjent botaniker og mistelteindyrker, før jul.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Judgment Night
programme.desc: In 1942, a German wonders why he's on the deck of a British steamship, with no memory of how he got there, and an overwhelming sense of impending doom.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Man in the Bottle
programme.desc: A luckless couple stumbles upon fortune when a genie materializes from a bottle in their antique shop. The genie grants them four wishes but warns them, prophetically, to be careful what you wish for.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Last Flight
programme.desc: A World War I flying ace flies through a mysterious cloud - and lands at a modern U.S. airbase in the year 1959!

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Little Girl Lost
programme.desc: Old Ben, who is able to transform himself into anything, tries to help a crippled little girl.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Hocus-Pocus and Frisby
programme.desc: A loud-mouthed braggart's boasts attract the attention of some aliens.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Whole Truth
programme.desc: A used car salesman buys a car that dooms him to tell only the truth.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Last Rites of Jeff Myrtlebank
programme.desc: Jeff Myrtlebank comes back to life at his own funeral and soon begins to act very strangely...

programme.title: The Dead Zone: Finding Rachel - Part 1
programme.desc: Johnny becomes the prime suspect in a case involving a missing woman and is confronted by her sister (Sarah Wynter), who clamors for his arrest.

programme.title: Scorpion NO: Keep It in Check, Mate
programme.desc: Walter og Sylvester deltar undercover i en internasjonal sjakkkturnering på fremmed jord for Team Scorpion for å ta ut en amerikansk spion før identiteten hennes avsløres.

programme.title: Scorpion NO: Dirty Seeds, Done Dirt Cheap
programme.desc: Når et enkelt oppdrag for å beskytte en viktig frøbank går galt, må Team Scorpion redde Happy, Sylvester og Cabe, som begynner å lide av livstruende, fryktbaserte hallusinasjoner.

programme.title: Scorpion NO: Don't Burst My Bubble
programme.desc: Etter en kraftig storm, sitter Happys venn Ada, som lever i en steril boble for å beskytte sitt kompromitterte immunsystem, igjen med farlig avfall i ferd med å punktere strukturen.

programme.title: Scorpion NO: Monkey See, Monkey Poo
programme.desc: For å stoppe et farlig virus fra å spre seg, må Team Scorpion finne en sjelden truet ape i Amazonas som har antistoffet for kuren.

programme.title: Scorpion NO: Broken Wind
programme.desc: Under et oppdrag for å reparere en turbin ved en vindpark, må Team Scorpion skynde seg for å redde Paige og Happy før kabelen som holder gondolen de er i, går i stykker.

programme.title: Scorpion NO: Rock Block
programme.desc: Team Scorpion må trosse ordre fra en utenlandsk regjering når de henter en asteroide fra verdensrommet som inneholder DNA-tråder som kan få dødelige konsekvenser hvis de blir utsatt for luft.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: Don believes that a death row inmate has an ulterior motive when he suddenly wants to confess the whereabouts of bodies he buried during his days as a hit man for the mob.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: Don and the FBI uncover a possible terrorist attack on Los Angeles that targets the city's water supply.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: When thieves hijack a truck filled with valuable medical supplies, $50 million dollars intended for a relief effort in Zambia and two aid workers, the FBI races a second violent crew intent on getting to the goods first.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: In the wake of a deadly standoff with a mysterious, yet, brilliant bomber, Don and Charlie discover that he was poisoned to keep him from exposing a shocking secret that will change the FBI team forever, on the third season finale.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: Agent Colby Granger lands in prison after the discovery that he was a mole within the FBI, but he escapes, and it's up to Don and his team to track him down and uncover the truth on the fourth season premiere.

programme.title: Tucker: The Man And His Dream
programme.desc: En bildesigner utfordrer hele bilindustrien med sine revolusjonerende bildesign.

programme.title: Wim Wenders Collection: Don't Come Knocking
programme.desc: En aldrende cowboyfilm-stjerne rømmer fra et filmsett for å gjenoppta kontakten med moren sin som han ikke har sett på tretti år, bare for å finne ut at han har et barn han aldri visste om.

programme.title: Paradise, Hawaiian Style
programme.desc: Elvis takes to the skies over the island paradise of Kauai. He's a partner in a helicopter charter service. Romance, naturally, is in the air for the King...but his business may be grounded.

programme.title: Star Trek: Nemesis
programme.desc: Sett kursen mot en galakse med enestående action og eventyr når kaptein Jean-Luc Picard (Patrick Stewart) og hans Starship-mannskap kjempet mot en farlig motstander... Som har en overraskende kobling til Picard!

programme.title: Star Trek I: The Motion Picture
programme.desc: Når et uidentifisert romvesen ødelegger tre kraftfulle Klingon-kryssere, vender kaptein James T. Kirk (William Shatner) tilbake til det nylig ombyggede U.S.S. Enterprise(tm) for å ta kommandoen.

programme.title: Star Trek II: The Wrath of Khan
programme.desc: Det er 2200-tallet. Føderasjonens U.S.S. Enterprise er på et treningsoppdrag og det virker som om admiral James T. Kirk (William Shatner) er resignert på at inspeksjonen kan bli den siste romferden i sin karriere. Men Khan er tilbake.

programme.title: Svenske Truckers: Episode 205
programme.desc: Familiebedriften Tösse wedins har en ny kunde som trenger den erfarne tømmerbilsjåføren og administrerende direktøren i selskapet, "Höna", til å kjøre en lastebil.

programme.title: Svenske Truckers: Episode 301
programme.desc: Anton og broren transporterer en gravemaskin på den lokale "Dødens vei". Sam, en miljøarbeider, er opprørt over det moderne menneskets livsstil. Og Tove drar til en skog for å samle tømmer.

programme.title: Svenske Truckers: Episode 302
programme.desc: I Hässleholm skal Jörgen kjøre en bro med en uvanlig form, der du virkelig må tenke på å løfte hvis du ikke vil at sikkerhetsanordningene skal svikte.

programme.title: Svenske Truckers: Episode 303
programme.desc: Stephanie guider oss gjennom vanskelighetene med å være leveringssjåfør i Stockholm. Anders kjører et stort elektrisk hus fra Öjebyn til Boliden, og det må ikke få riper.

programme.title: Svenske Truckers: Episode 304
programme.desc: Anders er på vei til Boliden med en 20 tonn tung og 20 meter lang container, men til tross for forberedelser havner han på feil vei. Elin blir skikkelig stresset når hun havner midt i rushtrafikken i Stockholm.

programme.title: Svenske Truckers: Episode 201
programme.desc: Simon fra Piteå har tatt over som administrerende direktør i transportfirmaet etter sin far Erik. Jörgen fra Höganäs må kjøre et 58 meter langt blad til en vindturbin og støter på utfordringer i svingene.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model
programme.desc: Photographer Francesco Carrozzini Is A Guest Judge After A Fiery Photo Shoot.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model
programme.desc: Celebrity Stylist Rachel Zoe Is A Guest Judge And The Models Pose With Wild Animals.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model
programme.desc: Supermodel Sonia Dara Is A Guest Judge And The Models Pose For A Mud-Covered Photo Shoot.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model
programme.desc: Gossip Girl Stylist Eric Daman Is A Guest Judge And The Models Compete To Represent Ford’s Warriors In Pink Campaign.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model
programme.desc: Handbag And Accessories Designer Lana Marks Is A Guest Judge And The Models Endure A Photo Shoot With Trash.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Episode 18
programme.desc: Registrar Doctor Gemma Hartshorne prepares to treat a man who has suddenly lost all feeling in his foot. Loss of blood flow is turning Roger's foot white - urgent treatment is needed to prevent amputation.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Episode 19
programme.desc: Trainee Advanced Nurse Practitioner Chantelle Proctor assesses a 49-year-old man rushed in by ambulance. Philip, who has a heart condition, collapsed at home and has been vomiting for the last ten days.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Episode 20
programme.desc: While people enjoy a most wonderful time of the year, Barnsley Hospital Casualty is open for business as usual, and the team are getting into the Christmas spirit. Consultant Doctor Julian Humphrey is leading the festive shift.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Episode 1
programme.desc: While Sister Jane runs outside to help a critical patient in the car park, Matron Val and Consultant Doctor Dave Walker need to negotiate with the Police who are stopping new arrivals entering the building.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Episode 2
programme.desc: Junior Doctor Tom Fish’s first patient is 18-year-old Lewis who has broken bones and deep wounds from a moped accident - but causing him the most pain is his fear of needles.

programme.title: Ekstreme samlere: Episode 3
programme.desc: Arthur's flat is packed with junk. Experts Caz and Tee are up for their toughest assignment ever. Khim is getting married but first she must clear her hoard. Mandi's passion for vintage clothes is out of control.

programme.title: Ekstreme samlere: Episode 4
programme.desc: Esther's hoard is so bad her landlord told her to clear up or clear out. Nigel receives a visit from fellow hoarder Janice.

programme.title: Ekstreme samlere: Episode 5
programme.desc: Paul's hoard fills his whole house, room after room after room is buried under 6 feet of clutter.

programme.title: Dirty Home Rescue: Episode 9
programme.desc: Hayley Leitch and her cleaning team Tom Swire and Chesley Medley-Brown go to the rescue of Sue from Oxford whose house is overflowing with possessions. Sue married the love of her life in 2015, and he moved in, bringing everything he owned with him.

programme.title: Dirty Home Rescue: Episode 10
programme.desc: Hayley Leitch and her cleaning team Tom Swire and Chesley Medley-Brown go to the rescue of Linda and husband Andy from Bedau in South Wales whose house is overrun with animals and hasn’t been cleaned in 4 years.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 6
programme.desc: Crouch Recovery op Steve Hodges gets the call that a truck is stranded in a park. The stricken vehicle is stuck on a wet and muddy field that has become incredibly soft due to heavy rainfall.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 7
programme.desc: A 15-tonne Water Tanker has been swallowed by a Sinkhole in Wokingham town centre. Lantern lass Merrie rushes to the scene where her concern is what might lurk within.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 8
programme.desc: Rookie Recovery Op Joe has a challenge on his hands when a delivery van slides off the road, ending up precariously balanced on the verge between a farm track and a muddy field.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 9
programme.desc: In Burton On Trent, Lee is in a race against time to rescue a coach that's careered off a road and straight into a hedgerow.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 10
programme.desc: In a muddy Leicestershire field, recovery op Simon is confronted with not one, but two trucks in need of rescuing. The first got stuck following its sat nav, while the second came a cropper trying to pull it free.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 11
programme.desc: There's a perilous situation on the M25 when a slide bed truck carrying a van loses both its offside wheels. It threatens to topple into the inside lane and to make matters worse, it's on a blind bend just beyond a junction.

programme.title: Cheaters: Episode 25
programme.desc: Sabrina discovers an odd woman has tainted the home she shares with her boyfriend. Follow up with Star Jacobi.

programme.title: Cheaters: Episode 26
programme.desc: Jacqueline finds out her husband has been shopping around for a younger woman. Follow up with Robert Castro.

programme.title: Cheaters: Episode 27
programme.desc: Jodi Grissam discovers what her lover does in the most intimate of moments. Follow up with Dearion Cannon.

programme.title: Cheaters: Episode 28
programme.desc: Denise finds out if her boyfriend has committed a foul in their relationship. Follow up with Paige Garza.

programme.title: Cheaters: Episode 29

programme.title: Cheaters: Episode 32

programme.title: Cheaters: Episode 33

programme.title: Cheaters: Episode 34
programme.desc: Lamont finds out his girlfriend alters the definition of a committed relationship. Follow up with Jeff Palmer.

programme.title: Cheaters: Episode 35

programme.title: Rio Lobo
programme.desc: Det femte og siste samarbeidet mellom John Wayne og regissør Howard Hawks er en actionfyllt western som finner sted etter borgerkrigen, der en gruppe menn leter etter unionsforræderne som er ansvarlige for en rekke togran.

programme.title: Øya I Himmelhavet
programme.desc: Filmen utspiller seg etter andre verdenskrig, og John Wayne spiller hovedrollen som Dooley, en tidligere militærpilot som flyr fraktfly og blir tvunget til å nødlande på en islagt innsjø fordi han går tom for drivstoff og flyet kommer ut av kurs.

programme.title: In Harm's Way
programme.desc: Producer-director Otto Preminger’s epic treatment of the bombing of Pearl Harbor details the devastating attack on the Hawaiian naval base as well as the explosive, behind-the-scenes stories.

programme.title: Dance Moms
programme.desc: Abby choreographs an emotional dance after the ALDC learns of tragic news from Kira and Kalani's hometown; the minis attempt to make a comeback with their group number; JoJo is tested beyond her limits by a difficult ballet duet.

programme.title: Dance Moms
programme.desc: Christi Lukasiak relives the fiercest battles waged in their children's names; showdowns between Christi and Yolanda, Holly and Jill, Kelly and Christi and more.

programme.title: Dance Moms
programme.desc: Abby challenges Nia and Kendall with tough trios; the group tribute to Madonna leaves the mothers wanting more; Holly suspects Abby has a hidden agenda for Nia and brings in Nia's manager to investigate; Abby abandons the team.

programme.title: Dance Moms
programme.desc: Abby challenges the minis with a beauty pageant-themed dance; the elites feel the pressure to perform in a Prince tribute dance; Abby assigns two duets; when Nia falls ill, Kendall is left without a partner.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: Hugh has a plan to crush the competition; Todd and Lisa are pressured to up their game.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: With the biggest storm in centuries only a few days away, the truckers race for loads; Art and Todd set out to prove themselves.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: A storm delivers deadly driving conditions as the truckers struggle to deliver their loads.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: Darrell and Todd try to get through record breaking snowfall, while the rest of the team fights to survive; despite frigid temperatures the war between VP Express and Polar reaches a boiling point.

programme.title: Car Chase
programme.desc: Stolen vehicle pursuit ends after police use PIT maneuver to stop suspect.

programme.title: Car Chase
programme.desc: Driver taken into custody after high-speed pursuit in San Fernando Valley.

programme.title: Car Chase
programme.desc: Deputies pursue reckless driver through Montebello and East Los Angeles.

programme.title: Car Chase
programme.desc: Three children injured after kidnapping suspect crashes during PCH pursuit.

programme.title: Car Chase
programme.desc: Pursuit ends with dramatic crash; driver arrested.

programme.title: Sammen tar vi prisen
programme.desc: Det blir action når det blir gjensyn med de actionkomikerne Terence Hill og Bud Spencer. Denne gangen spiller Hill en gjeldstynget gambler som finner et skattekart og sniker seg med en båt for å komme seg til en sydhavsøy der skatten skal være begravd.

programme.title: Sammen er vi kaos
programme.desc: I Miami begår politiet en utrolig brøler ved å ansette Wilbur Walsh (Spencer) og Matt Kirby (Hill) som patruljerende politiassistenter. Deres utradisjonelle arbeidsmetoder vekker begeistring, selv om de gang på gang prøver å bli kastet ut.

programme.title: Fire never i Rio
programme.desc: De rike fetterne Antonio og Sebastiano Coimbra er to brasilianske mangemillionærer som lever i frykt for yrkesmordere. Derfor ansetter de to dobbeltgjengere, Greg Wonder som er en kriminelt belastet saxofonspiller, og stuntmannen Eliot Vance.

programme.title: McLeods døtre
programme.desc: Alex plan om å fri til Stevie går veldig galt når en rekke ulykker og katastrofer truer med å ødelegge forholdet deres.

programme.title: McLeods døtre
programme.desc: Når Grace kommer uventet tilbake til Drovers Run, gjør Regan sitt beste for å overbevise søsteren om å få henne til å bli permanent.

programme.title: McLeods døtre
programme.desc: Stevie liker ikke ideen om å bli den nye fru Alex Ryan. Det er tydelig at innebærer et stort ansvar, en følelse som forsterkes både av Bryce og Beth Martin.

programme.title: McLeods døtre
programme.desc: Jentene kjemper for å hindre at Drovers Run et området for giftig avfallsdeponi, men lojaliteten blir satt på prøve når Grace tvinger Regan til å velge mellom familien og forholdet.

programme.title: McLeods døtre
programme.desc: Grace kidnapper en regjeringstjenestemann for å forhindre at den giftige dumpingen fortsetter. Regan kjemper for å redde Drovers Run, ettersom forholdet til Grace og Lyle når et krisepunkt.

programme.title: McLeods døtre
programme.desc: Gamle sår åpnes når Stevies datter, Rose, ankommer Drovers Run ledsaget av en som Stevie ikke har sett på 17 år – hennes mor, Helen.

programme.title: My Lucky Stars NO
programme.desc: Politimannen Muscle fra Hong Kong drar til Japan på jakt etter en korrupt kollega. Men siden yakuzaen allerede har opplysninger om ham, kan han ikke gjøre jobben på egen hånd. Etter hvert kaller de inn barndomsvennene til Muscle for å hjelpe til.

programme.title: Once Upon a Time in China and America NO
programme.desc: I en tid da mange kinesere ble solgt til amerikanske jernbaneselskaper som behandlet dem brutalt med tøffe arbeidsforhold, reiser Wong Fei-hung til Amerika. Men etter et bakholdsangrep blir han adskilt fra de andre han reiser med.

programme.title: The Canton Godfather NO
programme.desc: Wah vet knapt ordet av det før han har blitt fralurt pengene sine. Han legger de siste slantene på en rose fra en blomsterhandler som mener at blomstene hennes fører med seg lykke og velstand. Og riktig nok ser Wah snart at flaksen har snudd.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model: Episode 2
programme.desc: The contestants head to the National Wedding Show at Birmingham's NEC to be coached in the art of the catwalk by model Jade Parfitt.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model: Episode 3
programme.desc: It's time for the contestants to receive their makeovers and host Elle Macpherson embraces the challenge by opting for a new look herself. After their transformations, the girls pose like professional gymnasts with Olympian Louis Smith.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model: Episode 4
programme.desc: Chemistry with the camera is imperative for a top model, so to separate the sizzlers from the fizzlers, the girls must pose with male models.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model: Episode 5
programme.desc: Elle Macpherson shares her top tips in a modelling workshop before Tyson challenges the girls to shine on a shoot in an ex-coal mine.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model: Episode 6
programme.desc: The final ten sample the flamboyant world of high fashion in a catwalk show with unusual accessories, before bearing all for a nude shoot.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: An athlete who expects to gain his sight must counsel another man who is certain to lose his.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Jonathan and Mark take on a system that keeps inmate mothers and their children apart.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: The patriarch of a ranch family feels he's too old to rein in some wild horses.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: A cop is working undercover at a school to put an end to drug use but faces suspension because of a mistake Mark has made.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: At Christmastime, Jonathan and Mark try to get a divorced couple to work together for their son's sake. Meanwhile, the holiday may be in jeopardy when a department store Santa is arrested.

programme.desc: 10 realitykjendiser tror de er på en sexy heisatur, men paradiset blir et mareritt når eksene deres begynner å dukke opp fra stranden (utover andre overraskelser) for å ødelegge hyggen. Tennes gamle flammer eller åpnes gamle sår?

programme.title: Ex On The Beach US: Being Shady 101

programme.desc: Farrah får en stor overraskelse i Shack of Secrets. En eks til en eks ruinerer en spirende romanse og avslører noen løgner. Den første eksen sendes hjem.

programme.desc: To ekser slår seg sammen for å knuse Maya og gjengen hennes. En uventet overraskelse setter et av husets sterkeste par i fare.

programme.title: Ex On The Beach US: Jay Is For Jealous
programme.desc: Huset feirer at Farrah er tilbake. Sjalusi fører til fysisk konfrontasjon da en intim sannhet blir avslørt. Noe uventet skjer ved elimineringen.

programme.title: Ex On The Beach US: Low Blows
programme.desc: En etterlengtet eks ankommer, spenning som har småputret lenge eksploderer omsider og starter en voldsom krangel. Farrah trenger seg på andres anliggender, noe som fører til enda mer kaos i huset.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The remaining hopefuls are challenged to create a unique dining experience for a large group of well-known chefs.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The final two chefs work on their menus for a star-studded final dinner service. Only one chef will walk away victorious.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: Eight former contestants are back to take on eight keen rookies. First up is the signature dish challenge, with the veterans trying to create the rookies' meals and trying to impress Gordon early on.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: Chef Ramsay announces that he is taking his risotto off of the Hell's Kitchen menu, and the contestants are tasked with preparing their own risotto dish in the hopes of replacing the old one for the remainder of the season.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: All 15 chefs walk into a dining room filled with Marines, where they find out they will have to cook dishes that represent the air, land and sea. Things take a drastic turn when one chef accuses Chef Ramsay of sabotaging her.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: En skygge i natten
programme.desc: Walker støter på en gammel venn, Yoshi Sakai, som han lærte kampsport sammen med.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: Dusør
programme.desc: Bankraner Roy Buchanan blir arrestert ved et uhell, men når han blir befridd, får han Walker og Trivette etter seg, i tillegg til en morderisk dusørjeger ved navn Boone Waxwell.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: Værvarsel
programme.desc: Trivette er ved elva – og vannet koker rundt ham – når han er undercover i fengsel og blir fanget med andre straffedømte under et brutalt rømningsforsøk mens en orkan raser. Nå må Walker finne Trivette før han blir avslørt.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: I Guds navn
programme.desc: Alex prøver å redde en venns datter fra en religiøs sekt, men blir tatt til fange av gruppens karismatiske leder.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: Kriminalbølge-Dave
programme.desc: Mens han leter etter Billy Clancy, en rømling han tidligere har hjulpet, får Walker vite at Billys tilsynsfører Dave Kilmer har tvunget Billy til å begå forbrytelser.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: Siste jobb
programme.desc: Walker prøver å hjelpe en prøveløslatt person som vil få orden på livet, men som blir tvunget til å begå et siste tyveri av en korrupt tilsynsfører.

programme.title: MTV Ridiculousness

programme.title: The Hills: New City, New Drama
programme.desc: Når Lauren Conrad må mestre både moteskolen, en krevende praktikantjobb og en uforutsigbar romkamerat som ødelegger for henne, forstår hun raskt at alt er stort i Los Angeles, også hennes egne problemer.

programme.title: The Hills: A Change of Plans
programme.desc: Når Heidi fikser et intervju for drømmejobben som får henne til å overveie å hoppe av skolen permanent, forstår Lauren at hun og Heidi kanskje har helt forskjellige mål.

programme.title: The Hills: An Unexpected Call
programme.desc: Teen Vogue sender Lauren på et oppdrag til New York City, men vel tilbake i L.A. venter det henne en stor overraskelse fra fortiden. Heidi skjønner at å jobbe med festreklamering ikke bare er en fest.

programme.title: The Hills: Lauren and Jason: Part 2
programme.desc: Da Jason, Laurens eksflamme fra Laguna Beach, dukker opp igjen i livet hennes, forstår hun at hun kanskje ikke er så ferdig med ham som hun trodde. Samtidig, i sin nye jobb, spør Heidi seg om det egentlig er verdt alt strevet.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant
programme.desc: Ebony fra Colorado Springs tar militærutdanning, men må bytte ut uniformen med mammaklær. Hun og kjæresten Josh vil inn i flyvåpenet, men en baby kan hindre dem i å verve seg, eller til og med i å fullføre skolen.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant
programme.desc: Sørstatsjenta Whitney er familiens baby, men da både hun og moren blir gravide, blir det for fullt i huset. Whitney og kjæresten Weston må flytte ut og stifte sin egen familie.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant
programme.desc: Den 16 år gamle småbyjenta Catelynn er fornuftens røst i en ellers ilter familie. Med støtte fra kjæresten Tyler bestemmer hun seg for adopsjon uten foreldrenes samtykke.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Fade to Black
programme.desc: Paulie og Mike må sjonglere flere grupper med jenter. Det blir slåsskamp i baren, og en av deltakerne blir slått ned.

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 404
programme.desc: Ida og Rasmus drømmer om å bytte ut sine lille leiebolig på Nørrebro med en murervilla i Hillerød. Men de angrer bittert på at de har spurt ekspertene om hjelp når de får se huset pengene gikk til.

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 405
programme.desc: Anna Thora og Jonas har to små barn - og en drøm om å bo sammen med besteforeldrene. Så ekspertene leter etter et hus som har plass til to familier, med plass til alle og deres behov.

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 406
programme.desc: Anne Sofie og Paw har ikke nok plass i den lille Frederiksberg-leiligheten etter en familieøkning. Men kravene til drømmehuset er store, så selv med 7 millioner finner de ikke det de er ute etter.

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 501
programme.desc: Louise og Jonas fra Viborg drømmer stort, men drømmen faller i bakken med et brak. Ekspertene må jobbe hardt før den lille familien - forhåpentligvis - kan flytte inn i drømmehuset.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Uppsala
programme.desc: Uppsala is the city of knowledge: home to the oldest university in Scandinavia. It’s a wonderful agricultural area surrounded by fertile flatlands. Tareq discovers the historical treasures of Uppsala and its thriving culinary life.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: North Sealand
programme.desc: North Zealand has been a playground of the rich and famous since the fifteenth century. Tareq learns how this beautiful north eastern part of Denmark is the perfect place to go foraging for wild berries and herbs.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Åre
programme.desc: Sweden’s largest ski resort Åre is well known for its local ingredients, boasting the highest number of organic food producers per capita in Sweden. The fresh water and clean air create unique conditions for growing excellent food.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: The Danish Lakelands
programme.desc: The Danish Lakelands produce some of the finest ingredients that you can find. Tareq has a go at an old cooking technique from New Zealand called Hangi - using heated rocks buried in a pit oven.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: West Sweden
programme.desc: Gothenburg on the west coast of Sweden has recently been discovered as an exciting destination by both international travel journalists and food bloggers. Tareq tracks down an old army barracks which has been converted into a world class cheese factory.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Luleå
programme.desc: Tareq visits Luleå, home to the beautiful Tree Hotel: a collection of treehouses built by an award winning architect. Following the river further up into the mountains he reaches the land where, for centuries, the Sami people kept their reindeer herds.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Halmstad
programme.desc: In Halmstad Tareq explores the contrast between the busy summer scene at the beach and the quiet rural country life, meeting Jörgen Persson: award winning table tennis player and visiting a village famous for its cheese.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Kemi
programme.desc: Kemi is situated in northern Finland by the Bothnian Bay and it is part of Lapland region. Tareq tries his luck at a spot of burbot fishing on the frozen sea and visits the snow castle hotel.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 301
programme.desc: I dag møter vi bl.a. Jane, som ikke lenger har lyst på sex på grunn av de stygge brystene sine, og Julie, som misliker seg selv på grunn av de store arrene hun fikk etter en brystreduksjon.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 904
programme.desc: Jeannes bryster hindrer henne i å leve et normalt liv. Gitte skammer seg over beina og bruker enormt mye tid og energi på å skjule dem.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 308
programme.desc: Lizette sitter igjen med et knallhardt bryst etter en forstørrende operasjon, mens Diana går med voldsomme smerter etter en brystreduksjon. Begge håper de å få hjelp av de erfarne kirurgene.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 503
programme.desc: Under sin siste fødsel gjennomgikk Sonja et akutt keisersnitt som, noe utradisjonelt, ble kuttet vertikalt på Sonjas mage. Sonjas navle ble kuttet opp, og resultatet er til en stor ulempe for henne.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 309
programme.desc: Ditte har brukt 120 000 kroner på å få større bryster - som er asymmetriske. Eva har fått utført en brystreduksjon, men føler seg nå mer maskulin enn feminin.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: First Impressions Stick
programme.desc: Det ulmer i luften når Marnie kommer tilbake til huset etter kjempekrangelen på nattklubben med Holly og Charlotte. Jentene takler ikke at Marnie kommer tilbake, og gutta ender i sjokktilstand når en ondskapsfull kamp igjen bryter ut.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: So Much For Family Night
programme.desc: Geordiernes rustne sommer når et klimaks med mer fyll og klining, og en endelig dramatik som sjokkerer huset. Gary og Holly er stadig sinte på typen til Charlotte for måten han behandler henne på.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Gaz's Birthday
programme.desc: Geordie-gjengen er tilbake i byen for mer fest, flørt og fyll. Alle er forventningsfulle for den nye karen Aaron, og Marnie lover å holde seg unna alle gutter men havner i seng med Gaz første kveld.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Lad Code
programme.desc: Gary blir sjalu når Marnie flørter med den nye gutten Aaron. Alle er opphisset når Vicky kommer tilbake til huset, og den første 'Tash-On' - turen kommer når gjengen tanker opp med tequila på singel-kvelden.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: The Family's Reunited
programme.desc: Charlotte er tilbake! Og hun kunne ikke kommet på et verre tidspunkt, hun havner midt i en dobbeldate og blir klar over Garys opplegg med Marnie. Den nye karen Aaron vinner en date med Holly, men avslører at han digger Vicky.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Make it Unofficial
programme.desc: Jenni planlegger en babyfest for Nicole og inviterer alle kameratene. Gutta støtter Mike som vil slå opp med Paula, og blir med ham for å oppleve øyeblikket fra første rad.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Shore Shower
programme.desc: MVP er tilbake og muliggjør en nær-trekantopplevelse for Vinny. Gjengen treffer på Angelina i en klubb. Jentene sliter med å holde babyfesten hemmelig for Nicole, og Vinny liker ikke tanken på seg selv og Jionni sammen på babyfesten.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Awkward!
programme.desc: Vinnie prater ut med Jionni og de ordner opp i flokene, så Vin og Nicole kan gjenoppta vennskapet om de vil. Samtidig innser Mike de feilene han har gjort og forsøker å få Nicoles tilgivelse.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Raining Men & Meatballs
programme.desc: Kjøttbollene tar over strandpromenaden og holder audition for å finne en midlertidig festkompis til Deena. Mike avslører at han var stripper før i tiden og romkameratene får ham til å vise sine kunster.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: The Icing on the Cake
programme.desc: Det er slutten på sommeren, og slutten på en lang reise for romkameratene når de forbereder seg på å ta et siste farvel med Seaside.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Jersey Shore Reunion
programme.desc: Hver sommer kommer tusenvis av unge til Jersey Shore for å delta i østkystens overgangsritual: The Shore House. Jersey Shore viser dette fenomenet.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Dare To Dream
programme.desc: Denne sesongen har 400 jenter våget å drømme stort at de kan bli en av de verdensberømte Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders. De satser alt når de preliminære uttakene for 2015-2016-troppen begynner.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Dance Your Heart Out
programme.desc: Tjuetre veteraner melder seg på uttaket for å konkurrere mot 59 nybegynnere som vil ta plassene deres. Talent og utseende er ikke nok for å sikre en plass i troppen. Drømmer både går i oppfyllelse og knuses når kun 46 kommer seg til leiren.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: An Emotional Beginning
programme.desc: Treningsleiren begynner og Kelli sier hvor skapet skal stå. Noen av jentene bryter sammen når de innser hvor vanskelig det er å bli en DCC. Melissa Rycroft gir dem håp og råd om hvordan de skal klare seg.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: The Cuts Begin
programme.desc: Kelli og Judy må sende ti jenter hjem for å komme ned til troppens magiske 36. Tilpassingen av drakter viser Kelli hvem som har alt. Når de begynner å sende folk hjem, knuses drømmer.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Becoming World Class
programme.desc: Jentene får DCC-looken, som er til hjelp for noen, men ikke andre. To gjester overrasker på treningen og rocker DCCs verden. Kelli opplever en av de pinligste kontorsbesøkene noensinne.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Having A Bad Day
programme.desc: Cameo- og showgruppe-uttak presser de nye og veteranene til bristepunktet. Melissa Rycroft forsøker å redde en DCC som henger i en tynn tråd, og et besøk på Kellis kontor avsluttes på en sjokkerende måte.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Tenacious B
programme.desc: A French Bulldog is anxious around other dogs, and a Vizsla is afraid of cars. Can Cesar help one dog improve his social skills and steer the other's behavior toward the fast lane?

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Bam Bam
programme.desc: Cesar is called in to help a Pit Bull outgrow his puppy ways. A Chihuahua Mix terrorizes an older Mastiff and dominates the rest of the house. Cesar is called in to restore the balance of power.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Sooner & Trace, and Casanova
programme.desc: Not a lover, but a fighter, a young dog attacks other dogs while on leash. Two formerly friendly sibling dogs are now at each others’ throats. Can Cesar keep these dogs in line?

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Special: 100th Episode Celebration
programme.desc: Participants from more than 200 stories featured on Dog Whisperer parade down the red carpet to celebrate the 100th Episode of Dog Whisperer with Cesar Millan.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Argonaut & Patches
programme.desc: A family is afraid of being bit by their aggressive English bulldog/Lab mix. Cesar prescribes pack therapy. A Cocker Spaniel has a life-threatening appetite for paper products.

programme.desc: MacGyver is called on to investigate the kidnapping of a wealthy industrialist's daughter.

programme.desc: While on jury duty for a murder trial, MacGyver takes matters into his own hands and uncovers some startling evidence in support of the defendant.

programme.desc: MacGyver and Pete Thornton find themselves under attack when they travel to Romania to investigate the archives of deposed dictator Ceausescu.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: Jase, Jep, Si and Cole battle a growing population of cottonmouth snakes on Phil's property; Willie uses his business expertise to help Rebecca improve her clothing store.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: Jase and Jep argue over who should inherit their grandfather's old rifle; Willie and Korie rehearse a Taiwanese engagement ceremony with Rebecca as she prepares to travel to Taiwan with her fiancé.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: The guys cause Si to lose his job as a bagger at a grocery store; Korie resorts to bribery in order to persuade Willie to get some much-needed dental work.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: The sons and wives work to protect Phil and Kay's home from potential floodwaters when a large storm rolls into town; a leaking warehouse roof threatens inventory at Duck Commander.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: Willie becomes seduced by the game of bingo after he accompanies Kay to a local tournament; Jase and Jep introduce the youngsters to entertaining outdoor mud activities.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: Willie hopes that impending high-school graduate Sadie will decide to attend a local college; Mary Kate and John Luke attempt to prove to Phil that they haven't lost their Robertson roots.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: A competitive cook-off ensues after the Robertson brothers debate which of their wives makes the best cornbread; Jep, Martin and Godwin's practical joke on Uncle Si backfires.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: The guys learn how to rope, ride and clown around when they attend a one-day rodeo fantasy camp; Kay wonders if her dog's new girlfriend comes from a good family.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: When Dog gives a drug addict a second chance, the man flees on his way to rehab.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: The team chases a heavily tattooed bail-jumper; Dog imparts wisdom upon the captured criminal in the hope of changing his life.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Bondswoman Mary Ellen enlists Dog and his team to hunt a man wanted on drug charges; the fugitive's family poses a threat.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Wanted fugitives are rounded up like clockwork as Dog spends two days sweeping his island clean of criminals.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Jade Fever

programme.title: Jade Fever

programme.title: Matlock: Fisherman
programme.desc: Matlock takes on the defense of Nguyen Tran, a Vietnamese fisherman accused of murdering the town bully, a man who had been terrorizing Tran and his fellow countrymen.

programme.title: Matlock: The Heiress
programme.desc: Matlock’s murder defense of Allison Tate, a young heiress with a history of mental instability, is complicated by Warren Kreitzer, a New York lawyer who is responsible for her trust fund.

programme.title: Matlock: The Lemon

programme.title: Matlock: The Ambassador (Part 1)

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: Justin Gates must save a boy deathly ill after swallowing a concoction offered by a medicine man.

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: A cattle baron and a legendary frontiersman involve Marshal Matt Dillon in their life-and-death dispute over a hat.

programme.title: Gunsmoke

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: The mayor of Deadwood comes up with a manufactured Western hero to lure tourists into his dying town.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: The saga regarding the need for and development of blue jeans by Levi Strauss during the California Gold Rush.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: A mine operator insists on having his workers continue in unsafe conditions that are prone to cave-ins.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: Culture comes to a mining town with the arrival of a piano, but nobody knows how to play it.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Rocsi Diaz XXIX
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' skyter Rob, Steelo og Rocsi Diaz rett i kurven med stil med 'Ballfintere', oppdager at enkelte dager er 'Umiddelbart dårlige dager' og blir vitner til søt justis på veien i 'Veikarma'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Rocsi Diaz XXX
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' er Rob, Steelo og gjestende vert Rocsi Diaz veldig oppmerksomme men gjør likevel 'Forsiktige feil', mister taket på 'Overdimensjonert last' og drar sin vei med stil i 'Smidige avskjeder'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Rocsi Diaz XXXI
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' flipper Rob, Steelo og Rocsi Diaz ut i 'Halvt baklengs', setter seg på 'Billige stoler' og ser hvem som får seg en 'Dekksmekk'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Rocsi Diaz XXXII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' tilbringer Rob, Steelo og Rocsi Diaz en smertefull dag på vannet i 'Båtknekt', går ut og blir 'Terrassevrak' og manifesterer en del smeller i 'Dårlig tiltrekning'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Rocsi Diaz XXXIII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' passer Rob Dyrdek, Steelo Brim og Rocsi Diaz godt på bakdelene sine, så de ikke blir 'Rumpestukket', tar rare omveier for å unngå 'Ville veisperringer' og går tilbake til Robs røtter med 'Skaterhatere'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Daymond John II
programme.desc: I kveldens episode av 'Ridiculousness' møter Rob, Steelo, Lolo Wood og gjest Daymond John nifse haier i 'Finneskrekk', vil ikke investere i folk som er 'Ikke banebrytende' og finner ut hva som skjer når man tar 'Slurvete snarveier'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Daymond John III
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' får Rob Dyrdek, Steelo Brim, Lolo Wood og gjest Daymond John pengerådgivning av 'Mini-Daymonds', møter noen rasende bier som skaper 'Biebataljer' og tester produkter i 'Prøv før du kjøper'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood XLI
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' blir Rob, Steelo og gjestevert Lolo Wood rådløse på sjøen og blir helt 'Havkorka', kaster for mange erteposer i 'Villvest-Cornhole' og må jobbe med egen tålmodighet fordi de 'Avskyr å vente'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Rocsi Diaz XXXIV
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' klatrer Rob, Steelo og Rocsi Diaz i feil trær med 'Døde greiner', klatrer opp på feil person i 'Dårlige skulderholdere' og blir intense på kontoret med 'Ekstrem kontorstoling'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Paige Desorbo
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' får Rob, Steelo og Paige Desorbo se noen ryggradpirrende fall i 'Ryggknekkere', hører hvordan Rob sparte penger for å flytte til California i 'Lagerleker' og avslutter med smerte ved vannet i 'Tørr landing'.

programme.title: Andromeda: Hjertet av reisen (del 1)
programme.desc: Mannskapet gjør det endelig ut av Seefra-systemet og oppdager at Dylan er den siste Paradine.

programme.title: Andromeda: Hjertet av reisen (del 2)
programme.desc: Den siste kampen for å redde New Systems Commonwealth begynner.

programme.title: Andromeda: Under natten
programme.desc: Etter å ha blitt igjen strandet i nærheten av et svart hull, blir kaptein Dylan Hunt oppdaget av et leiesoldat bergingsskip og finner at han har vært frossen i tide i 300 år.

programme.title: Andromeda: En bekreftende flamme
programme.desc: Dylan beskytter Andromeda mot leiesoldater mens Beka begynner å lure på om de kjemper for feil side.

programme.title: Andromeda: Å miste den skjebnesvangre lynet
programme.desc: Dylan finner en romstasjon full av barn som tror at han er der for å bringe fred ved å drepe fiendene sine.

programme.title: Andromeda: D Minus Zero
programme.desc: Andromeda-mannskapet lærer fremdeles hvordan de skal samarbeide ettersom de blir angrepet av restauratørene.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Nice Threads
programme.desc: A woman was found dead on the bedroom floor of her apartment. The crime scene yielded little of value and investigators wondered if they would find enough evidence to make a case, much less catch a killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Grave Danger
programme.desc: A young man was killed in a mysterious car crash, but the evidence at the scene led investigators to believe it was not an accident. Forensic science revealed what really happened and the truth devastated three families.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Internal Affair
programme.desc: When a woman went missing, friends and family were determined to find her. Their worst fears were confirmed weeks later when her body was discovered.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Case of the Flue
programme.desc: In 1993, 82-year-old Kathryn Bishop was found dead in her Pennsylvania home. Tiny clues on the victim's body would tell police what happened that night.

programme.title: Forensic Files: No Safe Place
programme.desc: A wealthy man and his wife were attacked by three masked men outside their luxurious Louisiana home. He was shot dead and she was forced to open their hidden safe. To solve the crime, police would have to find out who knew about the concealed safe.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Live Wire
programme.desc: A bomb, constructed to cause as much damage as possible, kills a victim with deadly force and flame. When a painstaking search yields some tiny clues, police are able to identify the killer as surely as if he'd signed them.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Van-ished
programme.desc: A twelve-year-old girl claimed she had been abducted and sexually assaulted. She recounted what happened in such a flat, unemotional voice that police found it difficult to believe her. Fibers on her clothing would prove she was telling the truth.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Novel Idea
programme.desc: When the number and volume of bloodstains at the scene was greater than usual, it was up to forensic scientists to find out why.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Chief Suspect
programme.desc: The wife of a respected police officer was murdered in her own home. The crime went unsolved for more than a decade, until a newly formed cold case unit took a fresh look at the evidence.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Water Hazard
programme.desc: The victim had ingested a massive amount of cyanide. An unlikely clue ? a flaw on a mailing envelope ? exposed a murderer who was willing to kill innocent people.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries: Episode: 10
programme.desc: This episode includes: George Anderson (Pts. 1 & 2), UD: Brother X and Strangulation Saga (Pts. 1 & 2).

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries: Episode: 11
programme.desc: This episode includes: Polio & UD, Missing Gringo, UD: Lucky Lost Love, Poison Shake & UD and UD: Goldie's Girl.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries: Episode: 12
programme.desc: This episode includes: Martin Luther King (Pts. 1 & 2), Surprise Sister & UD and Texas Most Wanted & UD.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries: Episode: 13
programme.desc: This episode includes: Dahlia/Torso Connection, Brenda's Bunch & UD, Bullock's Deadwood and Dede's Gone & UD.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries: Episode: 14
programme.desc: This episode includes: Christmas Miracle, Burned Businessman & UD, Gallup Abduction and Mystery Santa.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries: Episode: 15
programme.desc: This episode includes: Marcos' Buddha (Pts. 1 & 2), Who Killed Kaitlyn? and Nine Isn't Enough & UD.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Cat and Mouse
programme.desc: He was a predator, abducting girls and young women from their own front yards in broad daylight. He was a sadist: phoning one victim's family, taunting them, boosting then dashing their hope, and he wouldn't stop until we stopped him.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Terror In Disguise
programme.desc: Banks use a variety of devices to discourage would-be robbers: security cameras, silent alarms, and exploding dye packs. But when an elusive bank robber targeted Seattle's banks, none of these precautions were effective.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Hired Gun
programme.desc: When three people were found murdered in their home, it appeared like a burglary gone awry. But a crime this horrific deserved a closer look.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Moving Target
programme.desc: When a sniper in Utah started targeting African-American men for death, authorities launched a massive investigation. With scant clues and no witnesses they found the odds stacked against them, and they had no idea where the killer would strike next.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Backstage Murder
programme.desc: In the 1980's, two partners created a nightclub that would bring them wealth and international fame. The male strip club phenomenon promised female patrons fun and excitement. But the bright lights hid a dark side.

programme.title: The New Detectives: From The Ashes
programme.desc: Arson Investigation: Insurance torchings, mob burnouts and arson murders: these crimes are designed to take all clues with them. But a solid case can be built from a heap of ashes.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Murder By Numbers
programme.desc: For serial killers, once is never enough. For investigators, the challenge is steep when the killers murder by numbers.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Missing
programme.desc: Approximately 1.8 million Americans are reported missing each year. Some are runaways who find their way home, but others simply disappear. When foul play is suspected, investigators turn to forensics to find the missing.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Undaunted
programme.desc: Solving crimes may begin with gut intuition, but advanced science provides investigators with irrefutable proof. When criminals go to great lengths to mask their crimes, investigators must step up the challenge and remain forever undaunted.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Lethal Dosage
programme.desc: Toxicology: While drugs can cure disease and ease pain, they can also be agents of murder. Toxicologists can examine blood and tissue to uncover cases where death is not as natural as it may seemfrom slow arsenic poisoning to quick cocaine overdoses.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Fun and Games at The Sportsman Inn
programme.desc: Bex, Sean and Paul, investigate claims of paranormal incidents inside of a haunted inn. Once three separate cottages, will any of the previous residents join the investigation tonight? Or is there something more sinister haunting here?

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: A Poltergeist Nightmare at 30 East Drive
programme.desc: The team step into a house that has become a legend with the paranormal community, 30 East Drive, Pontefract.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Lockdown: The Club
programme.desc: One haunted members only club and a bar full if spirits. Ghost Dimension capture ghostly goings on, inside of Aintree Conservative Club. A place never investigated before and has paranormal activity daily.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: House of Fear
programme.desc: Located in Gran Canaria, there is one house that locals refuse to enter and that is, The House of Fear. Ghostly shadows, loud banging and demonic voices have all been reported here and the Ghost Dimension team will investigate these claims tonight.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Last Orders at The Fleece Inn
programme.desc: The team heads to Elland to investigate ghostly-goings on in this haunted pub. It's not just the spirits behind the bar lurking here. Multiple hauntings, murders and death surround this public house.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: She Said She'd Drown the Baby
programme.desc: Devon slipped into a coma and is on life support. But before he fell into a coma, he told his mother that his ex Alisha said he did not father their son. Alisha denies ever saying this and feels his whole family has turned their backs on her.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show: Cheaters Come Clean
programme.desc: Couples reveal they have been cheating on today's Jerry Springer Show. Candice confronts Nikki for sleeping with her man and Mike suspects Moon has been cheating with two people.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show: Holiday Hell Feast
programme.desc: Melody is horrified that her sister, Amanda, is ruining her life by dating a 54 year old biker and loser named Wolf. Today they'll face off against Amanda's entire family!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show: Homewreckers Confronted
programme.desc: Linda says her former best friend is trying to steal her man and she's fighting back! Then, Sherry wants her boyfriend Terry's wife Sandy and her family out of their lives!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show: Wives Battle Mistresses
programme.desc: Today, Vicki will face her husband Jason and his lover with an ultimatum and Anna admits she’s trying to steal Misty’s husband – again!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show: We Live In A Car
programme.desc: Our guests say they're ready to come clean. Yolando regrets sleeping with her best friend’s boyfriend and Cameron has been hiding a secret from his roommates.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show: High Class Call Girls
programme.desc: Bambi gives us a rare, honest look into her ultra-exclusive lifestyle in LA. Tiffany confronts C.T. over a rotten business deal.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Murder Bites
programme.desc: A young woman is found naked and strangled in a park not 200 yards from her home. It isn’t until Lt. Joe Kenda rethinks the entire case that he realizes someone has been lying.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: The Invisible Hand of Death
programme.desc: Two teens stumble upon a woman engulfed in flames, leaving detectives to wonder just who in her inner circle could kill so cruelly.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Shallow Grave
programme.desc: Lt. Joe Kenda and his team investigate the scene of an apparent suicide, only to be forced to flee when they discover the house is booby-trapped.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Human Animal
programme.desc: The naked body of a vibrant young mother is found frozen solid in a deserted cemetery. Kenda reopens the investigation and recognizes the sinister hallmark of a serial killer.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Trigger
programme.desc: A sharp-dressed pedestrian is shot in the back for unknown reasons. Chasing a promising lead, Kenda realizes he’s barking up the wrong tree.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: Surveillance video is often the most precise witness to a crime. After three brutal murders were caught on tape in Alabama, the suspects fled the area. They had an arsenal of stolen weapons, and swore they wouldn't be taken alive.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: When law enforcement officers become targets, no one is safe. So when a crystal meth dealer on the run from the law began shooting cops, it took more than police to stop him.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: Women are most often assaulted by someone they know. Near Las Vegas in December of 2000 a young woman became the latest victim of a violent sex offender. Before authorities could locate him, he would add murder to his list of crimes.

programme.title: Cops: Last Call Brawl
programme.desc: Deputies chase a man who flees a routine traffic stop. Deputies find drugs on a man who gives them an expired license. Officers respond to a man attacking several patrons in a bar.

programme.title: Cops: He's the Gingerbread Man
programme.desc: A man wanted for unpaid child support hides from deputies. Officers respond to a sexual predator following a minor. A man with a checkered driving record crashes his car.

programme.title: Cops: Hood Flip
programme.desc: A police chase becomes more dangerous when the hood of a stolen vehicle flips open. A purse snatcher denies robbing a woman. A limping man with a knee injury denies crashing his car into a tree.

programme.title: Cops: Dangerous Toppings
programme.desc: A jaywalker with no id bolts away from an officer. A man mixes illicit items with his pizza. A woman involved in a domestic violence call blames her monthly issues.

programme.title: Cops: No Respect these Days
programme.desc: A combative man at a fast food restaurant claims his phone was stolen. Multiple illegal items are found on a man parked on the side of the road. An intoxicated man throws an 83-year-old's walker.

programme.title: The Haunting Of. . .: Connie Stevens
programme.desc: Connie and her daughter Joely Fisher have shared their home with a ghost for a long time. Kim accompanies both women.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: Pilot-UFO Disclosure
programme.desc: Richard examines the growing UFO Disclosure movement and its attempts to force the US Government to reveal to the public what it knows about UFOs and aliens.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: 9/11: Controlled Demolition
programme.desc: Richard speaks with the founders of Architects and Engineers for 911 Truth and Firefighters for 911 Truth who present their case that the WTC towers were brought down by controlled demolition on 9/11.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: An investigation into the practice of past-life regression therapy; a technique where subjects are placed under hypnosis in order to recover memories of supposed past lives.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: Chemtrails
programme.desc: What on Earth are they spraying? Richard travels into the field to meet several researchers who present compelling evidence that chemicals or biological agents are being deliberately sprayed into the atmosphere by some shadowy government agency.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: The Antichrist
programme.desc: End times prophecy experts discuss the possible identity of the antichrist and the timing of his emergence onto the world state.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: Electronic Harassment
programme.desc: Two victims of alleged electronic harassment and organized gang-stalking recount their horrible ordeals. Richard investigates possible theories as to who is behind this program and why.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: Demonic Possession
programme.desc: The religious practice known as exorcism is examined as well as claims of demonic possession. Richard travels to a Catholic seminary in Yonkers, New York.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: Is a powerfully rich cabal with a globalist agenda conspiring to destroy sovereign nations and impose authoritarian rule?

programme.title: Andromeda: Tårenes matematikk
programme.desc: Andromeda oppdager søsterskipet, Pax Magellanic. Mannskapet ombord Pax er 300 år ... men har ikke blitt eldre en dag.

programme.title: Mutant X: Crime of the New Century
programme.desc: En gutt som utvikler nye mutante evner er kidnappet og teamet samtykker i å finne ham til moren sin. De lærer senere at hun var den som fikk sønnen kidnappet.

programme.title: Mutant X: Dark Star Rising
programme.desc: Teamet møter noen mennesker som prøver å bryte seg inn i et Genomex-laboratorium og oppdage at de er feraler.

programme.title: Mutant X: Whiter Shade of Pale
programme.desc: En ny mutant med usynlighetens kraft arbeider mot både Eckhart og Adam, til tross for at hun tidligere var involvert med Adam.

programme.title: Mutant X: Double Vision
programme.desc: En gammel venn av Brennan lokker ham og Emma i en felle. Emma ender opp i to separate enheter, en god og en ond.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Diamond in the Rough
programme.desc: Sydney, Nigel og den rivaliserende relikviejegeren Kurt Reiner prøver å finne den tapte baseballhanske til Jimmy Jonesboro.

programme.title: On the Case: A Betrayal Concealed
programme.desc: A 17-year-old's shocking murder shatters the peace in a small town and destroys her family.

programme.title: On the Case: Scent of a Killer
programme.desc: The investigation into Sandra Iverson's stabbing death goes cold until a police canine team uncovers a trail leading them to an unlikely young suspect.

programme.title: On the Case: In Plain Sight
programme.desc: When a beautiful young woman is murdered the evidence points detectives to a killer hiding in plain sight.

programme.title: On the Case: The Answer Was No
programme.desc: Police try to retrace a young mother's last known movements in an attempt to solve her mysterious disappearance.

programme.title: On the Case: Tip 1960
programme.desc: 19 year old Katie Poirier was working the night shift at a Convenience store when she was violently kidnapped. The abduction was captured on videotape but the images were not clear enough to identify her attacker.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Sharon Stone, Chef Carla Hall, Beauty Routines with Allure Magazine’s Editor In Chief
programme.desc: "Ratched" star Sharon Stone joins Drew. Plus, "Halloween Baking Championship" Host and Judge Carla Hall shares one of her favorite foods with Drew. Drew discusses her morning and evening routine with Allure Magazine’s Editor in Chief Michelle Lee.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Henry Winkler on his latest children’s book, "Lights, Camera, Danger!" "Superstore" star Nico Santos joins Drew. Drew shines a spotlight on 18-year-old hero Justin Galvin." Plus, Drew celebrates Hispanic Heritage Month cooking with Aaron Sanchez.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Hoda Kotb, America’s Most Haunted House, The Weekender
programme.desc: "Today" Co-Anchor Hoda Kotb joins Drew to discuss her new book. Drew goes inside one of America’s most Haunted Houses with the help of a medium. Then, Drew gives a curated list of her favorites in "The Weekender."

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: “Drew’s D-Cluttering” Show, Marie Kondo, Rachael Ray
programme.desc: It’s “Drew’s D-Cluttering” show! Drew is joined by tidying expert Marie Kondo who shares her tips for sparking joy. Then, Rachael Ray shares kitchen staples for a clutter-less kitchen. Plus, Drew surprises one single mom with a home office makeover.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Time Management Hour, 5-Min Meals with Chef Rocco DiSpirito
programme.desc: It’s Drew’s time management hour! Time management expert Laura Vanderkam shares tips. A five-min meal with Chef Rocco DiSpirito. "The People’s Court" Judge Marilyn Milian and husband Judge John Schlesinger on balancing work and relationships effectively.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: “Queer Eye’s” Karamo Brown, Beauty In A Box, Halloween Tablescapes with Darcy Miller
programme.desc: “Queer Eye’s” Karamo Brown joins Drew. In Beauty in A Box, Drew surprises a viewer at home who is need of a quick makeup routine. Plus, celebrations expert Darcy Miller shares Halloween tablescapes to help your family celebrate the holiday this year.
