programme.title: Snooker 900
programme.desc: Snooker 900 is the new fast, 15-minute version of snooker. It features legends like Jimmy White and showcases top amateurs, juniors, women, and disabled players.

programme.title: Snooker
programme.desc: Live coverage from a top-level snooker event on the International circuit.

programme.title: World Seniors Snooker 900
programme.desc: Snooker 900 er den nye hurtige og spennende versjonen av spillet! Kom og se ukentlige konkurranser, arkiv spill, studio segmenter og mye mer.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Allisons visjoner blir en viktig informasjonskilde for myndighetene når prøvene av en dødelig sykdom forsvinner. I mellomtiden tror Scanlon at han er klar til å fri til Lynn.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Hovedmistenkte i en drapssak dør, og politiet er overbevist om at han var skyldig. Men når den døde mannen kontakter Allison, sier han at han er uskyldig og at han vil hjelpe henne med å finne morderen.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Når årsdagen for Devalos' datters død nærmer seg, blir Devalos hjemsøkt av minnene fra den traumatiske hendelsen, og Allison drømmer om hvor langt Devalos gikk for å sette datterens morder i fengsel.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Allison drømmer om et schizofrent barn, men når hun møter henne i det virkelige liv, virker hun helt normal - men hun har en psykisk syk romkamerat.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Allison ser hele tiden ansiktet til en mann i ansiktene til andre mennesker, inkludert Joe, og må finne ut hvorfor. I mellomtiden har Ariel problemer med å sitte barnevakt for en rampete gutt.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Colleen and Brian's biological father Ethan returns to town with a new wife, intending to take the children away from Dr. Quinn.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Colleen and Brian run away to keep their father from taking them away from Dr. Mike and Sully. After they are found, it's discovered Colleen has developed pneumonia. Dr. Mike realizes she has to let them go to save them.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: The town puts on a production of Romeo and Juliet. Brian tries to learn what love is so he can write a paper for school.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Dr. Mike convinces Robert E to take a job fixing a train boiler, then finds out it is a dangerous job.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: A teenage Belle Star robs the saloon with the Younger brothers and is shot. Dr. Mike takes her home in an effort to show her a real home life, attempting to turn her from her life of crime.

programme.title: Luksusfellen Sverige: Episode 2907
programme.desc: Peter og Mathilda har vært sammen i over tjue år og har to barn sammen, men nå eksisterer deres forhold bare gjennom det de sammen skylder bankene.

programme.title: Luksusfellen Sverige: Episode 2908
programme.desc: Mikael har alltid forvaltet økonomien sin dårlig. Utad har han levd som om han ikke har noen problemer, og det var bildet han formidlet da han møtte kjæresten Emelie.

programme.title: Luksusfellen Sverige: Episode 2909
programme.desc: Christian er kokken som har levd det gode livet på restauranten i over tjue år og sakte men sikkert har pådratt seg stor gjeld.

programme.title: Luksusfellen Sverige: Episode 3001
programme.desc: Alenemoren Malin er i så store problemer at hennes eks forrige måned måtte overføre penger slik at hun hadde råd til mat og bleier. Nå er hun uten jobb og aner ikke hvordan hun skal kunne betale husleien neste måned.

programme.title: Luksusfellen Sverige: Episode 3002
programme.desc: 33 år gamle Viktoria i Norrköping har aldri hatt en heltidsjobb, men det hindrer henne ikke i å kjøpe ting på avbetaling, som hun så ignorerer å betale.

programme.title: Unga Mammor: Episode 222
programme.desc: Milan, Julia B og bestevenninnen Louise drar til stranden ved Åhus Bryggen. De prater om Julias nye kjæreste Dennis som bor i Russland og om hvordan det er å ha et langdistanseforhold.

programme.title: Unga Mammor: Episode 223
programme.desc: Vi får møte Natalies nye kjæreste Richard. Han, Natalie og barna skal vaske Natalies skitne Volvo som nå skal selges.

programme.title: Unga Mammor: Episode 224
programme.desc: Natalie og Richard planlegger å flytte sammen og sammen med barna går de på visning. Kan dette være familiens nye hjem der alle barn, dyr og biler får plass?

programme.title: Unga Mammor: Episode 225
programme.desc: Linn og Marcus er på sykehuset for å gjøre ultralyd. Det viser seg at Tindra ligger med hodet opp og de må forsøke å snu henne, som dessverre mislykkes.

programme.title: Unga Mammor: Episode 226
programme.desc: Julia M forteller om bulimien sin som hun ble diagnostisert med for omtrent seks måneder siden. For Julia B er det viktig å få treningen inn i hverdagen, til tross for livet som småbarnsforelder.

programme.title: Unga Mammor: Episode 227
programme.desc: Nå er dagen kommet for Natalies brystforstørrelse, men er hun og kirurgen enige om hvilken størrelse Natalie skal ha? Vannet går midt på natten hos Linn og Marcus!

programme.title: Unga Mammor: Episode 228
programme.desc: Milan og Julia B drar til sykehuset i Kristianstad hvor Milan skal ta røntgen. Vil legene komme med en forklaring på hvorfor Milan fremdeles ikke kan gå?

programme.title: Unga Mammor: Episode 229
programme.desc: I Örebro har det gått tre dager, og Linn, Marcus og Tindra har fortsatt ikke fått lov til å dra hjem. De får hjelp av jordmoren med amming, men får ikke reise hjem før Tindras blodsukker er stabilt.

programme.title: Unga Mammor: Episode 230
programme.desc: Vi hører om Joys fremtidsplaner, vi følger Julia B og Natalie på den røde løperen, Linn og Marcus har endelig fått lov til å dra hjem, og det er på tide at Nanja blir døpt.

programme.title: Unga Mammor: Episode 301
programme.desc: Ny sesong, ny mamma: Fayme Elmén er 21 år gammel, og bor i Segersäng sammen med mannen Moltas og de tre barna Colin, Leo og Mila.

programme.title: Rett Vest
programme.desc: Georg Margrethe får et mentalt sammenbrudd etter konens bortgang. For å komme seg vekk fra elendigheten bestemmer de seg for å reise over fjellet til øya Ona, for å representere sin nylig avdøde kone i norgesmesterskapet i quilting.

programme.title: Incendies
programme.desc: Når advokaten møter Jeanne og Simon Marwan for å lese opp testamentet etter deres mor, blir tvillingene overrasket av to konvolutter - ett om faren de trodde var død og et annet om en bror de ikke visste eksisterte.

programme.title: Defiance
programme.desc: Året er 1941 og de tyske styrkene har inntatt Øst-Europa. De tre brødrene Bielski (Daniel Craig, Live Schreiber og Jamie Bell) unngår fangenskap og finner beskyttelse i den tette skogen de har kjent siden de var barn.

programme.title: Wild Target
programme.desc: En iskald leiemorder får sitt liv snudd på hodet når han blir forelsket i sitt mål, en sjarmerende svindler med uventede planer.

programme.title: Blood Brother
programme.desc: Jake havner i fengsel for å beskytte vennene sine, og hans beste venn Chris snur livet hans på hodet og blir politibetjent. Når Jake løslates etter 15 år, søker han hevn.

programme.title: Liberty Stands Still
programme.desc: En pistolmann binder fast en skuespiller og låser ham inne i garderoben rett før en forestilling. Han planter også en bombe med en nedtelling på 90 minutter ved siden av skuespilleren.

programme.title: Humor Me
programme.desc: Humor Me er en varm far-sønn-komedie om en forfatter med skrivesperre som tvinges til å flytte inn sammen med sine vitsebesatte far i et pensjonistsamfunn i New Jersey. Der lærer han, som faren sier, at ”livet skjer, enten du smiler eller ei”.

programme.title: A Perfect Day
programme.desc: En absurd komedie om noe som egentlig ikke er til å spøke med. Krigen i Bosnia går mot slutten. Landet ligger i ruiner og gode naboer har blitt bitre fiender. A Perfect Day klarer å være både morsom og dypt grusom på én gang.

programme.title: Meet the Spartans
programme.desc: Kampen begynner idet den heltemodige Leonidas, bare væpnet med skinnundertøy og en slengkappe, leder en broketeskare av 13 (ja, 13!) krigere for å forsvare hjemlandet.

programme.title: Being Mary Jane: The Huxtables Have Fallen
programme.desc: Mary Jane innser at realiteten bak affæren hennes er avslørt. En edruskapsfest driver Patrick til å reflektere over livet, og Mary Jane svarer til slutt Andre om frieriet.

programme.title: Boomerang: Pilot
programme.desc: New age markedsføringsproffene Bryson Broyer og Simone Graham vil skape sine egne spor for å lykkes samtidig som de vil ivareta foreldrenes arv: Graham-agenturet. En gang et firma som definerte industrien, men har mistet sin glans.

programme.title: Boomerang: Game Night
programme.desc: Bryson arrangerer en spillekveld for gjengen, men moroa forvandles snart til sjalusi når Simone konsentrerer seg om en uventet gjest. David og Crystal treffer hverandre for første gang siden skilsmissen.

programme.title: Boomerang: Power
programme.desc: Bryson prøver å få Victoria til å markedsføre en svart avantgardefilm. Simone leter etter muligheter for at Tia skal bygge varemerket sitt. Bryson tar tilbake makten fra Simone.

programme.title: Boomerang: Call A Spade
programme.desc: Simone, Crystal og Tia drar på en nattlig jentetur for å redde Simones sorgløse bestevenninne og kjæresten fra fengsel. Simone tar også hånd om sin skyld over Crystal og Davids skilsmisse.

programme.title: Games People Play: Pilot
programme.desc: Nia blir forfremmet og flytter til Los Angeles, og forlater kjæresten Eric i New York. Vanessa og baskemannen Marcus kjøpes til Los Angeles med nyheten om at dama han hadde en affære med nå er borte.

programme.title: Games People Play: Lover's Moon
programme.desc: Nia intervjuer Laila om historien. Laila bekrefter at mannen på bildene er Marcus King. Nia informerer Vanessa om artikkelen som holder på å bli utgitt. Kareem forteller Marcus at Jamal sliter med spillegjeld.

programme.title: Games People Play: The Drink of Kings
programme.desc: Marcus og Vanessa gå til rådgiver. Nia og MJ kjemper for å komme seg etter tapet av Laila-historien. Laila arrangerer privatfester for Roxanne og blir venn med Susie Q. Susie inviterer Laila til en snobbete begivenhet.

programme.title: Doc Martin: Episode 306
programme.desc: En mystisk luftveisinfeksjon bryter ut i landsbyen.

programme.title: Doc Martin: Episode 307
programme.desc: På bryllupsdagen får brudepiken til Louisa konfetti i øyet; den lokale blomsterhandleren blir arrestert og blir tvunget til å stenge butikken sin.

programme.title: Doc Martin: Episode 401
programme.desc: Dr. Martin Ellingham og Louisa har tatt den hjerteskjærende avgjørelsen om å avlyse bryllupet deres.

programme.title: Doc Martin: Episode 402
programme.desc: Dr Martin Ellingham sliter med å takle Louisas nyheter. Men Louisa er fast bestemt på at hun ikke vil at Martin skal være involvert.

programme.title: Doc Martin: Episode 403
programme.desc: Dr. Martin Ellingham er overrasket over å finne Louise og Joan utenfor døren før åpningstid. Louisa er bekymret for at noe er galt og vil ha Martins bekreftelse på at alt er i orden.

programme.title: Doc Martin: Episode 404
programme.desc: Dr Martin Ellingham blir tilkalt til Louisas nye hjem etter at hun nesten besvimte mens hun flyttet møbler.

programme.title: American Siege
programme.desc: Den avdankede sheriffen i en liten by i Georgia, Ben Watts, blir presset til raskt å løse en gisselsituasjon – og innser snart at han er en brikke i et større spill blant byens skumle hemmeligheter.

programme.title: Parker
programme.desc: En kompromissløs mestertyv blir forrådt av medhjelperne og overlatt for å dø. Han utgir seg for å være en annen og samarbeider med en kvinne på innsiden for å sikre seg det seneste kuppet til gjengen.

programme.title: Breach
programme.desc: En hardbarket mekaniker er en av de få utvalgte som må holde seg våken og vedlikeholde en romark som, med noen tusen heldige sjeler om bord, flykter fra en døende jord.

programme.title: 97 Minutes
programme.desc: Et kapret fly vil styrte om bare 97 minutter når det går tom for drivstoff. NSA-direktøren vil at flyet skal skytes ned før den tid, og overlater skjebnen til de uskyldige passasjerene til en hemmelig Interpol-agent.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Hot Wheels
programme.desc: '70s sand rail dune racer with rally hemi heads; 1965 replica Mustang pool table; off-road racing gear.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Bowling Pin Payday
programme.desc: Allen & Ton visit Ton's old stompin' ground and go head-to-head with a trash-talking auction buyer. They uncover a 19th century rifle with a matching cutlass bayonet and a mechanical bowling pinsetter from the early 1960's!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Fake Punt Payoff
programme.desc: Ton and Allen contend with a large crowd of inexperienced auction-buyers at a huge storage container auction in Pasadena. They find a small fleet of Segway personal transporters and an enormous custom-made shotgun.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Allen's Got Balls
programme.desc: After returning to LA, Ton & Allen head deep into hostile auction hunter territory and butt heads with a familiar old foe! They discover a driving range golf ball picker vehicle and one of the most accurate rifles ever made!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Allen's Ruff Day
programme.desc: Ton and Allen head to an auction in Ton's hometown and end up battling with a big-mouthed buyer. They discover a pair of tranquilizer dart guns and also end up fighting with a K9!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Ton's Got a Gun
programme.desc: In the affluent area of Mission Hills, CA, Allen and Ton pick up an estate unit that contains a minibike, a Depression-era slot machine and an 1871 Colt revolver.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Sidecar Surprise
programme.desc: An unassuming mom in an oversized sweater tries to pull the wool over Ton & Allen's eyes at a storage auction in Arlington, VA. The guys uncover a black powder cannon designed in the 15th century & a Russian military motorcycle!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Choo-Choo, Cha-Ching!
programme.desc: Ton and Allen get a surprise second chance after nearly getting shut out in the small town of Palmer. They uncover a motorized railroad maintenance car from the 1960's and a pre-WWI Japanese semi-automatic pistol.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Little-Ton Jones
programme.desc: Allen & Ton try to get the inside scoop on their competition by chatting up local auction buyers. The guys find some heavy gold-mining machinery from the 1950s & an amateur rocket that can travel faster than the speed of sound!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Big Easy Money
programme.desc: Allen & Ton head to New Orleans in search of easy money, but instead encounter some bayou bidders with big-time bucks! They discover a pair of early 19th-century dueling pistols & a vintage airboat fitted with a turbine engine!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Half Pipe Dreams
programme.desc: 1970s Z-Flex Jimmy Plumer Poolrider skateboard with artwork by Doug Smith; Kevlar bulletproof vest, ballistic facemask and a helmet used by S.W.A.T. teams; a pair of 1990s racing pocket bikes capable of going 80 mph.

programme.title: Meet Me Under the Mistletoe
programme.desc: To rivaliserende eiendomsmeglere blir tvunget til å samarbeide for å selge et spesielt hus, eid av en anerkjent botaniker og mistelteindyrker, før jul.

programme.title: A Unicorn for Christmas
programme.desc: Når en ung jente oppdager en ekte enhjørning på et julekarneval, må hun beskytte den mot den grådige tivolieieren.

programme.title: A Christmas Star
programme.desc: En astronom spår at et nytt meteorregn vil dukke opp over en liten by, men hun må overbevise lokalbefolkningen om å hjelpe til med oppdagelsen hennes på bekostning av en juletradisjon.

programme.title: The Dead Zone: Finding Rachel - Part 1
programme.desc: Johnny becomes the prime suspect in a case involving a missing woman and is confronted by her sister (Sarah Wynter), who clamors for his arrest.

programme.title: The Dead Zone: Finding Rachel - Part 2
programme.desc: Following his arrest for the murder of a young volunteer for the Stillson (Sean Patrick Flanery) campaign, Johnny struggles to persuade the victim's sister (Sarah Wynter) to help him find the real killer.

programme.title: A Cat in the Brain
programme.desc: En skrekkfilmregissør blir forfulgt av en gal psykiater og seriemorder som dreper ofrene sine etter mønster fra regissørens egne blodige filmscener.

programme.title: Drag Me To Hell
programme.desc: Christine Brown er en ærgjerrig, men godhjertet utlånsmedarbeider med en sjarmerende kjæreste. Men når hun blir forbannet av en rasende pensjonist, har Christine bare tre dager på seg før hun bokstavelig talt blir dratt ned til helvete.

programme.title: Scorpion NO: Rock Block
programme.desc: Team Scorpion må trosse ordre fra en utenlandsk regjering når de henter en asteroide fra verdensrommet som inneholder DNA-tråder som kan få dødelige konsekvenser hvis de blir utsatt for luft.

programme.title: Scorpion NO: Strife on Mars
programme.desc: Team Scorpion blir sittende fast i en kollapsende og farlig biodom beregnet på Mars mens de prøver å få et par forskere ut.

programme.title: Scorpion NO: Satellite of Love
programme.desc: Den nye direktøren for Homeland Security gjenforener teamet når en atomdrevet russisk satellitt blir slått ut av bane og må omdirigeres før den detonerer over Sør-California.

programme.title: Scorpion NO: Cuba Libre
programme.desc: Team Scorpion drar til Cuba når en kvinne fra Cabes fortid ber ham om å hjelpe til med å fange en serbisk krigsforbryter.

programme.title: Scorpion NO: Fish Filet
programme.desc: For å redde livene til tre dommere går Sylvester undercover i et føderalt fengsel, men Team Scorpion må bryte ham ut når livet hans er i fare.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: Agent Colby Granger lands in prison after the discovery that he was a mole within the FBI, but he escapes, and it's up to Don and his team to track him down and uncover the truth on the fourth season premiere.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: A typical morning at a coffee shop turns into a nightmare when a car collides into it, leaving one person dead and many injured. But what appears to be a car's accidental loss of control is soon exposed to be more.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: A series of secrets and blackmail involving a young, up and coming actor are exposed when Don and his team investigate the murder of a young woman in his Hollywood Hills mansion.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: After recognizing numerological patterns in the Bible verses that the killer leaves behind, Don and his team are able to track the killer's movements but are one step behind when a gripping twist brings the chase to an end.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: A bank for the rich and powerful is robbed but the stolen contents of the safety deposit boxes are being liquidated and donated to charities, and it's up to Don and Charlie to uncover the true motivation behind the humanitarian thief.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: Don feels responsible for the death of a participant in the Witness Protection Program after she is gunned down in her home.

programme.title: Paradise, Hawaiian Style
programme.desc: Elvis takes to the skies over the island paradise of Kauai. He's a partner in a helicopter charter service. Romance, naturally, is in the air for the King...but his business may be grounded.

programme.title: Heathers
programme.desc: På Westerburg High, hvor klikker hersker, jocks dominerer og alle de populære jentene heter Heather, vil det kreve en Veronica og et mystisk nytt barn for å gi tenåringsangst en kroppstelling.

programme.title: Arlington Road
programme.desc: Michael Conroy er en historieprofessor som nylig har blitt enkemann og bor sammen med sin ti år gamle sønn i Washington DC. Hans avdøde kone var FBI-agent og døde i tjeneste. Både far og sønn sørger dypt, men en dag flytter familien Hunt inn i nabohuset .

programme.title: Star Trek II: The Wrath of Khan
programme.desc: Det er 2200-tallet. Føderasjonens U.S.S. Enterprise er på et treningsoppdrag og det virker som om admiral James T. Kirk (William Shatner) er resignert på at inspeksjonen kan bli den siste romferden i sin karriere. Men Khan er tilbake.

programme.title: Star Trek 3 - Jakten På Spock
programme.desc: Admiral Kirks seier over Khan og dannelsen av Genesis-planeten er tomme seiere. Spock er død og McCoy drives uforklarlig mot galskap. Så gir et overraskelsesbesøk fra Sarek, Spocks far, en forbløffende avsløring.

programme.title: Star Trek V: The Final Frontier
programme.desc: Mannskapet på Federation-skipet Enterprise tilkalles til Nimbus III, Planeten for intergalaktisk fred. De skal forhandle over en bortføring, men får vite at kidnapperen er en slektning av Spock.

programme.title: Svenske Truckers: Episode 201
programme.desc: Simon fra Piteå har tatt over som administrerende direktør i transportfirmaet etter sin far Erik. Jörgen fra Höganäs må kjøre et 58 meter langt blad til en vindturbin og støter på utfordringer i svingene.

programme.title: Svenske Truckers: Episode 202
programme.desc: Erik Lundman i Lundmans transportfirma sliter med en kloakktank, postbud Stephanie gjør en feil og taper tid under en hastetur, og spesialtransportør Jari får utrolig nok tre punkteringer.

programme.title: Svenske Truckers: Episode 203
programme.desc: Jesper er bekymret for å komme for sent til avlastningen i Danmark. Tove får en dårlig start på dagen og krasjer med tømmerbilen sin. Og Jari havner i feil havn under lossing.

programme.title: Svenske Truckers: Episode 204
programme.desc: Louise har en uvanlig tung forsendelse med to ismaskiner som skal fraktes til en ishockeybane utenfor Stockholm. Robin, som kjører biler verdt millioner, har en kjøretur med en veldig fin Cobra fra 1965.

programme.title: Svenske Truckers: Episode 205
programme.desc: Familiebedriften Tösse wedins har en ny kunde som trenger den erfarne tømmerbilsjåføren og administrerende direktøren i selskapet, "Höna", til å kjøre en lastebil.

programme.title: Svenske Truckers: Episode 301
programme.desc: Anton og broren transporterer en gravemaskin på den lokale "Dødens vei". Sam, en miljøarbeider, er opprørt over det moderne menneskets livsstil. Og Tove drar til en skog for å samle tømmer.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model
programme.desc: Handbag And Accessories Designer Lana Marks Is A Guest Judge And The Models Endure A Photo Shoot With Trash.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model
programme.desc: Catch Up On The Fashion And Drama Of Cycle 16.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model
programme.desc: Vogue Italia Editor-In-Chief Franca Sozzani Is A Guest Judge And The Models Pose With A Camel In Morocco.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model
programme.desc: London-Based Fashion Designer Daniella Issa Helayel Is A Guest Judge And The Models Learn To Balance Tea Trays.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model
programme.desc: The Pressure Is On As The Girls Compete For A Spot As One Of The Final Two Models; Ivan Bart Of Img Models Is Guest Judge.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model
programme.desc: And The Winner Is?

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Episode 2
programme.desc: Junior Doctor Tom Fish’s first patient is 18-year-old Lewis who has broken bones and deep wounds from a moped accident - but causing him the most pain is his fear of needles.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Episode 3
programme.desc: Sister Benita is running the shift, when suddenly, a fire alarm goes off and she must prepare the entire department - staff and emergency patients - for a full evacuation.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Episode 4
programme.desc: Sister Harriet spots Terry waiting in the queue and decides he needs urgent care. He’s fallen off a roof and is unable to move his arm from a position above his head.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Episode 5
programme.desc: Priority is being given to two patients fighting for breath: 72-year-old Lynda and 2-year-old Seb. Junior Doctor Emma Faragher is treating Lynda. ‘Not being able to breathe is absolutely terrifying,’ says Doctor Faragher.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Episode 6
programme.desc: Consultant Doctor Julian Humphrey looks after a 76-year-old woman who has come in after a nasty fall. She has broken her nose but Doctor Humphrey fears that bleeding on the brain could have much more serious long-term consequences.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Episode 7
programme.desc: Doctor Carson’s caseload also includes Wayne, who was found with head injuries at the bottom of a flight of stairs, and 4-year-old Pippa who’s been brought in with severe sickness.

programme.title: Dirty Home Rescue: Episode 10
programme.desc: Hayley Leitch and her cleaning team Tom Swire and Chesley Medley-Brown go to the rescue of Linda and husband Andy from Bedau in South Wales whose house is overrun with animals and hasn’t been cleaned in 4 years.

programme.title: Dirty Home Rescue: Episode 11
programme.desc: Hayley Leitch and her cleaning team Tom Swire and Chesley Medley-Brown go to the rescue of Joanna from Birmingham, whose 2-bedroom flat is overflowing with possessions. Joanna works two jobs, leaving her no time to look after her home.

programme.title: Ekstreme samlere: Episode 1
programme.desc: In the picturesque city of Bath, Paul’s cottage is bursting at the seams with a lifetime’s collection of junk. Known locally as ‘boot cottage’ - because everything Paul owns and wears comes from car boot sales - every room is a no-go zone.

programme.title: Ekstreme samlere: Episode 2
programme.desc: In Harlow, 63-year-old Bubbles’ high-rise flat is packed with piles of junk she can’t bear to throw away. But it doesn’t end there she also has a staggering 4 lock ups stuffed to the gills with rubbish.

programme.title: Ekstreme samlere: Episode 3
programme.desc: In Mansfield Sue’s hoard is driving her family and grandchildren away and her husband Neil to distraction. Every room is crammed with clutter including a bedroom that looks more like a dolls graveyard than somewhere to sleep.

programme.title: Ekstreme samlere: Episode 4
programme.desc: In Liverpool, the Bells are a family at war over hoarding. Mum Betty and son Richard are happy to live in their mess, but son in law Keith is determined that things must change. Can they change the habit of a lifetime and part with their possessions?

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 11
programme.desc: There's a perilous situation on the M25 when a slide bed truck carrying a van loses both its offside wheels. It threatens to topple into the inside lane and to make matters worse, it's on a blind bend just beyond a junction.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 12
programme.desc: It's Friday and just as rush hour hits, a lorry load of fizzy drinks has exploded, going up in smoke and causing traffic chaos on the busy M1.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 13
programme.desc: Weekend traffic grinds to a halt when a fully laden fruit and vegetable lorry rolls over on the edge of a roundabout near Kettering. The driver escapes uninjured, but police are forced to close the road, causing a giant tailback.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 14
programme.desc: It's a baptism of fire for rookie recovery op Callum when a serious blaze leaves an eight-wheel sewerage tanker stricken in a layby on the busy A1 motorway just north of Grantham in Lincolnshire.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 15
programme.desc: Lantern recovery op Steve Knight is on his way to a risky roadside rescue. A 38-tonne mail lorry has taken door step delivery to another level by crashing on a London street.

programme.title: Cheaters: Episode 35
programme.desc: Shauna finds out her husband is playing around while she's pregnant at home. Follow up with Marcus Lacy.

programme.title: Cheaters: Episode 36
programme.desc: Rikkei discovers the reason her boyfriend is no longer interested in her. Follow up with Tracy Fletcher.

programme.title: Cheaters: Episode 37
programme.desc: Eva Brandovic discovers her fiancee playing a little game of musical women. Follow up with Peaches McDaniel.

programme.title: Cheaters: Episode 38
programme.desc: Christie finds her husband seeking out women instead of gainful employment. Follow up with Phillip Rhodes.

programme.title: Cheaters: Episode 39
programme.desc: Angelica's husband makes a complete wreck of her life. Follow up with Jessica Banks.

programme.title: Cheaters: Episode 40
programme.desc: Shontel Hollingsworth refuses to allow her husband to rob her of her youth. Follow up with Sabrina Stahl.

programme.title: Cheaters: Episode 41
programme.desc: Michael Hawthorne discovers his wife has plans to spread the love. Follow up with Lamont Brood.

programme.title: Cheaters: Episode 42
programme.desc: Lindsay finds out her boyfriend's overtime consists of picking up other women. Follow up with "ID Withheld."

programme.title: Cheaters: Episode 43
programme.desc: Ryan Burton discovers his girlfriend relapsing back into unhealthy behaviors. Follow up with Troy Duffy.

programme.title: Cheaters: Episode 1
programme.desc: Tonya Jones finds out what her husband really means by "working late." Follow up with Tiffany Brookins.

programme.title: In Harm's Way
programme.desc: Producer-director Otto Preminger’s epic treatment of the bombing of Pearl Harbor details the devastating attack on the Hawaiian naval base as well as the explosive, behind-the-scenes stories.

programme.title: The Lonely Trail
programme.desc: After serving with the Union army, John Wayne returns home to be recruited by the governor of Texas to rid the state of crooked carpetbaggers.

programme.title: Sands Of Iwo Jima
programme.desc: Tough-as-nails career Marine Sergeant John Stryker is greatly disliked by the men of his squad, particularly the combat replacements, for the rigorous training he puts them through.

programme.title: Dance Moms
programme.desc: Abby challenges the minis with a beauty pageant-themed dance; the elites feel the pressure to perform in a Prince tribute dance; Abby assigns two duets; when Nia falls ill, Kendall is left without a partner.

programme.title: Dance Moms
programme.desc: Abby punishes the minis for their poor performance and awards the elites their first solos of the season; Jill infuriates Abby when she makes a decision about Kendall's music; the media uncovers secrets from one mother's past.

programme.title: Dance Moms
programme.desc: Abby choreographs an emotional dance after the ALDC learns of tragic news from Kira and Kalani's hometown; the minis attempt to make a comeback with their group number; JoJo is tested beyond her limits by a difficult ballet duet.

programme.title: Dance Moms
programme.desc: Christi Lukasiak relives the fiercest battles waged in their children's names; showdowns between Christi and Yolanda, Holly and Jill, Kelly and Christi and more.

programme.title: Dance Moms
programme.desc: With Maddie gone, a newly motivated Abby promises to no longer overlook her remaining dancers; Abby assigns Brynn and Kendall head-to-head duets with boy partners; Jess calls out Abby's favoritism for Brynn, angering Ashlee.

programme.title: Dance Moms
programme.desc: Abby challenges Nia and Kendall with tough trios; the group tribute to Madonna leaves the mothers wanting more; Holly suspects Abby has a hidden agenda for Nia and brings in Nia's manager to investigate; Abby abandons the team.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: Darrell and Todd try to get through record breaking snowfall, while the rest of the team fights to survive; despite frigid temperatures the war between VP Express and Polar reaches a boiling point.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: The truckers battle a massive storm.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: Hugh has a plan to crush the competition; Todd and Lisa are pressured to up their game.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: With the biggest storm in centuries only a few days away, the truckers race for loads; Art and Todd set out to prove themselves.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: With the biggest storm in centuries only a few days away, the truckers race for loads; Art and Todd set out to prove themselves.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers

programme.title: Car Chase
programme.desc: Pursuit ends with dramatic crash; driver arrested.

programme.title: Car Chase
programme.desc: The police chase a stolen big rig on a freeway.

programme.title: Car Chase
programme.desc: Six hour pursuit involving one suspect and three stolen vehicles ends in thousand oaks; suspect in custody.

programme.title: Car Chase
programme.desc: Three suspects arrested following pursuit, foot chase in Sepulveda Pass.

programme.title: Car Chase
programme.desc: Los Angeles Police chase a stolen vehicle suspect.

programme.title: Fire never i Rio
programme.desc: De rike fetterne Antonio og Sebastiano Coimbra er to brasilianske mangemillionærer som lever i frykt for yrkesmordere. Derfor ansetter de to dobbeltgjengere, Greg Wonder som er en kriminelt belastet saxofonspiller, og stuntmannen Eliot Vance.

programme.title: To helskrudde agenter
programme.desc: Rosco lurer fengselsfuglen Doug til å banke opp noen trailersjåfører som har presset ham av veien. I desperasjon tar de flyet på Miami, men nå tror alle at de er CIA-agenter.

programme.title: Mit navn er Nobody
programme.desc: En ordentlig spagetti-western signert Sergio Leone. Den beinharde, men slitne sheriffen (Henry Fonda) og hans beundrer og hjelper, den lynraske og frekke Nobody (Terence Hill) rydder opp.

programme.title: McLeods døtre
programme.desc: Gamle sår åpnes når Stevies datter, Rose, ankommer Drovers Run ledsaget av en som Stevie ikke har sett på 17 år – hennes mor, Helen.

programme.title: McLeods døtre
programme.desc: Det er Alex og Stevies bryllupsdag, men slipper Alex ut av fengsel i tide?

programme.title: McLeods døtre
programme.desc: Grace tror hun har forbannet Drovers Run når bisarre utbrudd rammer gården. I mellomtiden er det stolthet versus fordommer når Grace havner i bråk med naboen til Kinsella, Heath Barrett.

programme.title: McLeods døtre
programme.desc: Grace er bestemt på å motstå Heaths sjarm – men hvor lenge? Patrick får en livstruende reaksjon av en øgle. Grace stiller spørsmål ved fremtiden, når hennes beste venninne plutselig dør.

programme.title: McLeods døtre
programme.desc: Grace og Kate blir tatt som gisler av en bonde som har gått konkurs. I mellomtiden får Moira en følelse av at noen blir skutt av våpenmannen, men hvem?

programme.title: The Canton Godfather NO
programme.desc: Wah vet knapt ordet av det før han har blitt fralurt pengene sine. Han legger de siste slantene på en rose fra en blomsterhandler som mener at blomstene hennes fører med seg lykke og velstand. Og riktig nok ser Wah snart at flaksen har snudd.

programme.title: Knockabout
programme.desc: De to brødre og småforbrydere Yipao og Taipao overtaler en kampsportsekspert til at tage dem som elever, helt uvidende om hans beskidte fortid. Denne film vises uden undertekster.

programme.title: Once Upon a Time in China and America NO
programme.desc: I en tid da mange kinesere ble solgt til amerikanske jernbaneselskaper som behandlet dem brutalt med tøffe arbeidsforhold, reiser Wong Fei-hung til Amerika. Men etter et bakholdsangrep blir han adskilt fra de andre han reiser med.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model: Episode 6
programme.desc: The final ten sample the flamboyant world of high fashion in a catwalk show with unusual accessories, before bearing all for a nude shoot.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model: Episode 7
programme.desc: The contestants demonstrate their acting skills in milk commercials before taking part in a photoshoot inspired by classic children's stories.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model: Episode 8
programme.desc: Journalist Hilary Alexander quizzes the would-be catwalk stars on the industry they are so eager to become part of. The winners are treated to a party with former contestants including last year's winner Letitia Herod.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model: Episode 9
programme.desc: Elle Macpherson enrols the seven remaining contestants in a Fashion Targets Breast Cancer catwalk event for their biggest showcase yet and they also take part in a beauty shoot with a cosmetics company.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model: Episode 10
programme.desc: The six remaining girls arrive in Barbados and hit the waves for a surfing-themed tourism advert. The action remains on the water for a boat-based photoshoot with Dannii Minogue and a leading hair-care brand, ahead of the dreaded elimination.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: At Christmastime, Jonathan and Mark try to get a divorced couple to work together for their son's sake. Meanwhile, the holiday may be in jeopardy when a department store Santa is arrested.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Four brothers go on the run to escape a court order that would split them up.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: A country doctor refuses to slow down and seems to be working himself to death.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: A district attorney clashes with a lawyer who agrees to defend a friend charged with stealing.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Mark returns to Oakland to become a police officer again and is reunited with his old partner. However, he discovers his old beat has become a storm of racial hatred.

programme.title: Ex On The Beach US: Low Blows
programme.desc: En etterlengtet eks ankommer, spenning som har småputret lenge eksploderer omsider og starter en voldsom krangel. Farrah trenger seg på andres anliggender, noe som fører til enda mer kaos i huset.

programme.title: Ex On The Beach US: Revenge is Sweet
programme.desc: Handlinger får konsekvenser når eksene får høre om de mindre pene tingene singlene sa om dem. Jays usikkerhet rundt Morgans mange ekser når kokepunktet.

programme.title: Ex On The Beach US: Here Comes Trouble
programme.desc: Et stormende forhold blir turbulent når den slemme Angela kommer tilbake for å røre i gryta og stjele noen menn. Huset tar helt av når en dyrefest går skeis.

programme.title: Ex On The Beach US: Un-Bear-Able
programme.desc: Murrays tvilsomme fortid avsløres endelig. Husets sterkeste og rareste par konfronterer sitt første eks-hinder. Janelle får se konsekvensene av sine handlinger.

programme.title: Ex On The Beach US: How to Keep a Man 101
programme.desc: Chad og Nicoles situasjon forverrer seg når en annen eks kommer og tilfører dramaet kaos. En hjemmefest gjør en annen eks kjempesjalu.

programme.title: Ex On The Beach US: Ghost of Relationship's Past
programme.desc: Nicole blir sjalu når Maddie sier noe skandaløst. Et gjenferd fra gamle forhold kommer for å ta havn.

programme.title: Ex On The Beach US: Bad Bromance
programme.desc: Angelas verste mareritt blir sant da et eks skylles opp på stranden. Chad håndterer konsekvensen av Nicoles handlinger. En skvett truer med å bryte husets sterkeste bromace.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: 1992 Honda Civic
programme.desc: I dette avsnittet pimper teamet Christines Honda Civic. Tre dager etter at avsnittet med Christine ble sendt, døde en nær slektning av magekreft.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: 1990 Mitsubishi Mirage
programme.desc: I dette avsnittet pimper teamet fra West Coast Customs Antwons Mitsubishi Mirage. Antwon ruller hjem på 18-tommersdekk og med et akvarium i baksetet.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: 1967 Ford Mustang
programme.desc: I dette avsnittet pimper West Coast Customs Marys Ford Mustang. Bilen hennes utstyres med det aller nyeste innen flatskjerm-tv.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: 1985 Ford Ranger
programme.desc: I dette avsnittet pimper teamet fra West Coast Customs Jareds Ford Ranger. Jared ruller i vei tre tommer lavere, nylakkert i metallic oransje.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: Pontiac Trans Am
programme.desc: I dette avsnittet pimper West Coast Customs Danelles Pontiac Trans Am. Hun triller i vei i en bil utstyrt med kaffetrakter og krystallkrone.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: 1974 Chevy Luv
programme.desc: I dette avsnittet pimper gjengen fra West Coast Customs Neils Chevrolet LUV Truck. Han triller av gårde i et campingtelt på hjul.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: 1989 Ford Mustang
programme.desc: I dette avsnittet pimper gjengen fra West Coast Customs Shondas Ford Mustang Convertible. Hun ruller i vei i et pimpet og helt trafikksikkert kjøretøy.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: Maxima Station Wagon
programme.desc: I dette avsnittet pimper teamet fra West Coast Customs Ezras Nissan Maxima Station Wagon. Han kjører av gårde i en mobil DJ-bås.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: Volkswagen Baja
programme.desc: I dette avsnittet pimper teamet fra West Coast Customs Krissys Volkswagen Baja Bug. Boblen fra 1969 ble konstruert med holdbarhet som mål. Men med sitt bøyde eksosrør og sine ødelagte dører, kan den virkelig beskrives som alt annet enn akkurat det.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: 1987 Honda CRX
programme.desc: I dette avsnittet pimper teamet fra West Coast Customs Brians Honda CRX. Det er den første bilen som får en splitter ny motor, ettersom den gamle dør innen Xzibit får den inn på verkstedet.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: '72 Landcruiser
programme.desc: Gaby var en nylig dumpet yogainstruktør som ikke hadde noe i verden utenom yogamatten sin og sin Land Cruiser fra 1972. Ekskjæresten solgte bilen til henne for 200 dollar. Gutta begynner å jobbe med utsiden...

programme.title: MTV Teen Mom

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: All 15 chefs walk into a dining room filled with Marines, where they find out they will have to cook dishes that represent the air, land and sea. Things take a drastic turn when one chef accuses Chef Ramsay of sabotaging her.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: Teams are tasked with cooking halibut in seven different ways; a dinner service; an elimination; pianist Stephan Moccio; chef David LeFevre.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The chefs must create a dish using potatoes as the key component. The pressure becomes unbearable for one chef, leading to a chaotic dinner service.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: A challenge involving cooking five commonly served `staple' dishes. Chef Ramsay makes changes to a dining service.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The final ten chefs are surprised when Ramsay brings in his daughter to celebrate her Sweet 16, each chef must create a worthy dish to be served at her party.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: For the chefs' next challenge, Chef Ramsay pits the teams against one another, preparing authentic Chinese dishes as prominent Chinese Chef Shirley Chung is brought in to judge their finished dishes.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: Siste jobb
programme.desc: Walker prøver å hjelpe en prøveløslatt person som vil få orden på livet, men som blir tvunget til å begå et siste tyveri av en korrupt tilsynsfører.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: Familieproblemer
programme.desc: Walker kjemper mot en mann som tror han er uovervinnelig når det gjelder forbrytelser fordi søsteren hans er under vitnebeskyttelse.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: Henne kan man ri elva med
programme.desc: En dyrlege prøver å finne ut hvorfor mange lokale dyr har dødd, men når han nærmer seg svaret, blir han presset av veien og drept med en håndgranat.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: En uskyldig mann
programme.desc: Walker tror en mann som er dømt til døden i gasskammeret, har blitt utpresset til å si ser skyldig, og kjemper mot klokken for å bevise hans uskyld.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: Gladiatorens kveld
programme.desc: Walker og Trivette utgir seg for å være gateboksere for å infiltrere en gjeng utpressere som har ødelagt livet til vennen deres.

programme.title: MTV Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Rob Dyrdek styrer serien, som inneholder klipp fra nettet, samt har kjendisgjester og medprogramledere som Sterling «Steelo», Madison Beer og danske Nina Agdal. Nye episoder hver onsdag.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Fade to Black
programme.desc: Paulie og Mike må sjonglere flere grupper med jenter. Det blir slåsskamp i baren, og en av deltakerne blir slått ned.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Just Another Day at the Shore
programme.desc: Med støtte fra de fleste av de andre er Snooki på bedringens vei. Ronnies familie kommer på besøk, og Sammi ønsker å gjøre et godt førsteinntrykk. JWoww blir lei folkene i klubben og havner i slåsskamp.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Boardwalk Blowups
programme.desc: Mike ber jenter til huset, og situasjonen kommer ut av kontroll. Snooki havner i slåsskamp igjen. Ronnie havner også i bråk, og Sammi begynner å tvile på forholdet deres.

programme.title: MTV Cribs: Melissa Joan Hart, Trick Daddy, Jewel
programme.desc: Featuring the homes of Jewel, Melissa Joan Hart and Trick Daddy.

programme.title: MTV Cribs: Redman, Eddie George, Howie Dorough
programme.desc: Featuring the homes of Redman, Howie (Backstreet Boys) and Eddie George - NFL.

programme.title: MTV Cribs: Chyna, Usher, Tony Hawk
programme.desc: Featuring the homes of Chyna, Usher, Tony Hawk.

programme.title: Made: Punk Rocker
programme.desc: Straight-A goody goody, Gracie Moreau wants to get noticed by being MADE into a Punk Rocker.

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 501
programme.desc: Louise og Jonas fra Viborg drømmer stort, men drømmen faller i bakken med et brak. Ekspertene må jobbe hardt før den lille familien - forhåpentligvis - kan flytte inn i drømmehuset.

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 502
programme.desc: Anita og Martins to barn har tatt over hjemmet, og det er leker overalt. Løsningen er et større hjem, men paret har ikke klart å finne det rette huset enda. Nå får de hjelp av ekspertene, men det blir ikke lett.

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 503
programme.desc: Tina og Danni solgte rekkehuset sitt i den tro at de snart skulle finne det rette huset. Men sånn gikk det ikke. Paret er utrolig kresne, og har høye krav. Kan ekspertene skape hjemmet som Tina og Danni drømmer om?

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 504
programme.desc: Laura og Jesper og Jespers to barn leier i Humlebæk, og de er mildt sagt lei av det. De mangler plass, hage - og de vil også ha barn sammen snart. Men to års husjakt har ikke gitt resultat.

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 505
programme.desc: Ulla og Kristian bor i en vakker herskapsleilighet på Frederiksberg med sine to barn. Men de vil ha mer plass i et barnevennlig nabolag, innom sykkelavstand fra sentrum. Kan Tobias Edlev-Nielsen finne et hus til dem?

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Kemi
programme.desc: Kemi is situated in northern Finland by the Bothnian Bay and it is part of Lapland region. Tareq tries his luck at a spot of burbot fishing on the frozen sea and visits the snow castle hotel.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: West Sweden
programme.desc: Situated on the west coast of Sweden, Bohuslän is a place where you can really feel the history of fishing all around a tradition that is still active. Tareq will be harvesting supreme quality oysters and lobsters and cook some wonderful seafood dishes.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Florø
programme.desc: Tareq visits Norway and Florø to celebrate their national day -17th of May. Surrounded by breathtaking archipelagos and stunning fjords he dives for scallops in the north sea, cooking at mountain peaks and exploring the history of norwegian salmon

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Estonia
programme.desc: Tareq makes his way across the baltic sea to Estonia and the capital Tallinn. He discovers the historical treasures of the city and its thriving culinary life before he heads out into the vast and beautiful countryside and the national park of Soomaa.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Ringkøbing
programme.desc: Ringkøbing, a lovely old market town located at the west coast of Denmark. Here, Tareq visit a traditional Herring Festival and meets up with local entrepreneurs who have learned to adapt to this ever-changing environment.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Falkenberg
programme.desc: Something is definitely happening in Falkenberg on the west coast of Sweden. Over the last couple of years it have become somewhat of a haven for foodies. Tareq is on a mission; taking him through a fertile landscape with vineyards and salmon fishing.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Estonia (Part 2)
programme.desc: Estonia has embarked on a journey greatly inspired by the nordic cuisine. Tareq explores the countryside of Estonia before he returns to the capital of Tallinn where he meets people that really love their traditional food.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 309
programme.desc: Ditte har brukt 120 000 kroner på å få større bryster - som er asymmetriske. Eva har fått utført en brystreduksjon, men føler seg nå mer maskulin enn feminin.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 802
programme.desc: For første gang i programmets historie har både mor og datter havnet i et plastisk mareritt, og begge trenger hjelp.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 302
programme.desc: I dagens episode møter vi bl.a. Isabella, som fikk utført brystforstørring som 18-åring for å ligne Pamela Anderson, men som i dag sitter igjen med to steinharde kuler på brystkassen.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 104
programme.desc: Pernille får kick av å få utført plastisk kirurgi, men armene hennes er vansiret av store arr. Mille drømmer om at de feilopererte brystene hennes blir fiksa før bryllupet.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 205
programme.desc: I denne episoden møter vi bl.a. Dianne, som fikk fjernet brystene grunnet mistanke om kreft, men som nå lever alene fordi hun føler seg utilpass, og Anette, som fikk foretatt en hudoperasjon i utlandet.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 303
programme.desc: Doris var med i en alvorlig bussulykke og i dag sliter hun med ekstreme bivirkninger av en operasjon som egentlig skulle ha reddet utseendet hennes etter ulykken.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: The Family's Reunited
programme.desc: Charlotte er tilbake! Og hun kunne ikke kommet på et verre tidspunkt, hun havner midt i en dobbeldate og blir klar over Garys opplegg med Marnie. Den nye karen Aaron vinner en date med Holly, men avslører at han digger Vicky.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Tash On Tours
programme.desc: Med Charlotte i hus igjen, tenker alle på Gary og Marnie og om de vil ligge sammen igjen. Gjengen tar 'Tash-On' - turer til Manchester for å vise Geordie-taktikken på singel-kveldene: Bli dritings og klin i vei.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: The New Boy
programme.desc: Det spisser seg til når Aaron overhører Vicky og jentene sladre om ham samme kveld han har tredje date med Vicky. Og mens gutta jobber ute, får jentene en kjempeoverraskelse - en ny gutt, Kyle, kommer for å bli en del av familien.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: A Trip To Iceland
programme.desc: Den nye gutten Kyle gjør seg hjemmekoselig i huset gjennom å tilbringe natten med Holly, og Geordie-gjengen og deres 'Tash on Tours' blir internasjonale når de flyr til Reykjavik på Island for utagerende festing.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Marnie Exposes Gary
programme.desc: Etter å ha sjekket ut Islands gutter, jenter og geysirer, vender Geordie-gjengen tilbake til Toon. Der spisser det seg til når Aaron og Scott får høre sannheten om Gary og Marnie, og Garys tvilsomme guttekodeks.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: The New Boss
programme.desc: Buzzin! Våre favorittfestløver er tilbake og alle sjokkeres av at Vicky blir sjefen deres. Holly vil ikke virke billig, derfor vil hun ikke ligge med Kyle, og Marnie dumper Aaron når hun oppdager at han har løyet for henne.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Jersey Shore Reunion
programme.desc: Hver sommer kommer tusenvis av unge til Jersey Shore for å delta i østkystens overgangsritual: The Shore House. Jersey Shore viser dette fenomenet.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: After Hours 606
programme.desc: Deena forteller om da hun ble arrestert, Jenni og Rogers forhold analyseres, og Vinny forteller åpent om sin fordel.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: After Hours 608
programme.desc: Deena og Sam starter en kjempekrangel på sofaen etter å ha sett noen provoserende klipp fra denne sesongen. Og Vinni feirer sin avgjørelse om å gå inn i sølibatet.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: After Hours 610
programme.desc: I en spesiell guttekveld på sofaen snakker MVP og Ronnie om Mike og Paulas brudd - som møtte hverandre i Jersey Shore - og om hvorfor alle gutta var så tøffe mot Jionni.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Jersey Shore Best of Reunions
programme.desc: Amy Paffrath viser alle høydepunkter og lavmålene fra tidligere gjenforeninger, inkludert noen opptak som aldri er vist før.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: A New Family
programme.desc: Sommeren på Jersey Shore starter når åtte personer flytter inn i sommerhuset. Romantikken blomstrer mellom Sammy og Mike, men kan bli spolert når gutta inviterer tre tilfeldige jenter i boblebadet med dem.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: The Tanned Triangle
programme.desc: Snooki føler seg fortsatt utstøtt og vurderer å reise sin vei. Første kveld på klubben blir flørtete, så kjærestene hjemme har kanskje grunn til bekymring. Et trekantdrama truer med å splitte huset.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Having A Bad Day
programme.desc: Cameo- og showgruppe-uttak presser de nye og veteranene til bristepunktet. Melissa Rycroft forsøker å redde en DCC som henger i en tynn tråd, og et besøk på Kellis kontor avsluttes på en sjokkerende måte.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: The Cutting Board
programme.desc: Følelsene stormer når Kelli og Judy må ta vanskelige valg og sende folk hjem for å beholde troppens kvalitet. Melissa Rycroft deler ut uvurderlige råd.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Living the Dream
programme.desc: Kelli kunngjør endelig troppen. Skader truer starten på Cowboys treningsleir. Kaos på kampdagen kan ødelegge for jentene når opptredenen må være feilfri.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Drømmen starter
programme.desc: Hundrevis av vakre og talentfulle håpefulle ankommer for å prøve å bli verdens beste heiagjeng. Samtidig søker mange av jentene som må dra, forsoning.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Nydebut-jentene
programme.desc: Veteranene kjemper for plassene mens de nye prøver å leve drømmene og gjennomgå treningsleiren til DCC. De stilles overfor panelintervjuer, soloer, en slitsom dansekombinasjon og et rom med tøffe dommere.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Argonaut & Patches
programme.desc: A family is afraid of being bit by their aggressive English bulldog/Lab mix. Cesar prescribes pack therapy. A Cocker Spaniel has a life-threatening appetite for paper products.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren
programme.desc: Highlights from various Dog Whisperer stories that impart Cesar Millan’s advice for every stage of a dog’s lifespan. We follow old and new cases that show the process of adopting the right dog.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Cesar Goes to Vegas
programme.desc: Usually, Cirque du Soleil has everything under control, but several of the performer's animals are in trouble, so Cesar heads to Vegas to help out.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Tobi & Riley
programme.desc: Cesar works with sheepdog/collie mix, Tobi who is aggressive with his owners and their guests. Then Cesar takes on the supposedly easy task of curing a St. Bernard who is afraid of stairs.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Cricket and Hemingway & Rigby
programme.desc: Musicians Ashlee Simpson-Wentz and "Fall Out Boy" Pete Wentz, are concerned at the aggression coming from Hemingway, their English bulldog, especially since they are expecting their first child.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Bacchus and Jody
programme.desc: Jody, a Lhasa apso, cannot keep her mouth off of anything. From tissues to money, she is the dog who ate your homework and then some. She will eat just about everything in sight.

programme.title: MacGyver: Tough Boys
programme.desc: MacGyver goes head-to-head with a new Challenge Center instructor when he suspects him of directing a vigilante gang.

programme.title: MacGyver: The Gun
programme.desc: MacGyver must aid a member of the Challenge Center who has been implicated in the shooting death of a police officer.

programme.title: MacGyver: Twenty Questions
programme.desc: When a fifteen-year-old alcoholic is accused of murder, she turns to MacGyver for help.

programme.title: MacGyver: Harry's Will
programme.desc: MacGyver inherits a vintage car and a whole lot of trouble when his grandfather passes away.

programme.title: MacGyver: The Wall
programme.desc: MacGyver travels to East Berlin in search of a friend’s lost granddaughter.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: The guys learn how to rope, ride and clown around when they attend a one-day rodeo fantasy camp; Kay wonders if her dog's new girlfriend comes from a good family.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: Jase hires Reed to take his place at Duck Commander; Korie puts Willie on a vegetarian diet and exercise program in an effort to lower his blood pressure.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: Jase and Willie take a business trip to Arkansas to pitch a new product; Jep and Si accidentally ship out an important item of Willie's, then attempt to track it down.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: Willie institutes a "no-tech week" when he feels his children spend too much time on their phones, but has difficulty participating in his own program; the guys attempt to stop a lice outbreak at Duck Commander.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: Willie and Jase compete against each other to become president of their neighborhood homeowner association; Jep, Jess and Miss Kay work on a Duck Commander-themed display for the local zoo.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: The guys have fun with a 3-D printer until they come to the realization that the machine could soon replace their jobs; Si invests in John Luke's snow cone stand after Willie doesn't give him a raise.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: Jase, Jep, Si and Cole battle a growing population of cottonmouth snakes on Phil's property; Willie uses his business expertise to help Rebecca improve her clothing store.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: Jase and Jep argue over who should inherit their grandfather's old rifle; Willie and Korie rehearse a Taiwanese engagement ceremony with Rebecca as she prepares to travel to Taiwan with her fiancé.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: The guys cause Si to lose his job as a bagger at a grocery store; Korie resorts to bribery in order to persuade Willie to get some much-needed dental work.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: The sons and wives work to protect Phil and Kay's home from potential floodwaters when a large storm rolls into town; a leaking warehouse roof threatens inventory at Duck Commander.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog plays coach; Tim and Leland are assigned to track down a terminally ill fugitive with nothing to lose.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: A mother who bailed out her wayward daughter makes the heartbreaking decision to send her back to jail.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: An unexpected tip leads to a surprising finish in the search for a fugitive who managed to elude the police only days earlier.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Beth and Dog get bunnies for their children; the team's new case has them searching for a drug abuser facing charges of alleged animal cruelty.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and his team head to Honolulu International Airport to search for a felon who has booked a flight to Florida.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog surprises Beth with a papillon puppy for her birthday; Beth takes her new puppy out with her on the next case.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: When Dog gives a drug addict a second chance, the man flees on his way to rehab.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog travels to Colorado to help a fellow bondsman nab a violent culprit who plans to disappear; a distracted Duane Lee leaves Dog in the lurch.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: The team chases a heavily tattooed bail-jumper; Dog imparts wisdom upon the captured criminal in the hope of changing his life.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog travels from Honolulu to Kona to help his son Leland capture some fugitives; father and son spar in the gym.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Bondswoman Mary Ellen enlists Dog and his team to hunt a man wanted on drug charges; the fugitive's family poses a threat.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Paige Desorbo II

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood XLII

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood XLIII

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood X

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Madison Pettis
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' oppdager Rob, Steelo og Madison Pettis farene ved stiger i 'Stigekræsj', føler at de må følge fulle venner hjem i 'Fylleleveranser' og oppdager at ikke alle maskoter er like i 'Maskotproblemer'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood XLV

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Madison Pettis II

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Lexi Rivera

programme.title: Forensic Files: Water Hazard
programme.desc: The victim had ingested a massive amount of cyanide. An unlikely clue ? a flaw on a mailing envelope ? exposed a murderer who was willing to kill innocent people.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shell Game
programme.desc: They thought the fire would cover their crime. But one tiny clue, no bigger than a thumbtack, remained. It held all the information investigators needed to put a trio of cold-blooded killers behind bars.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Ring Him Up
programme.desc: In 1994, 19-year-old Shannon Melendi disappeared while at Emory University. Her disappearance remained a mystery for ten years, until new scientific testing cast a different light on Colvin "Butch" Hinton.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Killer Impression
programme.desc: In 1987, the death of Crystal Purcell was considered an accident. Then in 2001, Barbara Purcell called police to suggest that her estranged husband had killed Crystal.

programme.title: Forensic Files: If I Were You
programme.desc: Paul Gruber's daughter suspected something was wrong when she received birthday cards addressed from her father, but written in a stranger's handwriting.

programme.title: Forensic Files: As the Tide Turns
programme.desc: The woman was dead. The man had been shot four times and survived. When the man's version of events contradicted physical evidence, investigators turned to forensic science to paint a clearer picture of the crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Tight Leash
programme.desc: How did the stalker obtain the security system code for his victim's home? How did he steal her personal photographs? Police needed answers and they found them in the most unlikely of places.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Muffled Cries
programme.desc: After inspecting storm damage to a home in Tampa, an insurance assessor simply disappeared. Thirty hours later, her body was found in a nearby river. But the killer had been careless.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Critical Maneuver
programme.desc: When a hit-and-run accident claimed the life of a high school athlete, everyone in town mourned his passing. Finding the killer was a long shot at best.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Skirting the Evidence
programme.desc: A murder trail turned cold, until police got a call from a woman whose husband, Gerald Powers, had a criminal past and a fondness for Chevy Berettas.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Small Town Terror
programme.desc: In 1991, Grand Junction, Colorado is on edge after a series of deadly bombings kill two people and injure one more. Police race to find the culprit before he strikes again.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Backstage Murder
programme.desc: In the 1980's, two partners created a nightclub that would bring them wealth and international fame. The male strip club phenomenon promised female patrons fun and excitement. But the bright lights hid a dark side.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Deadly Stranger
programme.desc: The body of a young woman found burned in a truck launched a manhunt to find her killer. When more bodies began to turn up across the country, the FBI believed the cases were linked. Investigators had a suspect. They just couldn't find him.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Manhunt
programme.desc: A killer was on the loose in one of America's most popular tourist destinations. Armed and desperate, he evaded law enforcement at every turn. As the Fourth of July weekend quickly approached, thousands of people became potential targets.

programme.title: The FBI Files: The Crazy Don
programme.desc: To the FBI, he was believed to be the boss of New York's most powerful mafia organizationthe Genovese crime family. Was Gigante crazy or was his behavior a shrewd attempt to disguise his position as a ruthless mafia boss?

programme.title: The FBI Files: Killer Abroad
programme.desc: Beginning in 1990, Europe found itself in the clutches of a serial killer. He became an international outlaw, hopping from country to country to evade capture and to kill again.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Lethal Dosage
programme.desc: Toxicology: While drugs can cure disease and ease pain, they can also be agents of murder. Toxicologists can examine blood and tissue to uncover cases where death is not as natural as it may seemfrom slow arsenic poisoning to quick cocaine overdoses.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Witness To Terror
programme.desc: Black Boxes: Little evidence is left after an airplane takes a deadly plunge from the sky. Investigators' best hope for an answer comes from the flight data recorder known as a black box.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Murder For Hire
programme.desc: For some killers, murder can be a profitable business. And the scene of the crime can be both a source for clues, and puzzling questions. When a victim has been targeted for death, investigators must look beyond the obvious to uncover a murder for hire.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Buried Secrets
programme.desc: Forensic scientists find clues written in blood as they investigate the deaths of three women killed by the men who once loved them.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Deadly Aim
programme.desc: Ballistic analysis is the key to finding killers who turn guns on their victims. Each shot fired leaves its own "fingerprint", allowing scientists to target murderers with deadly aim.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Last Orders at The Fleece Inn
programme.desc: The team heads to Elland to investigate ghostly-goings on in this haunted pub. It's not just the spirits behind the bar lurking here. Multiple hauntings, murders and death surround this public house.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Souls Seeking Solace Gotts Park Mansion
programme.desc: The team encounters a spirit member joining them on the thermal imaging camera and appearing to leave its ghostly hand print behind.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Underground World Of The City of Caves
programme.desc: The Ghost Dimension team ventures underground to investigate the City of Caves in Nottingham.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: Dangerous Demon of The Stork Inn
programme.desc: Sean heads to Wigan to investigate a location with history dating back to 900AD. Encountering a spirit that attacks him, will the team be safe tonight as they come face to face with pure evil?

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: Buried Beneath The Bowling Green
programme.desc: Buried under the location Sean investigates tonight, is the bones of the deceased and it appears that they are at unrest. Will Sean solve the mystery of who is haunting this location?

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Demons on The Buses
programme.desc: Hidden in St Helens, is a museum that is home to demonic and dark entities trapped inside of vehicles.

programme.desc: Bambi gives us a rare, honest look into her ultra-exclusive lifestyle in LA. Tiffany confronts C.T. over a rotten business deal.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show: Holiday Hell With My Feuding Family
programme.desc: There’s no worse time to be fighting with your family than during the holidays. Our old friends Donna and her cheating husband Richard join us for a holiday feast!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show: Cheating Secrets Revealed
programme.desc: Chris and Steve confess to cheating on their girlfriends and Michelle wants to tell her boyfriend she has a mistress. The tension is high on today's Jerry Springer Show!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show: My Pimp Runs My Family
programme.desc: Tracy and Allen have been living in a car. Her two older sisters are here to convince her to temporarily live with them and go back to school until he can provide for them.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Loose Cannon
programme.desc: In the dead of night, a shooter on a rampage rips through a home, leaving a grandmother disfigured, her 24 year old daughter dead, and a two year-old child clinging to life.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Death Grip
programme.desc: When a speeding truck crashes into a residential building, officers find the lifeless body of Michael Faast behind the wheel. But he didn’t die in the wreck – he was shot point-blank in the temple.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: After School Special
programme.desc: Tragedy strikes when a beloved teacher is poisoned in her classroom. As doctors fight to save Barbara Lewis’ life, Lt. Joe Kenda and his team delve into her personal affairs.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: 12 Years a Fugitive
programme.desc: When a beloved grandmother is found stabbed to death in her own home, Kenda must turn to a tight-knit community still grieving from the tragic loss.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Poker Face
programme.desc: A group of friends discover the corpse of entrepreneur Jamie Foster hidden under a blanket. Kenda e discovers that Foster’s business put him in close quarters with a host of unsavory characters.

programme.title: Cops: No Respect these Days

programme.title: Cops: Wardrobe Clash
programme.desc: A homeless man hides from deputies in the closet of an empty house. Deputies arrive to a domestic disturbance to find two brothers fighting over a pair of sandals.

programme.desc: A man fights with his wife over a haircut, then leads police on a car chase. A woman gets violent with her boyfriend and then calls the police on him.

programme.desc: Is a powerfully rich cabal with a globalist agenda conspiring to destroy sovereign nations and impose authoritarian rule?

programme.title: Past Hunters: Bulkeley Hotel
programme.desc: The former home of Queen Victoria is now home to many spirits who have been seen by guests and staff. Witness the first ever formal documentation of the paranormal activities in the Bulkeley Hotel.

programme.title: Past Hunters: Plas Teg
programme.desc: The county of Flintshire in Wales is said to be a land filled with ghosts and haunts. Plas Teg is said to be one of the "most haunted" houses in the area. With over 400 years of history, this place is sure to be the home of many an entity.

programme.title: Past Hunters: The Block
programme.desc: The team investigate a disused factory in Burton-Upon-Trent. Reports of paranormal happenings are common and the team are ready for anything.

programme.title: My Haunted House: The Nursery and The Closet
programme.desc: A dangerous entity stalks a pregnant woman in her new house. A single mother discovers a terrifying secret trapped in her son's closet. The shocking eyewitness accounts of terrified people whose dream homes have become nightmares.

programme.title: My Haunted House: Unwanted Guest and Mirror Image
programme.desc: A dangerous poltergeist threatens a newly-blended family. A young woman is tormented by visions of her own gruesome death.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Diamond in the Rough
programme.desc: Sydney, Nigel og den rivaliserende relikviejegeren Kurt Reiner prøver å finne den tapte baseballhanske til Jimmy Jonesboro.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Nine Lives
programme.desc: Alle som stjeler en statue som representerer den egyptiske kattegudinnen Mafdet, blir drept. Nå er statuen forsvunnet, og Sidney og Nigel har til oppgave å hente den.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: The Book of Love
programme.desc: Sydney og Nigel er i Milano, Italia for å søke etter Casanovas tapte kjærlighetsbok

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Myth of the Maze
programme.desc: Sydney, Nigel og Claudia besøker Athen, Hellas for å lete i Minotaurs labyrint etter den legendariske gylne hyssing.

programme.title: Andromeda: Musikk fra en fjern tromme
programme.desc: Tyr krasjlander Eureka Maru på en Nietzschean-planet og utvikler hukommelsestap. Han må huske hva han gjør før Nietzscheans oppdager ham og hans kasse med stjålne varer.

programme.title: On the Case: Tip 1960
programme.desc: 19 year old Katie Poirier was working the night shift at a Convenience store when she was violently kidnapped. The abduction was captured on videotape but the images were not clear enough to identify her attacker.

programme.title: On the Case: Justice Never Quits
programme.desc: Mary-Jane Marquardt, mother and wife from Chippewa, Wisconsin, was found stabbed to death in her own home. With Mary-Jane's son also missing, the detectives couldn't help but wonder if his disappearance was connected to the murder.

programme.title: On the Case: The Doorbell Rang
programme.desc: The ring of a doorbell overheard during a teenager's final telephone call may be the key to solving her murder.

programme.title: On the Case: Last Call
programme.desc: When bartender Anita Andrews is stabbed to death inside her family's bar, police conclude her killer was the last patron she served that night.

programme.title: On the Case: Deep Wounds
programme.desc: After Navy electrician Michael Jacobs comes home to find his wife, Suzanne, and his three-year-old son, Colin, murdered, San Diego police race to catch a serial killer who leaves behind an unimaginable calling card.

programme.title: On the Case: Lost In The Fire
programme.desc: When a pregnant mother of two is found shot to death in her fire-ravaged home, police find there are more suspects than clues.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: “Queer Eye’s” Karamo Brown, Beauty In A Box, Halloween Tablescapes with Darcy Miller
programme.desc: “Queer Eye’s” Karamo Brown joins Drew. In Beauty in A Box, Drew surprises a viewer at home who is need of a quick makeup routine. Plus, celebrations expert Darcy Miller shares Halloween tablescapes to help your family celebrate the holiday this year.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Seth MacFarlane & Liz Gillies, Drew’s Surprise For Family Who Adopted 5 Siblings, The Weekender
programme.desc: Seth MacFarlane and Liz Gillies on their new album. Drew surprises Andi & Thomas Bonura, parents of three, who adopted five siblings after hearing they were separated in different foster homes. Drew gives a list of her favorite picks in “The Weekender.”

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Halloween Celebration with Adam Sandler, Pumpkin Blaze, Jill Kargman
programme.desc: Drew kicks-off her week-long Halloween celebration with Netflix’s “Hubie Halloween” star Adam Sandler. Then, actress Jill Kargman and Drew visit Pumpkin Blaze Long Island! Plus, Drew tackles dating at any age in her signature “Love Bug” segment.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: "The Witches" Star Stanley Tucci, "Hubie Halloween" Star Noah Schnapp
programme.desc: Drew continues the week-long Halloween celebration with "The Witches" star Stanley Tucci. Leo Kelly joins to make a mocktail. "Hubie Halloween" star Noah Schnapp stops by to chat. Plus, Design by Drew Scarrymore and the Drew Scarrymore Costume Challenge.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Drew’s Never Have I Ever Hour, First Date After Divorce
programme.desc: It’s Drew’s Never Have I Ever Hour! Drew helps a viewer get ready for her first date since her divorce. New foods with Eitan Bernath. Then, we follow a couple as they go sky diving for the first time! Plus bonus moments with actress Charlize Theron.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Dr. Phil, "Hubie Halloween" Star China Anne McClain, Drew’s News with Ross Matthews
programme.desc: Dr. Phil shares why it was important for him to produce his new docuseries "That Animal Rescue Show." Then, Halloween week continues with "Hubie Halloween" star China Anne McClain. Plus, Drew’s News with special guest Ross Matthews.

programme.title: 48 Hours: End of the Trail
programme.desc: A report on the investigation into the 2008 murder of educator/artist Carol Kennedy, who was brutally beaten in her home outside Prescott, Arizona. Kennedy's ex-husband, stockbroker Steven DeMocker, became the chief suspect.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Lies and Whispers
programme.desc: 48 Hours is television's most popular true-crime series, investigating shocking cases and compelling real-life dramas with journalistic integrity and cutting-edge style.

programme.title: 48 Hours: What Happened to Rachael?
programme.desc: 48 Hours is television's most popular true-crime series, investigating shocking cases and compelling real-life dramas with journalistic integrity and cutting-edge style.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Murder on Red River
programme.desc: An investigation into the 2002 murder of Jennifer Harris and the search for clues to what happened to her by a former Marine and a filmmaker who believe they can find the person responsible for the murder.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Stalked: Out of the Shadows - Part 2
programme.desc: Some stalkers become obsessed with people they do not know. Includes the story of serial stalker Justin Massler who was arrested for stalking Ivanka Trump, and previously targeted the Kardashian family.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Live to Tell: The Birthday Party
programme.desc: A federal prosecutor, kidnapped at gunpoint on his birthday, recounts his bizarre hostage ordeal.
