programme.desc: Rob Dyrdek styrer serien, som inneholder klipp fra nettet, samt har kjendisgjester og medprogramledere som Sterling «Steelo», Madison Beer og danske Nina Agdal. Nye episoder hver onsdag.

programme.title: MTV Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Rob Dyrdek styrer serien, som inneholder klipp fra nettet, samt har kjendisgjester og medprogramledere som Sterling «Steelo», Madison Beer og danske Nina Agdal. Nye episoder hver onsdag.

programme.title: MTV Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Rob Dyrdek styrer serien, som inneholder klipp fra nettet, samt har kjendisgjester og medprogramledere som Sterling «Steelo», Madison Beer og danske Nina Agdal. Nye episoder hver onsdag.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: 1985 Ford Ranger
programme.desc: I dette avsnittet pimper teamet fra West Coast Customs Jareds Ford Ranger. Jared ruller i vei tre tommer lavere, nylakkert i metallic oransje.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: Pontiac Trans Am
programme.desc: I dette avsnittet pimper West Coast Customs Danelles Pontiac Trans Am. Hun triller i vei i en bil utstyrt med kaffetrakter og krystallkrone.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: 1974 Chevy Luv
programme.desc: I dette avsnittet pimper gjengen fra West Coast Customs Neils Chevrolet LUV Truck. Han triller av gårde i et campingtelt på hjul.

programme.title: Punk'd (MTV) NO: Weeman, Jack Osbourne, Pink, Stephan Dorf
programme.desc: "Wee Man" Acuna and Jack Osbourne are given a hard time by MTV security, Pink thinks she is being framed by her boyfriend, Carey Hart, for running a motorcycle "chop shop" and Stephen Dorff (Blade) is set up to get stuck with an $8,000 bar tab.

programme.title: Punk'd (MTV) NO: Missy Elliot, Hilary Duff, Usher
programme.desc: Missy Elliott gets caught up in a bling sting when her jewel-encrusted dog tags are given to the wrong messenger, Hilary Duff gets a driver's education when her car gets jacked by the Punk'd crew. Also, Usher's brother is picked up for shoplifting...

programme.title: Punk'd (MTV) NO: Nick Carter, Tommy Lee, Lil' Bow Wow
programme.desc: Nick Carter thinks he's punking his friend Tommy Lee, only to find out tables have been turned on him, Tommy Lee thinks he and his friend Nick Carter are going for a test drive only to find that they've been involved in a hit and run Punk'd Style...

programme.title: Punk'd (MTV) NO: Mya, Katie Holmes, Tracy Morgan
programme.desc: Mya gets up close and personal with her biggest fan, Katie Holmes (Dawson's Creek) gets involved in a torrid love triangle and Tracy Morgan (The Tracy Morgan Show) gets his car towed when the Punk'd valet crew parks his ride in the red zone.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: The Dingo
programme.desc: Snowboarderen The Dingo hjelper Rob med å presentere Pain Angels, Worst Case Scenarios og That'll Cost You. Og du gjetter aldri hva som skjer når en vektløfter mister kontrollen.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Matthew Mounce
programme.desc: Rob, Steelo og Chanel ler seg i hjel av Unnecessary Combos, Stay Out Of The Water og Who Put That There, og karateeksperten Matthew Mounce presenterer Bad Karate.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Jeff Tremaine
programme.desc: Produsenten Jeff Tremaine hjelper Rob med å presentere episodens klipp. Noen barn begynner tidlig i Ridiculousness in Training, og to elefanter hjelper hverandre med en vanskelig matbit.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Matt Schlager
programme.desc: Skjønnhetsdronningen Caite Upton er med i panelet, Matt Schlager viser hvordan man faller med ansiktet først, og du får se klippene Inappropriate Animals, Misfires And False Starts og Yoga Fart.

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark
programme.desc: Maja og Kenneth bor på Vestjylland og drømmer om å komme nærmere familien til Maja i Silkeborg. Men budsjettet deres krever at de går på akkord med beliggenheten og ser i de nærliggende små byene.

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 603
programme.desc: I Ikast er Camilla og Marc sultne på et hus med plass til oppbevaring. Men når Tobias finner et stort hus til dem, mister de motet, da det nå er SÅ mange rom som må pusses opp...

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 604
programme.desc: Stine og Daniel lengter etter mer plass før de snart utvider familien fra tre til fire. Derfor er det ikke optimalt når Mads ringer og forteller at avtalen med det nye huset deres i Langå ikke gjelder.

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 301
programme.desc: Astrid og Steffen skal kjøpe sitt første hus, men de kan ikke gå på kompromiss med ønskene sine. De møter programmets eksperter som skal kjøpe et hus på deres vegne.

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 302
programme.desc: Louise og Michael har vokst ut av sin lille leilighet i Århus og trenger mer plass. Paret gjør et kompromiss, og Louise står overfor sitt største mareritt i huset som ekspertene kjøper til dem.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Stockholm
programme.desc: When Tareq arrives in Stockholm he will meet innovation and world class gastronomy, a big city for foodies. He will make some pizza at the Rosendal garden café and go on an adventure in the archipielago.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Lolland
programme.desc: When Michelin star chefs move from Copenhagen to the countryside, they often end up in Lolland/Falster. Here Tareq will meet Claus Meyer the father of new nordic cuisine and other entrepreneurs that opened interesting restaurants here.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Skåne
programme.desc: Tareq Taylor explores his own backyard of Skåne and hometown of Malmö, a multi cultural food mix. Here you can find food and culture from all over the world that makes it a unique culinary destination.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Best Of
programme.desc: Tareq Taylor looks back on some of the food adventures he has been part of in the program series Nordic Cookery. Tareq promises delicacies from all over the Nordics and meetings with fantastic people along the way.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Läckö & Kinnekulle
programme.desc: By Lake Vänern you find Läckö and Kinnekulle, an area rich in history, culture and traditions. Tareq cooks exciting dishes on vendice roe, fish and local cheeses - all served on porcelain from the world-famous Rörstrand.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Sjuhärad
programme.desc: Sjuhärad is nature and culture in perfect symbiosis. Tareq takes the bike to meet some of the food entrepreneurs in the area who have started exciting new businesses. Here you live close to nature, forest and lakes.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Greater Copenhagen
programme.desc: Copenhagen and Skåne are a hot food destinations. Tareq visits Østergro, Denmark's first "rooftop farm" in the middle of Copenhagen, Eden in the new district Hyllie, Malmö and Häckeberga Castle where there will be wild boar for dinner.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Höganäs
programme.desc: The wild coast at Kullaberg in Skåne has a lot of culture and gastronomy to offer. Fantastic ceramics, vineyards and world-class ice cream. Tareq visits VikenTomater and cooks vegetarian ragù

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 101
programme.desc: I kveldens episode møter vi fire ofre for plastiskkirurgiske feiloperasjoner.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 501
programme.desc: Siden puberteten, har Tascha vært lei av sine asymmetriske bryster og har hatt en brystoperasjon. Men Tascha fikk ikke symmetrien hun drømte om, og i dag skammer hun seg over brystene.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 805
programme.desc: Som tenåring har Linette en skjev skillevegg i nesen som gir henne pustevansker. Som 21-åring får hun derfor tilbud om en neseoperasjon for å fikse problemet, men ender opp med en skjev nese.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 105
programme.desc: Sabine fant et tilbud på nettet, men måtte betale dyrt for å spare 50 prosent.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 608
programme.desc: I 2011 velger Sabina å ta en brystforstørrelsesoperasjon. Men allerede et par dager etter operasjonen oppdager hun at brystene hennes henger.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 202
programme.desc: I dagens episode møter vi bl.a. Pernille, som føler seg fanget i sitt eget hjem, og Linda, som er så hemmet av et arr på magen at hun møter opp tidlig på jobb for å unngå å skifte med andre.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Gary And The Farm Girl
programme.desc: Goerdie-gjengen drar ut på veiene for nok en Tash-On Tour for unge bønder i Gloucestershire. 'Gale Charlotte' vender tilbake når hun ser Gary prate med en annen jente, og Holly og Kyle blir mer intime enn aldri før.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Blue Skull Crew
programme.desc: Gary later som han får en tatovering av Charlottes initialer bak øret, men hun friker ut og sier noe hun angrer etterpå. Dramatikk oppstår mellom Aaron og Marnie, Holly mister tilliten til Kyle, og Gary og Scott begynner nesten å slåss.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Christmas Comes Early
programme.desc: Det er jul i Geordie Shore-huset! Men det blir tårer blant glitteret når Vicky dukker opp med triste nyheter. Kyle håper at han får en julegave fra Holly, og Gaz og Char prøver å løse sine problemer. Seriens siste episode.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: The Boys' Secret Pact
programme.desc: Herlig! Favorittpartyløvene er her igjen! Charlotte klekker ut en plan når hun hører om pakten mellom Gary og Aaron, men vil det ende med at hun får egg i fjeset? Imens erJames i tvil om han har en framtid i huset.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: The New Arrivals
programme.desc: Det blir store forandringer i huset når James kommer med en sjokkbeskjed og to nye romkamerater dukker opp. Men nykommernes første utekveld blir spolert når det oppstår en kjempekrangel mellom Charlotte, Marnie og Holly.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Gary's Big Reveal
programme.desc: Det er de nyes første morgen i huset, men hvordan skal familien samles, når Holly, Kyle og Charlotte er vekk? Holly åpner sitt hjerte for Kyle, men føler han det samme? En overraskende avsløring fra Gary knuser Charlottes hjerte.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: One Shot
programme.desc: Sommeren går mot slutten, men dramaet er ikke over. Pauly får en stalker, og en deltaker havner i fengsel etter en slåsskamp.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: That's How The Shore Goes
programme.desc: Ronnie slipper ut, og Snooki får trøst etter et møte med eksen. Gjengen tar farvel med The Shore, men ikke uten en siste tur i boblebadet.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Season 1 Reunion
programme.desc: Man får svar på mange spørsmål når Snooki, The Situation, Jwoww, DJ Pauly D, Angelina, Ronnie, Sammi og Vinny kommer tilbake for mer krangling og innsikt i hva som faktisk foregikk i strandhuset i Jersey Shore.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Goin' South
programme.desc: Gjengen skal til Miami! Mike, Pauly D, Snooki og JWoww kjører, mens de andre tar fly. Tidligere deltaker Angelina skaper drama. Ronnie og Sammi er blitt single, men det er fortsatt komplisert.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: The Hangover
programme.desc: Sammi vil vite hva Ronnie gjorde på klubben kvelden før, men ingen vil si det. Angelina avbryter Paulys spill, og den vanligvis så rolige Pauly D viser en helt ny side.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Creepin'
programme.desc: Angelina ber jentene om unnskyldning. Mike, Vinny og Pauly leker med granater i boblebadet, og Ron fortsatt har hemmeligheter for Sammi.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Rehearsals with the Stars
programme.desc: Kellie Pickler comes to a rehearsal to share her experience and motivate the girls as Training Camp comes to an end; Melissa Rycroft makes Kelsey aware of a big mistake; Candace Romo helps with a big night of cuts.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: The Finish Line
programme.desc: Squad announcement feels bittersweet as some favorites go home; the team has their first appearance at the Star Ribbon cutting; Game Day arrives.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Judge's Showcase
programme.desc: Lagets største og mest talentfulle klassen på treningsleiren må imponere DCC-dommerne med soloer og gruppedans for å få være med. Melissa Rycroft er også med.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: You Came To Play!
programme.desc: Melissa Rycroft kommer til første øvelse for å lete etter artistmentorer. Så rusker Brittany Perry-Russell opp i kandidatene med koreografien sin.. Med Melissa Rycroft og Brittany Perry-Russell.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Call the Medic!
programme.desc: Kandidatene får lære teknikker så sparkene blir ennå høyere. Kelli blir urolig for en kandidat da Evan Miller underviser i hurtigkoreografi. Med Melissa Page og Evan Miller.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Episode 2
programme.desc: I sluttuttaket er konkurransen beinhard. Nå må de som har overlevd, konkurrere mot erfarne veteraner om en av de ettertraktede plassene på DCCs treningsleir.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Episode 3
programme.desc: Treningsleiren er i gang! De nye kandidatene er spente, og kanskje fulle av beundring, når de treffer veteranene for første gang på Valley Ranch.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Chihuahuas from Hell
programme.desc: This one-hour special highlights the demonic demeanors of one of the most challenging breeds, Chihuahuas. Cesar revisits the stories of past participants, Paris, Bandit, and NuNu amongst others.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Charlotte, Elvis and Jack
programme.desc: Actress Eileen Davidson's Wheaten terrier puppy Charlotte, plays too rough with her son. Two other dogs react to household triggers, the garbage disposal and shiny floors.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Cesar and the Horse Whisperer (Chloe & Hobo, Ali)
programme.desc: Cesar enlists the help of Horse Whisperer Pat Parelli at a riding center that works with special needs people. A dog with separation anxiety exhibits extreme dog aggression.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Inside Puppy Mills
programme.desc: This powerful episode delves into the horror of puppy mills and the rescue and rehab of traumatized pups by the Last Chance for Animals non-profit organization.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Nuna & Kane
programme.desc: NuNu the Chihuahua, fiercely attacks anyone who comes near his owner Tina. NuNu’s total opposite, Kane the Great Dane, is vehemently afraid of shiny surfaces

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Opie & Flirt
programme.desc: Black lab mix Opie is a charmer around people, but frighteningly aggressive around other dogs. Energetic to the point of being neurotic, Chinese Crested Flirt cannot sit still for one moment.

programme.title: MacGyver: Squeeze Play
programme.desc: MacGyver uncovers an illegal trading ring dealing in counterfeit baseball memorabilia.

programme.title: MacGyver: Jerico Games
programme.desc: An ex-girlfriend frames MacGyver for her broadcasting magnate husband's murder.

programme.title: MacGyver: Wasteland

programme.title: MacGyver: Eye of Osiris
programme.desc: MacGyver travels to Turkey in search of Alexander the Great's tomb and the legendary Eye of Osiris.

programme.title: MacGyver: High Control
programme.desc: MacGyver infiltrates a criminal biker gang to help prove a parolee's innocence.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: Willie and Jase compete against each other to become president of their neighborhood homeowner association; Jep, Jess and Miss Kay work on a Duck Commander-themed display for the local zoo.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: The guys have fun with a 3-D printer until they come to the realization that the machine could soon replace their jobs; Si invests in John Luke's snow cone stand after Willie doesn't give him a raise.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: Jase, Jep, Si and Cole battle a growing population of cottonmouth snakes on Phil's property; Willie uses his business expertise to help Rebecca improve her clothing store.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: Jase and Jep argue over who should inherit their grandfather's old rifle; Willie and Korie rehearse a Taiwanese engagement ceremony with Rebecca as she prepares to travel to Taiwan with her fiancé.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: The guys cause Si to lose his job as a bagger at a grocery store; Korie resorts to bribery in order to persuade Willie to get some much-needed dental work.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: The sons and wives work to protect Phil and Kay's home from potential floodwaters when a large storm rolls into town; a leaking warehouse roof threatens inventory at Duck Commander.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: Willie becomes seduced by the game of bingo after he accompanies Kay to a local tournament; Jase and Jep introduce the youngsters to entertaining outdoor mud activities.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: Willie hopes that impending high-school graduate Sadie will decide to attend a local college; Mary Kate and John Luke attempt to prove to Phil that they haven't lost their Robertson roots.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: A competitive cook-off ensues after the Robertson brothers debate which of their wives makes the best cornbread; Jep, Martin and Godwin's practical joke on Uncle Si backfires.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: The guys learn how to rope, ride and clown around when they attend a one-day rodeo fantasy camp; Kay wonders if her dog's new girlfriend comes from a good family.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog surprises Beth with a papillon puppy for her birthday; Beth takes her new puppy out with her on the next case.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: When Dog gives a drug addict a second chance, the man flees on his way to rehab.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog travels to Colorado to help a fellow bondsman nab a violent culprit who plans to disappear; a distracted Duane Lee leaves Dog in the lurch.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: The team chases a heavily tattooed bail-jumper; Dog imparts wisdom upon the captured criminal in the hope of changing his life.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog travels from Honolulu to Kona to help his son Leland capture some fugitives; father and son spar in the gym.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Bondswoman Mary Ellen enlists Dog and his team to hunt a man wanted on drug charges; the fugitive's family poses a threat.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Wanted fugitives are rounded up like clockwork as Dog spends two days sweeping his island clean of criminals.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: The crew searches Hawaii's underworld for a female bail jumper; the hunt is halted while the team conducts a daylight raid to capture another criminal.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Jade Fever
programme.desc: En brutal tur til et nytt gruveområde skiller familien og presser Josh til bristepunktet.

programme.title: Jade Fever
programme.desc: Claudia gleder seg til å begynne driften i det nye området, men fremgangen stoppes etter en rekke uheldige hendelser på deres gamle gruveleir i Wolverine.

programme.title: Jade Fever
programme.desc: Små oppturer i leiren gleder et misfornøyd mannskap, og et overraskelsesbesøk bringer håp til Claudias fremtid på Two Mile.

programme.title: Jade Fever
programme.desc: Gary og Josh kommer ikke tilbake fra en rutinemessig drivstoffylling. Borere sår tvil om kvaliteten på jadelinsene på Two Mile.

programme.title: Jade Fever
programme.desc: Mannskapet treffer jackpot, men vinteren nærmer seg, og Claudia bekymrer seg for at det store funnet kan ha kommet for sent.

programme.title: Jade Fever
programme.desc: Claudia er desperat etter å starte gruvedriften, men brutale veiforhold får henne til å tvile på om mannskapet i det hele tatt vil ankomme stedet.

programme.title: Jade Fever
programme.desc: Mens Guy og Gary desperat forsøker å fikse den ødelagte veien til stedet, håper Claudia at en ny medarbeider vil bringe den flaksen hun sårt trenger.

programme.title: Jade Fever
programme.desc: Robins overraskende handletur stresser Claudia når innkjøpsfeil setter gruvedriften på vent.

programme.title: Jade Fever
programme.desc: Claudia prøver å bevare freden når Robin og hennes far krangler, mens mannskapet sliter med å fikse det ene problemet etter det andre på gruvebilen deres.

programme.title: Jade Fever
programme.desc: Gary og Josh frustreres av flere sammenbrudd, mens Claudia kommer med en sjokkerende kunngjøring som spolerer Robins planer og forårsaker konflikt mellom paret.

programme.title: Matlock: The Psychic
programme.desc: Matlock defends a prominent psychic, Jennifer Holtz, who foresees her boyfriend’s murder and is subsequently arrested when he is found dead and Jennifer has no alibi.

programme.title: Matlock: The Thief (Part 1)
programme.desc: A rare-coin dealer invests his trust in Matlock when he’s accused of murdering an employee who was caught stealing valuable coins. Meanwhile, Tyler becomes disgruntled when Matlock hires another private investigator, Linda Hansfield, to work on the case.

programme.title: Matlock: The Thief (Part 2)
programme.desc: While defending a coin dealer accused of murdering an employee, Matlock and Tyler suspect the new investigator Ben hired, Linda Hansfield, is being blackmailed by the real kIller.

programme.title: Matlock: The Thoroughbred
programme.desc: A picturesque thoroughbred horse farm provides an unusual setting for murder when Ben Matlock defends a slow-witted stable hand, Tommy Jenks, accused of killing the stable owner’s daughter.

programme.title: Matlock: The Model
programme.desc: Ben Matlock defends a renowned journalist accused of murdering a beautiful international model. Matlock’s investigation is stalled when he is struck by a car and lands in the hospital with a slight case of amnesia.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Julia Adams comes to Dr. Sloan for a check-up. She seems a little anxious. At the same time, a man comes running through the hospital and in one highly restricted lab, knocks over and breaks a test tube.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Dr. Sloan questions old friend and newspaper baron Barclay about the security company.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Dr. Simon Hodiak, a noted cardiologist, is a gambling addict. When his bookie strong-arms him to repay his debt of $60,000, Simon sells his Porsche.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Maureen Tate is ogling over her nephew, Casey, with sister Grace. Maureen panics when there is a knock at the door, and the man's voice declares he is the police.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Soft music, candles, and a lifeless body dressed in lovely lingerie. These are the trademarks of 'The Casanova Killer,' a serial murderer who leaves only a stain of blood near the heart, and the sole of a foot marred by an 'X,' as forensic evidence.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LIV
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' kan ikke Rob Dyrdek, Steelo Brim og Lolo Wood løpe fra den morsomme snublingen i 'Fluktfall', viser fram imponerende bisker i 'Hermehunder' og snakker varmt for bruken av solide hodeplagg i 'Skudd fra oven'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LV
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' finner Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood ut hvor stor skade en strippepåle kan forårsake i «Pål-lateral skade', oppdager at ikke alle liker å bli skremt i 'Skremtraseri' før de avslutter med noen 'Forlatte farer'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LVI
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' slår Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood ut fra tee i 'Sving-ding', krasjer med 'Små landingsmatter' og blir offer for noen 'Byfeller'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' får Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood besøk av sangeren Teddy Swims og ser nærmere på folk som 'Mister kontrollen', får faderlige råd i 'Pappavisdom og kaster ut noen problemtyper i 'Vis dem veien ut'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LVII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' får Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood problemer med å sette seg på grunn av 'Stolnasking', møter brått uventede dyr i 'Dyrestøkk' og bruker god tid på å falle i 'Gradvise fall'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LVIII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' får Rob, Steelo og gjestevert Lolo Wood nærbilkontakt med leppene i 'Bilkyssere', får seg et slag under beltestedet med 'Lavtslåtte damer' og orker ikke å spise når de er sammen med 'Matlystslukkere'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LIX
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' oppdager Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood at telefoner kan være distraherende i 'Telefonblind', møter unger som bør finne seg en annen sportsgren i 'Minigolfere' og besøker noen steder der det er 'Kjempekaldt'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' går Rob, Steelo og gjestevert Lolo Wood smertefullt på hodet i 'Stup hvor som helst', kaster seg på sykkelen i 'Pedaltrøkk rett i pølen' og blir vitner til tupékatastrofer i 'Tupé på vift'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LXI
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' ser Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood hva som skjer når du ikke lander støtt i 'Ustø landing', sjekker de mest lojale kjærestene i 'Jeg er opptatt' og avslutter med uheldige campere i 'Glamourløs camping'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LXII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' krasjer Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood med stil idet de 'Flyr over styret', spaserer på løs grunn i 'Fallgulv' og drar for å gjøre innkjøp altfor sent i 'Grubutikken'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LXIII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' hogger Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood ned trær med noen 'Tømmerflopper', får seg noen 'Luftige-svev-madrasser' og har det kjempekult på 'Rockeførskolen'.

programme.title: Andromeda: Harper 2.0
programme.desc: Harper mottar kunnskapsgaven fra en døende Perseid, bare for å oppdage at Perseid ble etterlyst av en dusørjeger som nå har vendt oppmerksomheten mot Harper.

programme.title: Andromeda: Tvunget perspektiv
programme.desc: Dylan blir arrestert for å ha myrdet en diktator for 300 år siden.

programme.title: Andromeda: Summen av delene
programme.desc: Andromeda styres av en drone fra Consensus of Parts, et mytisk mekanisk samfunn. Mens den først var vennlig, prøver dronen å tvinge skipet til å bli med i konsensus.

programme.title: Andromeda: Frykt og avsky i Melkeveien
programme.desc: Gerentex er tilbake, og han krever at Trance og Harper hjelper ham med sitt nye opplegg: å finne Tarn-Vedra.

programme.title: Andromeda: Djevelen tar den bakerste
programme.desc: Dylan og Rev Bem hjelper et fredelig samfunn med å stå opp mot sine kommende slaver, men de må være forsiktige: hvis Dylan lærer dem å drepe, vil barna deres bli født og vite det.

programme.title: Andromeda: Honningstilbudet
programme.desc: Dylan prøver å bringe fred til to forskjellige Nietzschean-stolthetspunkter ved å eskortere prinsesse til den ene til hennes arrangerte ekteskap med prinsen til den andre

programme.title: Forensic Files: Wheel of Misfortune
programme.desc: Casino security cameras tracked a young woman's movements until shortly before she disappeared. She was never seen again, but through the evidence she left behind, she was able to tell investigators what happened to her and who was responsible.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Quite a Spectacle
programme.desc: It was one of the most unusual cases in forensic history. Investigators had to find a way to solve a murder case using only a squashed tomato found at the crime scene and tiny, pinpoint reflections of light in a photograph.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Transaction Failed
programme.desc: When a dedicated, well-respected teacher disappeared, police had to determine if she'd gone on vacation without telling anyone or if she was the victim of foul play.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Day the Music Died
programme.desc: Seattle police had no suspects in the violent murder of grunge singer Mia Zapata. More than a decade passed before evidence collected by a prescient medical examiner could be used by forensic scientists to identify the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sole Survivor
programme.desc: A Michigan State University grad student disappeared and was presumed dead. With the help of a professor of geological sciences, police hoped to get the "dirt" on her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Insignificant Others
programme.desc: How unlucky could one man be? His college sweetheart killed herself and fourteen years later, his wife ended her life in a similar way. Investigators had to determine if this was murder or simply a bizarre coincidence.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Catch 22
programme.desc: In 1996, 54-year-old Gayle Isleib was ambushed in her Manchester, Connecticut driveway and shot to death. Police had to determine whether obsessive love was the motive for her murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Cinderella Story
programme.desc: The victim had been sexually assaulted and stabbed to death on the beach. A pair of men's tennis shoes was discovered near her body. Police were sure that if they found the man who fit the shoes, they would also find the man who committed the crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Screen Pass
programme.desc: A 13-year-old girl went missing from her Colorado home. The only evidence the kidnapper left behind was three fingerprints on a window screen.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Pressed for Crime
programme.desc: Several suspects and conflicting evidence complicated a brutal murder investigation. But the forensics were clear on one thing: the killer knew his victim, and that alone gave investigators a head start.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries: Episode 23
programme.desc: This episode includes: Gander, Peggie's Brother, Cult of de Cloud & UD and UD: Polio.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries: Episode 24
programme.desc: This episode includes: Miram's Memory & UD, Ghost Blimp, Fugitive Fireman & UD and Russian Roulette & UD.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries: Episode 1
programme.desc: This episode includes: Reincarnated Submariner (Pts. 1 & 2), UD: Cult of Decloud, Chicago Hit & Run and Tornado Disappearance & UD.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries: Episode 2
programme.desc: This episode includes: Mystery Robber (Pts. 1 & 2) & UD, Australian UFO, Lost at Sea and Danny and His Dad.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries: Episode 3
programme.desc: This episode includes: Anastasia (Pts. 1, 2 & 3) & UD, Jail Family & UD and Killer Boyfriend & UD.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries: Episode 4
programme.desc: This episode includes: Zel's Odyssey (Pts. 1 & 2), Wally's Hidden River, UD: DJ Death and Looking for Christopher & UD.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Deadly Paradise
programme.desc: It should have been Shangri-La, but when bad blood developed, piracy took over and the only law was the law of the jungle.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Millionaire Murder
programme.desc: A businessman went to Florida to make one last deal before he retired-he never returned home to his millions. Authorities examined who was closest to him and who stood to gain from his disappearance. But this time conventional rules didn't apply.

programme.title: The FBI Files: A Family Torn
programme.desc: The parents of 11 yr. old Brittany Martinez knew their daughter was no runaway. Something had happened to her, something terrible. When they failed to find Brittany in their quiet Illinois neighborhood, they called the police.

programme.title: The FBI Files: A Model Killer
programme.desc: It's a model's job to rivet the public's attention. But in 1984, some aspiring models began attracting publicity in a terrible new way.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Cracking The Cartel
programme.desc: A mother and child are kidnapped a bystander is murdered. Violence such as this shattered a quiet Texas neighborhood and exposed a drug cartel that flourished where it was least expected.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Dead Run
programme.desc: In Pennsylvania, an inmate escaped with the help of his female accomplice. Following a trail of fraudulent credit card receipts and deaths, authorities track the pair, but always find themselves one step behind.

programme.title: The New Detectives: A Taste of Poison
programme.desc: Poisoners are the most devious of killers, relying on stealth or their victim's trust in order to steal their lives. They're the most dangerous creatures in the world: smart assassins. And they usually don't stop at one kill.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Left At The Scene
programme.desc: The tiniest residue left at the scene can become a mark of distinction in the most singular and intimate of ways.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Seeds of Destruction
programme.desc: Forensic Botany & Geology: Plants help provide oxygen and nutrients for existence. Soil is the fertilizer of life. Yet both can yield clues to the time and location of a person's death.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Web of Clues
programme.desc: Forensic Entomology: Bugs have roamed the earth for 250 million years, but their intimate association with death is just now coming to life.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Fateful Twist
programme.desc: A southeastern Virginia community is stunned by a crime no one can believe. A pregnant woman murdered, her baby lost. Across the state, another town feels a similar shock, a brutal, random slaying in a most unexpected setting.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: The Curse Of The Pendle Witches - Part 2
programme.desc: Sean continues his investigation of Pendle Hill and ventures even deeper into the hills. The night takes an unexpected turn with a dramatic ending, which he believes was caused by the witches.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: Shadow Menace Haunting Morley Market - Part 1
programme.desc: Sean heads to the town of Morley to investigate the infamous Morley Market. A place once bustling with people from years gone by, it is now haunted by shadow figures, and they appear to want to make themselves known.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: Shadow Menace Haunting Morley Market - Part 2
programme.desc: Sean continues the investigation at Morley Market and appears to be followed by a spirit person that wants to touch him and distract him from investigating certain parts of the main hall. Will he uncover who this spirit is?

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: A Night at The Leeds Museum Part 1
programme.desc: Four floors of terror! Objects from around the world are at home in the museum, but what is attached to them, which now roams the floors and corridors after dark?

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Lockdown: Norris Green Mansion Part 1
programme.desc: Many urban explorers have encountered paranormal activity inside of the building, including child like figures, unexplained voices and strange knocking sounds. Will anything from the ghost dimension make contact?

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Lockdown: Norris Green Mansion Part 2
programme.desc: Ghost Dimension's Bex and Sean investigate Norris Green Mansion. A 17th Century building, which is believed to hold some of the most haunted spirits in Liverpool. Will they make contact its ghostly entities tonight?

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show: You Won't Marry Your Gay Lover!
programme.desc: Friends and family refuse to accept same sex marriage! Martin won’t let his son marry his boyfriend. April wants her ex back, but he’s in love with a man! Who has the final say?

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show: I Have A Secret For My Man!
programme.desc: Friends Tatiana and Latasha have both been keeping a big secret from their boyfriends! Today they're here to come clean!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show: I'll Never Let You Go!
programme.desc: Chrishon denies he’s engaged to Taiwana with 3 weeks until their wedding. Lauren confronts her ex for leaving her for another woman while pregnant! Dave still wants Leesa’s love.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show: Honey… I'm a Call Girl!
programme.desc: Chloe and Dan will tie the knot soon, but she’s finally ready to tell him about her real job. Then, Amanda’s mom begs her to quit her job.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show: Sizzling Sex Secrets!
programme.desc: Torrance admits to cheating on his girlfriend with a shocking twist. Then, Heather wants her boyfriend’s ex Tramisha to stop interfering with their relationship.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Forbidden Love
programme.desc: At twelve, Crystal dated 20-year-old Matt and was pregnant at 13. He served 15 months for sexual assault on a minor and is a registered sex offender. Is this inappropriate love or a misunderstanding?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: 16-Year-Old Surrogate Stole Our Baby
programme.desc: Sarah was Dawn and Derek's surrogate, but took off while five months pregnant. Sarah claims that they took advantage of her. Who are the baby's rightful parents?

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: The End
programme.desc: Kenda faces his most difficult case yet – the slaying of a young boy. The detective makes the most consequential decision of his career.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: When the Music Stops
programme.desc: Vietnam War veteran Charles Walker is found unconscious, after a stabbing attack so savage even 45 units of blood couldn’t save his life.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: The Monster Awakes
programme.desc: When Julie Smith reports being sexually assaulted, Lt. Joe Kenda and his Sex Crimes Unit discover a terrifying similarity to other attacks on the east side of town.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Last Fare
programme.desc: A young man is found dead behind the wheel of his taxi. With robbery seeming unlikely, Kenda and Gaenzle wonder if this was personal.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Six Feet Under
programme.desc: Kenda finds the body of a bruised and battered young woman named Vicki Ross strangled. Kenda must sort through the endless suspicious characters in Vicki's past to find the elusive truth.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Blood From A Stone
programme.desc: A bystander receives a deadly head injury during a roadside altercation, but the stakes are raised when his body disappears from the scene. When a toddler is kidnapped for ransom Kenda joins forces with an undercover team in a desperate race against time.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: The Monster Awakes
programme.desc: When Julie Smith reports being sexually assaulted, Lt. Joe Kenda and his Sex Crimes Unit discover a terrifying similarity to other attacks on the east side of town.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Bad Moon Rising
programme.desc: The night before Halloween, a real-life nightmare unfolds when a young man is found clinging to life. The case takes a dark turn when Lt. Joe Kenda learns there is a second victim somewhere in the woods.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner
programme.desc: A florist meets with clients for an upcoming wedding, but she suddenly collapses to the floor. With no apparent cause of death, Dr. G worries that this case may go unsolved.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner
programme.desc: When an infant dies under mysterious circumstances, the young parents are prime suspects. Dr. G discovers several clues that bolster the child abuse theory, but the case is not clear-cut.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner
programme.desc: Police make a grisly discovery: a woman’s battered and dead body. With little evidence and no witnesses, Dr. G must identify the body and determine the cause of death to catch her killer.

programme.title: My Ghost Story: I Died in This House
programme.desc: A medium experiences the torture of a prison snitch killed by other inmates. Two soldiers in Iraq are startled by ghostly encounters in abandoned bunkers; and a police officer witnesses paranormal activity in a deserted spa.

programme.title: Buzzfeed Unsolved: The Covert Poisoning of An Ex-Russian Spy / The Odd Death of Charles C. Morgan
programme.desc: Ryan and Shane cover the case of a slain ex-spy and the crimes leading to the death of Charles C. Morgan.

programme.title: Buzzfeed Unsolved: The Bizarre Disappearance of Bobby Dunbar
programme.desc: Ryan and Shane take an in-depth look at the insane controversy surrounding the disappearance of Bobby Dunbar.

programme.title: Buzzfeed Unsolved: The Treacherous Treasure Hunt of Forrest Fenn
programme.desc: Join Ryan and Shane as they attempt to track down the mysterious hidden treasure of Forest Fenn.

programme.title: Buzzfeed Unsolved: The Eerie Case of the Watcher
programme.desc: Ryan and Shane take a look at the case of the Watcher, a mysterious stalker who terrorized his neighborhood.

programme.title: Buzzfeed Unsolved: The Unusual Australian Shark Arm Murder
programme.desc: Follow along as hosts Ryan and Shane go down under to examine a shark, a speedboat, and a mysterious severed arm.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: Osama Bin Laden
programme.desc: Richard investigates claims that the supposed mastermind behind the 9/11 terrorist attacks and leader of the Al Qaeda terrorist cell remained a CIA asset until his death.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: The Dangers of EMF (Electro Magnetic Frequencies)
programme.desc: Can radiation from electrical appliances, power lines, microwave ovens, and wireless technology such as cell phones, baby monitors, alter our DNA, and cause illnesses?

programme.title: Mutant X: Altered Ego
programme.desc: En ung ny mutant fra Adams fortid dukker opp og søker hevn for farens død

programme.title: Mutant X: Lazarus Syndrome
programme.desc: Teamet møter en mutant som dreper andre mutanter ved å tappe energien og kan også komme tilbake til livet etter å ha blitt drept.

programme.title: Mutant X: Interface
programme.desc: Emma gjenforenes med en gammel venninne som har telecyber-krefter. Gjenforeningen blir imidlertid farlig når Michelle prøver å overgi Emma til GSA.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Afterlife and Death
programme.desc: Sydney og Nigel er i Kairo, Egypt og deretter Amsterdam. De må slå den rivaliserende relikviejegeren Avery Ko til Farao Thutmoses diamant før den blir kuttet opp og solgt.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Etched in Stone
programme.desc: Sydney, Nigel og Stewie Harper drar til Stockholm i Sverige for å finne Runestone av kong Jann I av Norge.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Irish Crown Affair
programme.desc: Sydney og Nigel drar til Dublin, Irland på jakt etter den manglende kronen til den siste kongen av Irland.

programme.title: On the Case: A Face with No Name
programme.desc: Police have DNA evidence and a videotape of their suspect, yet they still struggle to find a vicious killer.

programme.title: On the Case: Deadly Silence
programme.desc: An 18-year-old woman never returns home after a night out with friends, and the police come up against a wall of silence that keeps them from uncovering the truth.

programme.title: On the Case: A Window to Murder
programme.desc: A valiant teenager's dying act helps police solve the mystery behind her murder.

programme.title: On the Case: Murder At Sunset- Part 2
programme.desc: A mother and two daughters are discovered floating in Tampa Bay after a brutal triple homicide. Police must rely on a victim who survived a similar attack to bring the killer to justice in this special two-hour On the Case.

programme.title: On the Case: This is for Her
programme.desc: A deadly home invasion leaves a father of three dead. Why was the victim's wife, the only eyewitness to the crime left alive?

programme.title: On the Case: Almost Home
programme.desc: A young woman's battered body is found on the side of the road. The shocking evidence from the crime leads police down a trail of tragedy.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Actress Annaleigh Ashford, Olympic Snowboarder Jamie Anderson
programme.desc: Actress Annaleigh Ashford chats. Drew has a big surprise for nurse Gina Goodwin, who cooks and delivers hundreds of meals every Thanksgiving. Olympic snowboarder Jamie Anderson shares her winter skin routine. Drew reads letters in "Dear Drew."

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Youtube Star David Dobrik, Comedian Fortune Feimster, Beauty Backgrounder
programme.desc: David Dobrik on amassing over 15 million YouTube subscribers and the Vlog Squad. Comedian Fortune Feimster stops by. in Beauty Backgrounder, Drew does a deep-dive into the history of iconic beauty looks and shares tips for perfecting the timeless look.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Comedian Gabriel Iglesias, "Friendsgiving" Cast
programme.desc: Host of Nickelodeon’s new animal talent show "Unleashed" comedian Gabriel Iglesias shares with Drew one of his favorite acts. Cast of the new film "Friendsgiving" including Malin Akerman, Kat Dennings, Aisha Tyler and Chelsea Peretti stop by to chat.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Wildflower: Model Winnie Harlow, Mom’s Time Out
programme.desc: Drew spotlights women in signature "Wildflower." Laura Sobiech and Director Justin Baldoni discuss her son Zach’s battle with cancer inspiring a number one song. In "Mom’s Time Out," Drew surprises one deserving mom with an all-expenses paid vacation!

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Craft Week with Zooey Deschanel, Dumplings with Wilson Tang
programme.desc: Drew is sharing DIY crafts all week-long, kicking it off with actress Zooey Deschanel. Then, Drew learns how to make dumplings with Wilson Tang. Supermodel Karolina Kurkova joins Drew at the Drew’s News desk to discuss her line of sustainable masks.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: John Boyega, Drew's News, In A Minute with Bill Nye 60 Second Experiment
programme.desc: "The Woman King" star John Boyega stops by to chat and roller skate with Drew. Drew and Ross Mathews are serving the news sunny-side up in an all new Drew's News. Plus, In A Minute Bill Nye shares his 60 second experiment.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Bill Nye, Pilar's Pantry Party, In A Minute Drew's News Podcast Sneak Peak
programme.desc: Drew and Bill Nye The Science Guy are serving the news sunny-side up in an all new Drew's News. Then, Chef Pilar Valdes reveals five essential pantry items and turns them into a delicious dish.

programme.title: 48 Hours: NCIS: The Terrorists, The Spies, and The Hackers
programme.desc: 48 Hours is television's most popular true-crime series, investigating shocking cases and compelling real-life dramas with journalistic integrity and cutting-edge style.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Fall From Grace
programme.desc: An investigation into the October 2012 death of Bethany Deaton -- whether her death was a suicide, the fundamentalist Christian religious group to which she belonged, her marriage to the group's leader, and the quest by her family for answers.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Bad Boy
programme.desc: The case of Shelley Mook, a young mother and Tennessee school teacher who mysteriously vanished after visiting her ex-husband, is examined.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Breaking Point
programme.desc: Part one of a two-part report on the investigation into the 2012 death of 29-year-old lawyer Ryan Poston, at the hands of his on-again/off-again girlfriend Shayna Hubers, who admits to killing him, but and claims it was self-defense.

programme.title: 48 Hours: A Vision of Murder
programme.desc: An investigation into the 2010 death of Kelly Brennan, and her friend Sheila Trott's dream in which she perceived Brennan to be in danger. Brennan was later found bludgeoned to death.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Caught in the Crossfire - Part 2
programme.desc: A report about Charla and Darren Mack, a married, childless couple who were swingers who liked to attend group sex parties. After their daughter Erika was born, Charla was no longer interested in swinging and their marriage began to crumble.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Spy
programme.desc: NATO's missile defense system plans, mapped on two separate overlays for security reasons, are the target of a Central European spy organization.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Game of Chess
programme.desc: Recovering a million dollars in gold bullion is the job of the IMF.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Emerald
programme.desc: The IMF is assigned to recover microfilm plans for manipulating international gold reserves.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Condemned
programme.desc: Jim Phelps comes to the aid of a personal friend.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Counterfeiter
programme.desc: Destroying a drug ring is the task of the IMF.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Town
programme.desc: IMF leader Jim Phelps is marked for murder.

programme.title: Cops: Get Off My Roof
programme.desc: Officers deploy a police dog to persuade a reluctant suspect to come down off a roof, and an outdoor birthday celebration is crashed by an alleged drunk driver.

programme.title: Cops: This Man Stabbed Me
programme.desc: Police deploy spike strips to curb a stolen vehicle, a parolee at large speeds away with a two-month-old in the car, and officers try to determine the details of a stabbing.

programme.title: Cops: Blood and Scars, Bro!
programme.desc: A patrolman pursues a scooter speeding through a neighborhood, officers try to subdue a raving man, and a woman has issues with her neighbor's dogs.

programme.title: Cops: My Jewelry's Fragile
programme.desc: A cyclist tries to bolt when questioned by police, a deputy uses a cotton swab to procure evidence from a suspect's mouth, and an unmowed lawn triggers a domestic disturbance.

programme.title: Cops: Fast Food Escape
programme.desc: When officers approach, a suspect flees into a fast-food restaurant. A driver takes his granny's wheels for a dangerous spin with cops in pursuit. Sheriffs catch up to a man who fled the scene of a possible domestic battery.

programme.title: Cops: Late Night Snacks
programme.desc: Officers stop a fleeing vehicle, and a man with a warrant learns that a doughnut shop is not the best place to hide from the police.

programme.title: Cops: Cops We Run the Show
programme.desc: A man on the run with a warrant tries to elude police by busting into a residence and hiding under a blanket, and a fleeing cyclist turns apologetic after being caught.

programme.title: Cops: Doggie Paddle
programme.desc: A man resisting arrest sics his dogs on the police, and a recovering addict about to take his first hit in years wanders into the path of police in pursuit of another suspect.

programme.title: Cops: Wrong Place, Wrong Time
programme.desc: Police investigate suspicious activity in a known drug area, officers encounter a jaywalker with the munchies, and a woman caught with meth wants points for honesty.

programme.title: Cops: You Didn't Get Very Far
programme.desc: A man complains of heart trouble after running from police, a suspect in a stolen car leads officers on a wild chase, and police check on a disabled vehicle and its occupants.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Drost Notthoff Case
programme.desc: On September 11th 2011, in Èze, near Monaco, the owner of a luxury villa discovers the lifeless hanging body of his tenant, a rich German businessman.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Françoise Desnoue Case
programme.desc: On the evening of August 30st 2013, in a small village of Bougrogne, Éric Desnoue, 52 years old, reports his wife missing to the police. Did Françoise Desnoue run away? Or did she reattempt to kill herself?

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: A Strange Hanging - Chantal Ternik Case
programme.desc: On April 3th 2003, Chantal Ternik, a 48 year old housewife, is discovered hanged in her house of Sanary-sur-Mer, in Var.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Crime Scene Solvers: Murder in Le Grand Bornand (Flactif case)
programme.desc: Xavier Flactif, his partner Graziella and their three children suddenly disappear. For several days, mystery reigns.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Mysterious Disappearences in Paris - Christelle Leroy
programme.desc: On March 21th 1991, Pascale Escarfail, 19 years old, is discovered dead at her studio in the 14th arrondissement of Paris, she was raped then stabbed multiple times.

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 505
programme.desc: I 1999 brenner huset til Knut Øyvind Moe ned til grunnen i Valdres. To dager senere blir levningene hans hentet ut av brannruinene, og det viser seg at han ble skutt og drept i forkant av brannen.

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 103
programme.desc: To turgåere finner et utbrent lik på et bål langs en øde skogsbilvei på Veståsen i Søndre Land. I flere uker står politiet helt uten svar på hvem som kan stå bak den groteske handlingen.

programme.title: Svenske krimsaker
programme.desc: En tidlig februarmorgen i Stockholm melder en mann sin kone, Sacha, savnet. Etter hvert som politiet graver i parets fortid, oppdager de et turbulent forhold under den tilsynelatende ryddige overflaten.

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 204
programme.desc: På kvelden 1. nyttårsdag i 2012 utløses trygghetsalarmen hjemme hos 98 år gamle Hilda Feste. Da hjemmetjenesten rykker ut blir de vitne til en grufull hendelse. Politiet starter umiddelbart opp jakten på gjerningsmannen.

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 403
programme.desc: Marit Ødegaard jobber på en veikro ikke langt fra svenskegrensen. En oktoberdag i 2000 dukker hun ikke opp på jobb. Kort tid etter blir Marit funnet drept i hjemmet sitt

programme.title: Svenske krimsaker
programme.desc: En ung mann blir funnet død på et jorde utenfor Enköping. Ved første øyekast ser det ut som om han har lagt seg ned for å hvile - men når politiet undersøker liket, oppdager de noe som antas å være et skuddsår.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: The Watcher
programme.desc: On Vincent and Catherine's two year anniversary, Catherine receives a phone message indicating that someone is watching them.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: A Distant Shore
programme.desc: Catherine heads out to L.A California, to find a witness for an investigation.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Trial
programme.desc: Catherine is put in charge of a murder case in court, and to bring justice to a five year old murdered son.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: A Kingdom by the Sea
programme.desc: Catherine is blocked out of an investigation involving a murder attempt by the C.I.A. But there are more shocks yet to come, and a familiar face returns.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: The Hollow Men
programme.desc: Vincent witnesses their latest murder and is unable to stop them.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Not All Men
programme.desc: A meteor shower spreads infection across an entire town... affecting some of the inhabitants more than others. Taissa Farmiga, Rhea Seehorn, Luke Kirby and Ike Barinholtz guest star.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Point of Origin
programme.desc: A suburban housewife (Ginnifer Goodwin) wants to go home. But where - and what - is home, really? Zabryna Guevara and James Frain guest star.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Cavender is Coming
programme.desc: Cavender, an angel trying to win his wings, tries to help down-on-her-luck Agnes, who has just been fired.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Changing of the Guard
programme.desc: An elderly private school teacher wonders if his life has meant anything as he contemplates suicide on Christmas Eve and is reminded by former students that he has, indeed, had an impact on their lives.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: In Praise Of Pip
programme.desc: An alcoholic bookie regrets that he wasn't a better father to his son, Pip, critically wounded in South Vietnam. A visit to an amusement park gives them both a second chance.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Steel
programme.desc: Boxing robot "Battling Maxo" breaks down before the scheduled bout, forcing his manager to take its place.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Nightmare at 20,000 Feet
programme.desc: Mr. Wilson believes he sees a gremlin on the wing of the commercial aircraft he is taking back home... from the sanitarium, where he has been committed for six months after a mental breakdown during a similar flight.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: A Kind of a Stopwatch
programme.desc: Patrick Thomas McNulty, a long-winded and self-absorbed know-it-all, is given a fantastic device which brings literal meaning to the expression "stop the world; I want to get off."

programme.title: JAG: Skeleton Crew
programme.desc: The body of a woman Naval officer, a friend, and classmate of Harm, is found ashore.

programme.title: JAG: Trinity
programme.desc: Harm and his new partner, Marine Major Sara MacKenzie are drawn into a game of revenge when they're sent to Belfast, Ireland, to represent the legal interests of a Navy Lieutenant whose infant son has seemingly been abducted.

programme.title: JAG: Secrets
programme.desc: Admiral Chegwidden, Mac and Bud Roberts are taken hostage in the Admiral's office by Pvt. Magida, a Marine who escaped from a nearby Federal prison.

programme.title: JAG: Ghosts
programme.desc: Harm and Mac investigate an attempt on Admiral Chedwiggen's life and uncover the fact that all the members of his former SEAL team have died under mysterious circumstances.

programme.title: JAG: Full Engagement
programme.desc: While on their day off, Harm takes Mac for a flight in his vintage airplane, only to be forced to make an emergency landing in a mountain clearing because of mechanical problems.

programme.title: Happy Days: American Musical
programme.desc: Struggling to write a school essay on America's immigrant history, Chachi is inspired by Fonzie's colorful story told to the tune of an imagined melting pot melody.

programme.title: Happy Days: Grandma Nussbaum
programme.desc: Grandma Nussbaum teaches Fonzie and Chachi a lesson in growing old gracefully when they try to convince the feisty granny to move into a retirement home.

programme.title: Happy Days: A Night at the Circus
programme.desc: Howard's teen-aged niece, K.C., comes to stay with the Cunninghams after a scandal closes her Houston boarding school while Fonzie hopes a night at the circus will help him win little Heather's heart when nothing else seems to work.

programme.title: Happy Days: Where the Guys Are
programme.desc: After tricking Fonzie into going to a single's camp to help him get over losing steady girlfriend Ashley, Potsie, Chachi and Roger get suckered into a sauna by three con-girls.

programme.title: Happy Days: You Get What You Pay For
programme.desc: Howard decides the house needs a second bathroom. Fonzie offers a way to have it installed and save Howard money as well.

programme.title: Happy Days: Kiss Me Teach
programme.desc: Joanie encounters trouble when she accepts a student teaching job at Patton High.

programme.title: Happy Days: The People vs. The Fonz
programme.desc: His friends are baffled when Fonzie refuses to speak in his own defense after he is accused of manhandling a student and brought before the school board's disciplinary court.

programme.title: Happy Days: School Dazed
programme.desc: Joanie tries to help an angry fifteen year old girl kick a drug habit that threatens to get her kicked out of school.

programme.title: Happy Days: Open House
programme.desc: Over the protests of Richie, whose parents are out of town, Potsie invites three-stranded beauty pageant contestants to spend the night.

programme.title: Hot Ones: John Mayer Has a Sing-Off While Eating Spicy Wings
programme.desc: John Mayer is a platinum-selling singer-songwriter with seven Grammys and the ability to shred the guitar.

programme.title: Hot Ones: E-40 Asks a Fan to Save Him While Eating Spicy Wings
programme.desc: E-40 is a hip-hop legend with more than three decades in the game — and he is ready to take on the heat.

programme.title: Hot Ones: Jeffrey Dean Morgan Can't Feel His Face While Eating Spicy Wings
programme.desc: Jeffrey Dean Morgan has played many iconic roles on film and TV, most notably as Negan on "The Walking Dead."

programme.title: Hot Ones: Desus and Mero Get Smacked By Spicy Wings
programme.desc: The Bodega Boys bring their hilarious brand of unrelenting comedy to the wings of death.

programme.title: Hot Ones: Shia LaBeouf Sheds a Tear While Eating Spicy Wings
programme.desc: Shia LaBeouf is an actor and performance artist with a new film called "The Peanut Butter Falcon."

programme.title: Hot Ones: Brad Leone Celebrates Thanksgiving With Spicy Wings
programme.desc: Brad Leone is the Bon Appétit Test Kitchen manager-turned-host of the "It's Alive" series.

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.desc: John Oliver discusses the problems with cable news and his iconic (in his own mind) free kick in Soweto.

programme.title: Hot Ones: Vince Staples Delivers Hot Takes While Eating Spicy Wings
programme.desc: Vince Staples has been requesting bottles of Hot Ones Fiery Chipotle for months!

programme.title: Hot Ones: DaBaby Crushes Ice Cream While Eating Spicy Wings
programme.desc: DaBaby is a breakout rap superstar with more than 20 songs on the Billboard charts in 2019.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Ice traps a treasure of energy on the ocean floor and confounds scientists still trying to solve why it's so slippery.

programme.title: Modern Marvels Essentials
programme.desc: Meet the loggers who started it all, and find out what really happens on the journey from stump to sawmill.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Fast and powerful, they come in a hundred shapes and a thousand colors; to some, motorcycles symbolize freedom; to others, they simply stand for trouble; episode race back in time and see how, for over a hundred years, motorcycles inspired riders.

programme.title: The Rise of the Nazi Party: Hitler's Biggest Blunder
programme.desc: Hitler rules Europe triumphantly, hailed as a hero in Germany. Hitler invades the Soviet Union, promising swift victory over communism, but progress stalls. As Germany faces setbacks, Hitler retreats to his bunker in Poland, increasingly reliant on drugs.

programme.title: World War II in HD Colour: Lightning War
programme.desc: Country after European country falls before the unstoppable German blitzkrieg.

programme.title: Secret War: The Spymistress and the French Fiasco
programme.desc: After WWII, SOE disbanded, leaving Vera Atkins to uncover fates of 118 agents, including 13 women. Many were betrayed and sent to camps; some were executed. Atkins' quest continued, marked by personal impact and delayed recognition.

programme.title: World War II in HD Colour: The Soviet Steamroller
programme.desc: Their attack on the Soviet Union having failed, the German Army suffers a series of counter-offensives on the Eastern Front. Wehrmacht's losses are huge as the Soviets advance West.

programme.title: Weapons That Changed the World
programme.desc: The Colt M1911, designed by John Moses Browning, is the 20th century's most influential pistol. Its .45 ACP cartridge made it the U.S. military's standard for 75 years. Wil Willis tests it to explore its stopping power.

programme.title: SvampeBob Firkant
programme.desc: Gratulerer med dagen! Vår kanalen har fått en 25 års logo får å feire bursdagen til vår kule favorite svamp! Her finner du eventyrene og bestrebelsene til SvampeBob Firkant og vennene hans i vann i den fiktive undervannsbyen Bikini Bunnen.

programme.title: iCarly: Restauranten
programme.desc: Gibby åpner en hemmelig restaurant i skolens kjeller med Sams hjelp. Og Spencer designer en sikkerhetsrobot til hjemmebruk, som plutselig mister fokus helt.

programme.title: iCarly: Aprilsnarr
programme.desc: I dette spesielle aprilsnarr-avsnittet blir Carly og Spencer satt på gaten, så gjengen sitter og tenker tilbake på sin tid i Bushwell Plaza. Men minnene deres stemmer kanskje ikke alltid helt med hvordan vi husker hendelsene.

programme.title: iCarly: Dårlig stemning i butikken
programme.desc: Freddies nye drømmejobb i Pear Store blir et mareritt når Sam også blir ansatt. Imens prøver Carly å bli inviteret ut av en fra Pear Store, og Spencer må melde seg til frivillig jobb på den lokale brannstasjonen.

programme.title: iCarly: Halloween
programme.desc: iCarly-gjengen holder en "Halfoween"-fest, for de syns at det skal være Halloween to ganger i året. Men da en forkledd gjest spiller Carly og vennene et puss, blir festen litt for vill.

programme.title: iCarly: Chucks lillebror
programme.desc: Et sinna barn ønsker inderlig å hevne seg, men målskiven Spencer prøver iherdig å stoppe ham. Gibby blir knust når hans nye lekelaserpistol går i stykker, men blir fra seg av henrykkelse når Freddies reparsjion gir den overraskende krefter.

programme.title: iCarly: Utestengt
programme.desc: Når Carly bannlyser T-Bo fra hennes og Spencers hjem, hevner han seg ved å ikke slippe Carly inn på Groovy Smoothie. Imens oppdager Freddie og Gibby at det fins mange fordeler ved å spille i band...og også et par ulemper.

programme.title: iCarly: Turen til Las Vegas
programme.desc: Når Sam får vite at moren hennes er i fengsel i Vegas, bestemmer gjengen seg for å ta sine mest verdifulle eiendeler, kjøre til Vegas og pantsette dem - så de får nok penger til å betale borgen for henne. Gjesteartister: History Channels PAWN STARS.

programme.title: iCarly: Nattsynbrillene
programme.desc: Sams venn kommer ut av ungdomsfengselet, og Sam advarer alle om å holde seg unna, men Carly hører ikke etter og havner på dypt vann. Hjemme i leiligheten finner Spencer noen nattsynbriller.

programme.title: iCarly: Verden er rystet del 1
programme.desc: Jimmy Fallon inviterer iCarly-gjengen til å opptre live i programmet sitt i New York. De elsker New York og er kjempeglade for å være med i programmet, men alt kan skje på live tv.

programme.title: iCarly: Verden er rystet del 2
programme.desc: Jimmy Fallon inviterer iCarly-gjengen til å opptre live i programmet sitt i New York, men en stor klesmiss fra Gibby betyr store problemer for nettshowets fremtid.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Last Days
programme.desc: Sparks fly when Joe discovers Gord has taken a job with a rival airline after completing expensive training on one of the Buffalo planes

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Push Comes to Shove
programme.desc: Trying to make his mark at Buffalo, Duane lands two more Electra contracts. But his over- zealous efforts result in a clash with the crew and with Joe, and a down-to-the-wire midnight departure to meet a deadline.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: The Doghouse
programme.desc: Duane's decision to leave the Electra crew unsupervised while he spends time at home jeopardizes the completion of a major contract, and could cost him his job.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Ice Strip
programme.desc: Mechanic Jimmy is sent to a northern mining camp to create an ice landing strip on a remote lake where AJ will have to land a DC-3 and the much bigger C-46.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Expect the Unexpected
programme.desc: Engine troubles on the C-46 during the valley run force Devan to shut down an engine. High winds wreak havoc for Devan and his crew on another C-46 mission to help clean up an oil spill in the Northwest Territories.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Coming Home
programme.desc: Rookie waterbomber pilot Scott gets his first taste of action when Buffalo responds to an emergency callout to fight fires in Alberta. Mikey and Rod think they hit the jackpot when they buy a million dollar firefighting plane on eBay at a bargain price.
