programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Allison begynner å se svevende symboler over folks hoder, tegn hun tror kan matche folk med partneren deres.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Scanlons hjemsøkende drømmer om sin avdøde bror får Allison til å bekymre seg for partneren sin.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Allison fortsetter å havne i konflikt med Scanlon når hun tror at hans avdøde bror kan være knyttet til drapet på en savnet jente.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Etter å ha fått en hudtransplantasjon på hånden, blir Allison forvirret når den samme hånden begynner å bevege seg med en egen vilje.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Når Allison ser inn i fremtiden, vokser frykten hennes når hun begynner å føle seg maktesløs til å stoppe en katastrofal hendelse fra å finne sted.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Dr. Mike and Sully return from their honeymoon to begin their new life as man and wife.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Baseball fever strikes Colorado Springs when a barnstorming all-star team comes to town.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Dr. Mike's passion for Sully leads to conflict with Colleen.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Matthew is grief-stricken as Dr. Mike tries to save his fiancée from a deadly disease.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Though an elderly patient believes the springs are helping him, Dr. Mike knows his improvements are psychological; Mike wants Sully to play Prince Charming.

programme.title: Luksusfellen Sverige
programme.desc: no info available

programme.title: Luksusfellen Sverige: Episode 3103
programme.desc: Gayles økonomi er så trang at hun ikke lenger kan sove om natten. Stresset over at sønnen hennes lider når hun må jobbe de bedre betalte helge- og dagvaktene er konstant til stede.

programme.title: Luksusfellen Sverige: Episode 3104
programme.desc: 22 år gamle Moa satte seg selv i en skikkelig dårlig økonomisk situasjon, da hun havnet i en periode hvor festing og reising ble viktigere enn å gå på jobb. Magnus drar nå til Gotland for å få orden på situasjonen.

programme.title: Luksusfellen Sverige: Episode 3105
programme.desc: Magnus drar til Gävle for å bryte 30 år gamle Daniels mønster, når det kommer til å bruke penger han ikke har. Akkurat nå er det så ille at gjelden hans hver måned er høyere enn inntekten.

programme.title: Luksusfellen Sverige: Episode 3106
programme.desc: Fembarnsfaren Martins pengebruk kjenner ingen grenser. Det meste han eier er kjøpt på kreditt, og nå har samboeren Jessica fått nok og meldt på samboeren på Luksusfellen.

programme.title: Luksusfellen Sverige: Episode 3107
programme.desc: Luksusfellen besøker Magnus som lever uten strøm i hjemmet sitt, en prioritering han har gjort de siste månedene når pengene ikke har strekt til. Ettersom det blir kaldere om natten, risikerer huset nå å få kuldeskader.

programme.title: Unga Mammor: Episode 320
programme.desc: For Fayme er dagens beste øyeblikk når pappa Moltas kommer hjem fra jobb. Da løper alle barna til pappa og Fayme kan endelig puste ut. Linn, Marcus og Tindra drar på ferie til Marcus familie.

programme.title: Unga Mammor: Episode 321
programme.desc: Linn, Marcus og Tindra drar til Brunneby Musteri. Julia og vennene hennes leker med Milan i parken, og han nyter all oppmerksomheten.

programme.title: Unga Mammor: Episode 322
programme.desc: Julia prøver å få hverdagen til å gå rundt med tre forskjellige jobber, samtidig som hun er alenemor annenhver uke. Colin, som er veldig interessert i klær, skal endelig shoppe med Fayme.

programme.title: Unga Mammor: Episode 323
programme.desc: Julia er glad for hvor raskt Milanos utvikler seg, og på søndager er det tid for en koselig kveld. Da kan ikke Julia avstå fra å gi Milan nesten alt han vil.

programme.title: Unga Mammor: Episode 324
programme.desc: Fayme og familien drar til lekeland. Natalie er nervøs når hun skal ri med sin venn.

programme.title: Unga Mammor: Episode 325
programme.desc: Julia snakker om Milanos fødsel og hvorfor barn med Downs syndrom kalles for solskinnsbarn. Natalie inviterer til Halloween-fest.

programme.title: Unga Mammor: Episode 326
programme.desc: Fayme prater om den konstante konkurransen i mammaverdenen som ingen snakker høyt om. Natalie og barna og ser på langhårede kyr som de vil kjøpe til den nye gården.

programme.title: Unga Mammor: Episode 327
programme.desc: Linn, Marcus og Tindra går rundt i Sundsvall når minnene fra terrorangrepet i Stockholm blir vekket til live.

programme.title: Unga Mammor: Episode 328
programme.desc: Linn og Tindra slår på stortromma når de feirer Marcus første farsdag. Julia drar til Stockholm med blandede følelser for å motta en pris på den årlige MAMA-gallaen.

programme.title: Unga Mammor: Episode 329
programme.desc: Linn og Marcus vil gi et søsken til Tindra, men de er ikke enige om når. Julia og Milan drar til Tivoliet i København med søsteren Maya.

programme.title: Paterson
programme.desc: Paterson er bussjåfør i byen Paterson, New Jersey - de deler navn. Stille observerer filmen dagliglivets triumfer og nederlag. Og dermed også hverdagens poesi i sine minste detaljer.

programme.title: Death of a Ladies Man
programme.desc: En sjarmerende høyskoleprofessors liv tar en rekke uante vendinger, og alle de gamle historiene får en ny vri når han begynner å se surrealistiske syner og får vite at han kanskje ikke har lenge igjen i denne verden.

programme.title: Epic Movie
programme.desc: To av de forvridde forfatterne av Scary Movie satte nå sine parodiske blikk på den største sjangeren av dem alle: Hollywoods store budsjett, spesialeffektbelastede, blockbuster-franchisefilmer.

programme.title: Tucker: The Man And His Dream
programme.desc: En bildesigner utfordrer hele bilindustrien med sine revolusjonerende bildesign.

programme.title: The Fountain
programme.desc: Hugh Jackman og Oscar®-vinneren Rachel Weisz spiller hovedrollene i regissør Darren Aronofskys tidløse fabel om en manns søken etter Livets tre.

programme.title: Legend
programme.desc: I en tidløs, mytisk skog er Jack utvalgt av skjebnen tilå redde den nydelige Prinsesse Lili og beseire dendemoniske Mørkets Fyrste. Hvis ikke kastes verden ut ievigvarende istid. Med Tom Cruise, Mia Sara og Tim Curry.

programme.title: Legal Action
programme.desc: Den dyktige advokaten Casey McKay blir hentet ut til en liten by av sin ekskone for å forsvare broren, anklaget for å ha drept en lovmann. Han oppdager et nett av intriger der han ender ansikt til ansikt med byens mest korrupte entreprenør, Mr. Gates.

programme.title: Brad's Status
programme.desc: Brad (Ben Stiller) lever et komfortabelt liv i et villastrøk i Sacramento sammen med sin godmodige kone (Jenna Fischer) og sønnen (Austin Abrams). Livet forandres da han blir gjenforent med sine gamle venner.

programme.title: Who Gets The Dog
programme.desc: Når Olive og Clay møttes var det kjærlighet ved første blikk, de giftet seg, kjøpte seg hus og adopterte en nyfødt valp - Wesley. Nå er det 6 år siden, og de har bestemt seg for å skille lag, og begge ønsker å ta sin elskede Wesley med seg.

programme.title: What If
programme.desc: Den håpløst romantiske Wallace har droppet ut av medisinstudiet og har brent seg på kjærligheten. Når han møter Chantry, som dessverre er i et forpliktende forhold til kjæresten Ben, oppstår en umiddelbar gnist mellom dem.

programme.title: Tully
programme.desc: Tully er regissert av Jason Reitman og manuset skrevet av Diablo Cody, duoen som tidligere har laget Juno og Young Adults.

programme.title: Being Mary Jane: People In Glass Houses Shouldn't Throw Fish
programme.desc: Mary Jane har middag og inviterer et gift par som hun og David var vennepar med. Hun gransker også hva hun ønsker seg av livet når hun får vite at den nye dama til David er gravis.

programme.title: Boomerang: Us Too
programme.desc: MeeToo-bevegelsen treffer blink når Marcus Graham beskyldes, noe som stenger Graham-agenturet for godt. I etterspillet trøster gjengen både Simone og dermed seg selv.

programme.title: Boomerang: Trust
programme.desc: Gjengen feirer Aris bursdag og Simone havner i konflikt når Camden dukker opp, noe som setter hennes forhold med Bryson på spill.

programme.title: Boomerang: There U Go
programme.desc: Visse tenker på sex til gjenforeningsfesten, og det blir klart hvordan alle har (eller ikke har) forandret seg siden Simone og Bryson slo opp.

programme.title: Boomerang: Love Shoulda Brought You Home
programme.desc: Gjengen gir sin versjon av hva som skjedde da Simone og Bryson slo opp. De avslører hva de syns om sine venner og lojaliteten settes på prøve.

programme.title: Games People Play: Persons of Interests
programme.desc: Loomis ser konstabel Cooper ved et vipers-spill. Cooper skal levere sikkerhetsvideoen fra krangelen mellom Vanessa og Kalinda. Hun har den fremdeles og kan gi den for å beholde arbeidet sitt. Hun overleverer den og får så sparken.

programme.title: Games People Play: A Wing and A Prayer
programme.desc: Laila befinner seg i en farlig situasjon. MJ hører rykter om at noen lekker info om Kings. Siden familien trues, bestemmer Vanessa seg for å skride til handling.

programme.title: Games People Play: The Bitch is Back
programme.desc: Laila gjemmer seg, ute av stand til å tilbringe natten alene. Vanessa kjøper motvillig en ny mobil til Laila, og får snart vite at Susie Q er død. Vanessa tvinges til å trøste henne tross at hun ikke holder henne ut.

programme.title: Doc Martin: Episode 505
programme.desc: PC Penhale er sjokkert over den uventede ankomsten av sin ekskone Maggie, som ser ut til å ha glemt at de skilte seg for flere år siden, og vil vite hvorfor han gikk fra henne.

programme.title: Doc Martin: Episode 506
programme.desc: Maggie får klarsignal fra legen og bestemmer seg for at hun skal tilbake til Bude, noe som tvinger PC Penhale til å ty til desperate tiltak for å overtale henne til å bli i Portwenn.

programme.title: Doc Martin: Episode 507
programme.desc: Bert Large restaurantvirksomhet er i økonomiske problemer. Han har ikke engang råd til mat og drikke til et veldedighetsarrangement for å samle inn penger til Florence Dingles kattereservat.

programme.title: Doc Martin: Episode 508
programme.desc: Fru Tishell bestemmer seg for at hun ikke lenger kan skjule sin kjærlighet til Martin, og tyr til drastiske grep.

programme.title: Doc Martin: Episode 601
programme.desc: Portwenn er opptatt med å forberede bryllupet til Doc og Louisa. Ruth har problemer med å ta passe på James, og så går strømmen...

programme.title: Honest Thief
programme.desc: Bankraneren Tom forsøker å legge sin kriminelle fortid på hylla. Men da han innser at FBI er mer korrupte enn ham blir det en hard kamp for å renvaske navnet sitt.

programme.title: Fortress: Sniper's Eye
programme.desc: Den pensjonerte CIA-agenten Robert legger ut på en dristig redningsaksjon av erkefiendens enke, Sasha. Men snart blir Robert konfrontert med et kjent ansikt han trodde han aldri ville se igjen...

programme.title: Till Death
programme.desc: Etter en romantisk kveld i deres avsidesliggende hus, våkner Emma opp lenket til sin døde ektemann. Hun er fanget og isolert og må kjempe mot leiemordere for å unnslippe ektemannens avsindige plan.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: The Dallas Mavericks
programme.desc: Military-grade Tomahawk cruise missile jet engine; century-old handcrafted wild west cowboy saddle; 1960s high roller's gold money.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Gold 'n' Gloves
programme.desc: The Auction Hunters team goes toe-to-toe with Ton's evil twin! They find a medieval catapult designed for storming castles and Ton uncovers a hidden collection of gold bars worth thousands of dollars!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: The Big Score
programme.desc: At a climate-controlled storage facility in downtown L.A., Allen and Ton's locker wins score them an antique cash register and a German H&K pistol prized by collectors.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: The Wild West
programme.desc: Allen and Ton explain their strategies at a storage auction in San Bernardino, win two units, then have a Pepperbox gun and vintage Lionel train set appraised by experts.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Great American Cashtime
programme.desc: Rare 1950s Master Pitch baseball machine; 1980s Jaws of Life tool used by rescuers to pry open cars.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Weapons of Past Destruction
programme.desc: Knowing that Hollywood auctions are hit-and-miss, Allen and Ton buy inexpensive lockers that contain a polygraph machine, a samurai sword and a pair of Civil War shotguns.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Cold Hard Cash
programme.desc: Ton and Allen go North to Alaska and get a cold reception from the local auctioneer. They find two enormous seaplane pontoons and a pair of Smith & Wesson revolvers, including the most powerful production handgun in the world!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Sin City Shootout
programme.desc: 1953 Chevy-inspired bumper car; scores of M16 30-round magazines; reproduction 1940s boardwalk photobooth; aerosol-powered spud gun potato launchers.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Shuffle
programme.desc: Ton and Allen teach a cocky new auction hunter a lesson. They spot a 1940's-era shuffleboard table and uncover an early hot rod made from the fuel tank of a WWII fighter plane!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Top Gun Ton
programme.desc: Scale RC Viper FanJet aircraft with a potent jet engine; 1920s Gundlach Korona large format field camera used for photography expeditions. Ton pilots a plane, but crashes and burns.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Battle Bought
programme.desc: Mint 1800s French "Harmonica Pistol" and a collection of '90s remote controlled combat robots.

programme.title: The Winter Palace
programme.desc: En forfatter med et alvorlig tilfelle av skrivesperre, får sjansen til å fullføre boken sin på et tomt vinterslott.

programme.title: A Country Christmas Harmony
programme.desc: Ekskjærestene Luke og Chrissy, tidligere en countrymusikkduo, støter på hverandre år etter at Chrissy forlot Luke sporløst - og innser at de bare kan komme seg gjennom ferien med hverandres hjelp.

programme.title: How Sarah Got Her Wings
programme.desc: Den barmhjertige samaritanen Sarah Fitzpatrick dør i en ulykke rett før jul, og befinner seg plutselig ved himmelporten. Hun er sikker på at hun kommer inn, men navnet hennes står ikke på listen.

programme.title: A Star For Christmas

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Night of the Meek

programme.desc: A man who can change his face to resemble others gets into hot water with gangsters.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: A mass poisoning at a cult compound leads the FBI team into a maze of old grudges and a complex murder plot.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: While investigating the murder of a rap star, the team uncovers a conspiracy of embezzlement and bribery which may be connected to his death. Meanwhile, Charlie prepares to meet Amita's parents for the first time.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: Don and Charlie find themselves in conflict over their differing beliefs as they investigate a case involving national security. Meanwhile, Megan faces a crisis of conscience and leaves the team, on the fourth season finale.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: Don and the team hunt down the killers of two rock climbers in possession of a stolen diamond, while Charlie decides if he should get his FBI clearance reinstated and a new agent joins the team, on the fifth season premiere.

programme.title: Numb3rs

programme.title: Grantchester

programme.desc: Etter at Dragon har blitt bedratt av sin egen bror, Tiger, står de to som representanter for rivaliserende skoler i den årlige løvedansekonkurransen. Selv om Tiger vinner, blir han tvunget til eksil av skammen over å ha sveket sine egne.

programme.title: Winners and Sinners NO
programme.desc: Fem gode venner blir løslatt fra fengsel, fast bestemt på å leve lovlydige liv fra nå av. Sammen starter de et rengjøringsfirma, og starten på deres nye liv er et faktum. Men samme dag løslates også en sjette fange som har en motsatt plan.

programme.title: Armor of God 2: Operation Condor NO
programme.desc: Eventyreren i Jackie Chans skikkelse er tilbake i en ny jakt etter en bortgjemt skatt, skjult i ørkenen av nazistene før andre verdenskrig. Men Jackie og kompanjongen hans Ada er ikke de eneste som leter etter skatten...

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model
programme.desc: Based on the hit US reality show America's Next Top Model this UK version presented by Lisa Snowdon follows the latest group of hopefuls through their journey to becoming Britain's newest 'Top Model'.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: A chauvinistic coach doesn't want a female wide receiver on his junior-high football team.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Mark's friend is running for public office, and he's a very honest man. But things get out of hand when an opponent tries to win by going after his son.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Jonathan helps Commander Michaels to deal with flashbacks of Vietnam; he also tries to convince her to go to therapy. Mark deals with his fear of flying.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: A veterans' support group becomes a lifeline for Commander Michaels, who continues to deal with post-traumatic stress disorder. Meanwhile, she discovers that her son David came into the emergency room due to an accident.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: A pastor must follow a church council's decision to fire most of the staff at the school because they're not Christian.

programme.title: Ex On The Beach
programme.desc: Ash og Talitha har så vidt rukket å slå opp før han kliner med Chloe. Shelby og Ross kommer nærmere hverandre når de overnatter på en kirkegård. Vicky eks kommer, som hun har gruet seg til, og alt tar av på stranden.

programme.title: Ex On The Beach
programme.desc: Når Vickys andre eks, Ricci, dukker opp, deles gruppa. Ash klikker på Liam med alvorlige konsekvenser. Dan truer med å klikke på Ricci, og Ricci og Vicky prøver på å få en slags avslutning med liten suksess.

programme.title: Ex On The Beach: Zahida Wages War
programme.desc: Åtte sexy single folk oppdager at drømmen om sommerkjærlighet blir til et mareritt når flere ekser kommer for å skape kaos. Zahida kriger med Maisie om Sean, men det er når den første eksen ankommer at det virkelige blodbadet skjer.

programme.title: Ex On The Beach: A Sea Of Tears
programme.desc: Det koker i villaen når ikke bare en, men tre ekser ankommer og skaper kaos for turtelduene Ross og Harriette. Zahidas eks Joe mister kontrollen og Alex truer med å drukne seg i tårer.

programme.title: Ex On The Beach: Harriette's Love Triangle
programme.desc: Singlenes elendighet fortsetter når Sean hopper fra Zahida til Zaralena, og Harriettes kjærlighetstrekant blir verre. Maisie vil at noe skal skje og Aaron fra Geordie Shore gjør spektakulær entré, men hvem av eksene er hans?

programme.title: Ex On The Beach: Nicole's Nightmare
programme.desc: Det blir spent i villaen når Zaralena får kjenne på Zahidas vrede. Den nye eksen får gutta til å oppføre seg eiersyke. Josh har et godt øye til Nicole, men tar det slutt når hun oppdager en grusom hemmelighet?

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The chefs take on a shrimp challenge in which one hopeful makes a grave error, before a tough opening service for both teams. With Lisa Vanderpump and Wayne Brady in the VIP booths, the pressure is on.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The day begins with a Caesar salad challenge. As service begins, Olympic gold medallist Apolo Ohno and NFL star Marshall Faulk take the VIP seats.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: Trouble brews in the Red team, with Amber questioning their choice of head chef. The challenge sees the teams tackling a reception for newlyweds, before a difficult service.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The teams are tasked with creating Mexican dishes, but only one can enjoy a treat, with the others having to clean out the animal pens. Later, a shock is in store at service.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The teams are challenged to put a twist on some classic Italian dishes, with a top reward for the winning group and a morale-sapping punishment for the losers.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The chefs pair up and taste dishes containing both a land and sea element; the team who identifies all proteins correctly, with the fastest time, wins.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: Gjenforeningen
programme.desc: Walker og Trivette får hjelp fra en legendarisk Texas Ranger, som har vendt tilbake for å få rettferdighet for sin drepte sønn, når de skal spore opp en leiemorder som har en amerikansk senator i siktet.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: Stjålet vuggevise
programme.desc: Walker etterforsker påstanden til en kvinne hvis spedbarn har blitt kidnappet. Etterforskningen leder dem til et barnemeglerbyrå som har stjålet spedbarn og gjennomført ulovlige adopsjoner.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: Æresmedalje
programme.desc: Walker og Trivette strever med å bevise at en arrestasjon var rasistisk motivert.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: Merket
programme.desc: En offentlig inspektør blir trampet i hjel av kveg. Walker foretar sin egen inspeksjon.

programme.title: MTV Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Rob Dyrdek styrer serien, som inneholder klipp fra nettet, samt har kjendisgjester og medprogramledere som Sterling «Steelo», Madison Beer og danske Nina Agdal. Nye episoder hver onsdag.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Matt Schlager
programme.desc: Skjønnhetsdronningen Caite Upton er med i panelet, Matt Schlager viser hvordan man faller med ansiktet først, og du får se klippene Inappropriate Animals, Misfires And False Starts og Yoga Fart.

programme.title: Teen Mom
programme.desc: Tenåringsmoren Maci vurderer å slå opp med forloveden Ryan. Farrah dater en ny gutt, selv om familien misliker det. Amber strever med utdanningen, og Catelynn føler at forholdet til datteren er blitt svekket etter adopsjonen.

programme.title: Teen Mom
programme.desc: Catelynns familie liker ikke adopsjonsvalget. Amber og forloveden Gary krangler konstant. Farrah oppdager at dating ikke vanskelig for en ung mor, og Maci sliter med å balansere morsrollen og studiene når vennene begynner på college.

programme.title: Teen Mom
programme.desc: Konflikten mellom Amber og Gary når kokepunktet, og Catelynn leter etter et nytt sted å bo når moren hennes flytter. Nysingle Maci skifter mening, og guttegale Farrah ønsker beskyttelse.

programme.title: Teen Mom
programme.desc: Catelynn takler valget om adopsjon på en utflukt med andre mødre, og Maci og Ryan besøker en rådgiver. Amber vurderer å takke ja til hjelp fra eksen, og Farrah lurer på om hun burde være mer hjemme med barnet sitt.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant
programme.desc: Strandjenta Jennelle fra North Carolina elsker å feste, men må innse at kjæresten ikke kommer tilbake og at hun er for umoden til å ta seg av et barn alene.

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 302
programme.desc: Louise og Michael har vokst ut av sin lille leilighet i Århus og trenger mer plass. Paret gjør et kompromiss, og Louise står overfor sitt største mareritt i huset som ekspertene kjøper til dem.

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 303
programme.desc: Charlotte og Mikkel bor i en så liten leilighet at dusjen må tømmes for ting hver gang de skal bade. Men nå ønsker de å flytte litt ut av byen sammen med sønnen deres.

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 304
programme.desc: Pernille og Nicklas fra Odense bor så lite at hvis de trenger litt privatliv, så har de bare toalettet å ty til. Nicklas drømmer om å få et kjøkken med to ovner, slik at han kan lage mer mat.

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 305
programme.desc: Wendy og Jesper fra Kalundborg bor allerede bra, i en leilighet som har en utrolig utsikt. Men en kommende familieforøkelse betyr at de må finne noe som er større.

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 306
programme.desc: Jonas og Louise får sjokk når de ser hvilke hus de har råd til. Mads Mikkelsen og Tobias Edlev Nielsen jobber overtid for å prøve å oppfylle parets ønsker.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Höganäs
programme.desc: The wild coast at Kullaberg in Skåne has a lot of culture and gastronomy to offer. Fantastic ceramics, vineyards and world-class ice cream. Tareq visits VikenTomater and cooks vegetarian ragù

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Karlstad
programme.desc: Tareq visits sunny Karlstad! Here, food is prepared by Vänern's shores and in Värmland's deep forests. Butter-fried Zander, crepes and cooking over an open fire are on the menu.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Best Of (Part 2)
programme.desc: Once again, Tareq Taylor looks back on some of the food adventures he has been part of in the program series Nordic Cookery. Tareq promises delicacies from all over the Nordics and meetings with fantastic people along the way.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Lund
programme.desc: In this episode, Tareq visits Lund, a thousand-year old city in southern Sweden. Lund is surrounded by the richest farmland in the country, and we explore nearby islands and meet entrepreneurs making highly-regarded local products.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Bornholm
programme.desc: Tareq sails out to Bornholm, a Danish island close to southern tip of Sweden. The islanders are fiercely self-sufficient and this attitude reflects in the huge number of food producers making products that are sold both locally and internationally.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Jokkmokk
programme.desc: Far above the Arctic Circle, Tareq explores the wild country around Jokkmokk. Here, the Sami people lived from what the land provides for thousands of years. This wild cuisine is as extreme as the weather here.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Åland
programme.desc: For hundreds of years, Åland’s shipping fleet was the envy of navies around the world, and their sea trade was encouraged by the seafood, grains and fruits that thrive on these islands. Tareq prepares recipes to reflect Åland’s unique cuisine.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Malmö
programme.desc: Tareq is in his hometown of Malmö – Sweden’s third largest city. The food scene here is inspired by the traditional seafood dishes and the large immigrant population whose recipes have given Malmö a new energy.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 202
programme.desc: I dagens episode møter vi bl.a. Pernille, som føler seg fanget i sitt eget hjem, og Linda, som er så hemmet av et arr på magen at hun møter opp tidlig på jobb for å unngå å skifte med andre.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 902
programme.desc: Etter en brystoperasjon har Samantha tunge, smertefulle bryster og et skrantende forhold.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 609
programme.desc: For 21 år siden havnet Allan i en voldsom sykkelulykke. Allan er merket for livet, og til tross for flere operasjoner sitter han igjen med arr i ansiktet.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 306
programme.desc: Vi møter Jeanette, som føler seg som en forsøkskanin etter en rekke mislykkede operasjoner. Maria måtte fjerne implantatene sine, og er nå uten bryster. Shahin har smerter etter en ansiktsløftning.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 311
programme.desc: I denne episoden møter vi bl.a. Maria, som etter 11 operasjoner har fått det hun kaller verdens styggeste bryster. Rose fikk en bredere nese etter at hun opererte den.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Gary's Big Reveal
programme.desc: Det er de nyes første morgen i huset, men hvordan skal familien samles, når Holly, Kyle og Charlotte er vekk? Holly åpner sitt hjerte for Kyle, men føler han det samme? En overraskende avsløring fra Gary knuser Charlottes hjerte.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Charlotte's Broken Heart
programme.desc: Det er dagen Charlotte har fryktet. Gary introduserer sin nye kjæreste for familien men vil Psycho Charlotte dukke opp? Imens blir Marnie og Aaron mere og mere fristet av hverandres flørting.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: King Nathan
programme.desc: Når Anna forteller Geordiene at hun har jobb til dem i et annet land, blir alle heltent! Helt til de havner på en campingplass i Wales. Marnie vil få fortalt Aaron noen sannhetens ord, noe som fører til at de ender i senga sammen.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Holly's Big Decision
programme.desc: Hamburg skal få oppleve en ekte Tash-On Tours-tilstelning, men er de klare for at Marnie hopper på Aaron? Holly er paranoid når det gjelder ikke-forholdet til Kyle og Chloe og Nathan kommer, til alles forundring, nærmere hverandre.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Chloe's Big Meltdown
programme.desc: Den nye Chloe møter psykopat-Charlotte da en helaften går på skeive, og Hollys ankomst får en bitter ettersmak når hun hører den egentlige grunnen til hvorfor Kyle ikke vil være sammen med henne. Er det slutt nå?

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Creepin'
programme.desc: Angelina ber jentene om unnskyldning. Mike, Vinny og Pauly leker med granater i boblebadet, og Ron fortsatt har hemmeligheter for Sammi.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Breaking Up
programme.desc: Sammi og Ronnie har problemer, og Sammi prøver å slå opp, men tar Ronnie tilbake etter 5 minutter. Jentene legger en plan for å fortelle Sammi sannheten om kjæresten.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: The Letter
programme.desc: Sammi finner det 'anonyme' brevet fra Snooki og Jenni, og nå er det virkelig slutt - i hvert fall en stund. Mike, Vinny og Pauly har hendene fulle med fire jenter på én kveld.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Not So Shore
programme.desc: Det anonyme brevet skaper spenning mellom jentene, og det ender i slåsskamp. Etter enda en natt med Vinny avslører Snooki en ikke så lite kjent 'hemmelighet'.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Sleeping with the Enemy
programme.desc: Gjengen må takle konsekvensene av jentenes krangel. Angelina dater Jose fra klubben, og Jenni og Snooki kler seg i hjemmelagde beskyttelsesdrakter for å rydde opp før Snookis date.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: All in the Family
programme.desc: Mike truer med å fortelle Jose om Angelina og Vinny. Vinnys familie kommer på besøk. Og Vinny og Pauly finner drømmejentene, men en vil få knust hjertet sitt.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Episode 3
programme.desc: Treningsleiren er i gang! De nye kandidatene er spente, og kanskje fulle av beundring, når de treffer veteranene for første gang på Valley Ranch.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Episode 4
programme.desc: Etter bare to uker på treningsleiren må noen elimineres. Men først skal jentene prøve draktene. Det er et bittersøtt øyeblikk for nykommerne siden de ennå ikke har gjort seg fortjent til dem.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Episode 5
programme.desc: Etter å ha tatt farvel med en av sine egne, forstår de resterende treningsleir-kandidatene at ingens posisjon på troppen er sikker. Kitty Carter blir bedt om å jobbe med de svakeste jentene og piske dem i form.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Episode 6
programme.desc: Hele troppen trenger en oppvekker og det skal de få av gjestekoreograf Kitty Carter. Hun leder gruppen gjennom en knallhard danseøvelse som gjør noen av jentene til emosjonelle vrak. Så er det tid for en leksjon i DCCs etikette.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Episode 7
programme.desc: Noen drømmer går i oppfyllelse når de gjenværende heldige treningsleir-kandidatene står modell i den ikoniske Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders-drakten under en sexy fotoseanse.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Episode 8
programme.desc: Flere kan miste plassen på laget, og det er bare to øvelser igjen. Jentene drar på seg de berømte hvite cowboy-støvlene for første gang. Så skal Judy og Megan Fox bedømme deres endelige danserutiner.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Episode 1
programme.desc: Seks hundre nervøse og spente Dallas Cowboys Cheerleader-aspiranter ankommer et hotell til de første uttakene. Hver deltaker får mindre enn to minutter på seg til å utføre en freestyle-danserutine foran dommerne.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Episode 2
programme.desc: I det endelige uttaket er det bare de sterkeste som overlever. DCC-aspirantene må nå konkurrere mot veteranene om en plass på treningsleiren.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Opie & Flirt
programme.desc: Black lab mix Opie is a charmer around people, but frighteningly aggressive around other dogs. Energetic to the point of being neurotic, Chinese Crested Flirt cannot sit still for one moment.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Rana & Ruby
programme.desc: Scared of everything, Ruby the Vischla deals with her neuroses by biting. At the same time, Rana barks every time bread pops in the toaster, or when the microwave goes off, or when the phone rings.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Josh & Boomer
programme.desc: Josh, a Maltese, will not let anyone with a brush or pair of scissors near him without putting up a fight. Boomer, a Chesapeake Bay Retriever, barks incessantly and refuses to come out of the pool.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Harry & Brooks
programme.desc: Harry wants to charge after anything with wheels, including passing cyclists, rollerbladers or skateboarders. Brooks, an Entlebucher, is constantly chasing after light, he is never calm.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Coach & Sueki
programme.desc: Coach, an out of control Boxer, bit a neighbor, seemingly sealing his fate. Coach gets a stay of execution when Cesar Millan comes to the rescue. Sueki refuses to walk on the leash.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Slick & Pepper
programme.desc: Slick, a rare white Puli, is full of phobias. When clients come to Christopher’s photography studio, they are greeted by Pepper’s annoying barking and heel nipping.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Ava & Gus
programme.desc: Ava, a Pug/Pekingese swiftly twirls for all occasions, possibly a neurological condition Cesar cannot treat. Gus the Bouvier greets people by throwing his 100 pound body at them.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Maya & Churchill
programme.desc: Churchill the Rottweiler is a well mannered dog, except when around other animals. Meanwhile, Maya, an affable Pit Bull, insists on being intimately involved in all operations of the household.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Bubba & Garrett
programme.desc: Heidi Wasserman inherited Bubba, a spoiled Maltese that demands to be taken everywhere and nips at anyone who tries to leave. Garrett, a German Shepherd, chases his tail, obsessively.

programme.title: MacGyver: High Control
programme.desc: MacGyver infiltrates a criminal biker gang to help prove a parolee's innocence.

programme.title: MacGyver: There But For The Grace

programme.title: MacGyver: Bind Faith

programme.title: MacGyver: Faith, Hope & Charity
programme.desc: MacGyver is drawn into a mobster's search for stolen loot while nursing his injured leg at a country bed and breakfast run by two elderly sisters.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: Willie institutes a "no-tech week" when he feels his children spend too much time on their phones, but has difficulty participating in his own program; the guys attempt to stop a lice outbreak at Duck Commander.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: Willie and Jase compete against each other to become president of their neighborhood homeowner association; Jep, Jess and Miss Kay work on a Duck Commander-themed display for the local zoo.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: The guys have fun with a 3-D printer until they come to the realization that the machine could soon replace their jobs; Si invests in John Luke's snow cone stand after Willie doesn't give him a raise.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: Jase, Jep, Si and Cole battle a growing population of cottonmouth snakes on Phil's property; Willie uses his business expertise to help Rebecca improve her clothing store.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: Little Will decides to buy a motorcycle instead of a car after Willie puts him on a budget; Jase and the guys get inspiration to design a revolutionary duck-hunting product involving zip lines.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: With many of the wives and children in Africa performing charity work, Willie and Jase have a debate over tracking ability; Jase and Si are challenged to track and capture Willie and Jep.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: Willie and Jep step in to supervise Bella's sleepover while Korie is away in Africa; Jase takes Si, Martin and Godwin for a round of night golf.

programme.desc: An unexpected tip leads to a surprising finish in the search for a fugitive who managed to elude the police only days earlier.

programme.desc: When Dog gives a drug addict a second chance, the man flees on his way to rehab.

programme.title: Jade Fever

programme.title: Jade Fever

programme.desc: Claudia og teamet er fast bestemt på å fortsette gruvedriften til tross for skogbranner som herjer rundt området deres, inntil situasjonen forverres og de må evakuere.

programme.title: Jade Fever

programme.title: Jade Fever

programme.desc: Bat is forced to hang Dal who he believes is innocent. Dal has been framed by the White Cap vigilantes and Earp wants to stop them.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LXIII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' hogger Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood ned trær med noen 'Tømmerflopper', får seg noen 'Luftige-svev-madrasser' og har det kjempekult på 'Rockeførskolen'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LXIV
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' havner Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood i 'Faresoner', avklarer ulike situasjoner av 'Glassknas' og oppnår betydelig høyde med 'Flygebiler'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LXV
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' møter Rob, Steelo og gjestevert Lolo Wood ufokuserte fedre med 'Distraherte pappahjerner', driver høyt spill i golf med 'Djerv gjenvinning' og viser sine fiseferdigheter når de utfører 'Gasstriks'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LXVI
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' oppsummerer Rob, Steelo og gjestevert Lolo Wood kostnadene ved å ha barn i 'Dyre barn', snubler over sirkusartister som lager 'Plutselig sirkus' og opplever slitsomme feiringer med 'Dårlige bursdager'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LXVII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' denger Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood hodet i veggen som første trekk i 'Kraftskaller', ødelegger golfutstyret sitt i 'På tide med nye køller' og møter farene ved å benytte 'Samkjøring om natten'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LXVIII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' utforsker Rob Dyrdek, Steelo Brim og Lolo Wood ildidrettens verden i 'Flammesport', finner ut hvor farlige dører kan være i 'Helt av hengslene' og blir overrasket over noen svært 'Uventede raketter'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LXIX
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' krasjer Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood inn i ubevegelige gjenstander i 'Parkert smerte', oppdager at trafikkflyten kan påvirkes av bisarre årsaker i 'Motorveiforsinkelser' og opplever farene ved 'Olme okser'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LXX
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' støter Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood på farlige voltere uten 'Saltobevissthet', opplever smerten ved knuste tohjulinger i Billigsykler' og oppdager at heis og fyll ikke går så godt sammen i 'Heisa-heistur'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LXXI
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' prøver Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood å muntre opp folk som er 'Vinterdeppa', finner ut hva som skjer når du faller og opplever 'Fjes mot gjerde' og ødelegger perfekte øyeblikk med 'Triste forlovelsesopptak'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' lider Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood av 'Konsertforvirring', får smaken på 'Søvnsnacks' og flykter fra noen 'Hissige sammenstøt'.

programme.title: Andromeda: Honningstilbudet
programme.desc: Dylan prøver å bringe fred til to forskjellige Nietzschean-stolthetspunkter ved å eskortere prinsesse til den ene til hennes arrangerte ekteskap med prinsen til den andre

programme.title: Andromeda: Stjernekryss
programme.desc: Rommies avatar blir forelsket i det som viser seg å være avataren til et krigsskip ved navn Gabriel. Gabriel prøver å smitte Rommie med et virus som sender planene sine til krigsskipet

programme.title: Andromeda: Hjertet av reisen (del 1)
programme.desc: Beka tar Andromeda til Tarn-Vedra, men lengre tid i slipstream forårsaker bivirkninger. For å bekjempe dem, begynner Beka å ta Flash og blir snart avhengig.

programme.title: Andromeda: Dens time kommer 'Runde endelig
programme.desc: Et gammelt minne fra Andromeda aktiveres ved et uhell, noe som sender henne på oppdrag og etterlater Dylan ved siden av mannskapet ikke i stand til å overstyre kommandoen.

programme.title: Andromeda: The Widinging Gyre
programme.desc: Dylan og Rommie må redde Tyr, Harper og Rev fra et Magog-verdensskip.

programme.title: Andromeda: Utgangsstrategier
programme.desc: Dylan, Beka, Rev og Tyr krasjer land etter å ha rømt en gjeng Nietzscheans, men møter snart en ny trussel: Revs behov for å mate..

programme.title: Forensic Files: Pressed for Crime
programme.desc: Several suspects and conflicting evidence complicated a brutal murder investigation. But the forensics were clear on one thing: the killer knew his victim, and that alone gave investigators a head start.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Finger Pane
programme.desc: A serial killer was on the loose and police had to find him before he struck again. Their most promising lead was an unusual one: a bloody fingerprint on the body of one of the victims.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Good as Gold
programme.desc: On Halloween night 2004, Adriane Insogna and Leslie Mazzara were brutally murdered in their Napa, California home.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Freedom Fighter
programme.desc: After the suspect was convicted of arson and murder, he maintained his innocence. He turned to law books in the prison library and set out to prove his innocence.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dog Day Afternoon
programme.desc: A woman was brutally murdered in her home and the only witnesses to the crime were the family dogs. An expert in canine behavior was convinced the killer knew both the victim and the animals, and he was determined find out what the dogs had seen.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shattered Innocence
programme.desc: This killer probably hoped to cover his tracks by staging the crime scene. But investigators saw through the attempt almost immediately and turned to forensic science to learn what really happened that night.

programme.title: Forensic Files: All Butt Certain
programme.desc: A 6-year-old girl ran and hid when she saw her grandmother being beaten to death, but the man followed, beat and assaulted her. She said the assailant was her uncle, who was later convicted. She recanted her testimony years later.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Jean Pool
programme.desc: In 1984, the body of college student Laura Salmon was found on a Middle Tennessee farm, covered with her own denim jeans as well as the jeans of the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Traffic Violations
programme.desc: The body of a young woman was found a mile from her abandoned car. Police were especially concerned when they realized the victim had come to them for protection just two weeks earlier after a road rage incident.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Brotherly Love
programme.desc: In 1969, 25-year-old phone operator Diane Maxwell was raped and murdered. Her brother promised he'd find out who was responsible and bring the killer to justice.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Disrobed
programme.desc: The crime scene was especially violent: a husband and wife had been shot to death in their bedroom. Was their 16-year-old daughter complicit?

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries: Episode 4
programme.desc: This episode includes: Zel's Odyssey (Pts. 1 & 2), Wally's Hidden River, UD: DJ Death and Looking for Christopher & UD.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries: Episode 5
programme.desc: This episode includes: Robin Hood Rabbi & UD, Missing In-Laws & UD, To Madame with Love and Deadly Dumpster

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries: Episode 6
programme.desc: This episode includes: Lake Wales Haunting (Pts. 1 & 2), Bomb Shelter Friends & UD, Murder in Agawam, UD: Surprise Sister and Down to the Wire.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries: Episode 7
programme.desc: This episode includes: Fatima (Pts. 1, 2 & 3), Log Cabin Fraud & UD, UD: If the Truth Be Known and Missing Cheek.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries: Episode 8
programme.desc: This episode includes: Kidnapped Executive, Hansen Twin Murder (Pts. 1 & 2) and NATO Soldier's Dad.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Dead Run
programme.desc: In Pennsylvania, an inmate escaped with the help of his female accomplice. Following a trail of fraudulent credit card receipts and deaths, authorities track the pair, but always find themselves one step behind.

programme.title: The FBI Files: First and Kennedy Street Crew
programme.desc: In the early 1990's, Washington, D.C., became the murder capital of the nation. Few were left untouched by gang violence, which was ignited by the drug trade. By 1994, that violence would strike at the very heart of law enforcement.

programme.title: The FBI Files: The Coffee Shop Murders
programme.desc: At a coffee shop in Washington, DC, three employees were shot to death. Evidence at the crime scene pointed in many different directions. Was this a hate crime, a robbery gone wrong or an act of cold-blooded vengeance?

programme.title: The FBI Files: Dishonored
programme.desc: Shirley Russell was determined enough to reach the rank of Captain in the United States Marine Corps. When this officer turned up missing, her colleagues refused to believe she had gone AWOL. It was unclear whether Captain Shirley Russell was alive.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Evil Intent
programme.desc: Drops of blood and a torn screen were all that's left to tell authorities what happened to a woman in Indiana. The 21 yr. old victim was taken from her home on a spring morning. She appeared to have no real enemies, there was no clear motive.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Fateful Twist
programme.desc: A southeastern Virginia community is stunned by a crime no one can believe. A pregnant woman murdered, her baby lost. Across the state, another town feels a similar shock, a brutal, random slaying in a most unexpected setting.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Scent Of The Kill
programme.desc: A dog can be a dead man's best friend. Dogs have been trained to sniff out corpses, drugs, explosives, and missing persons. They're often the first to find the essential clue that sets an investigation in motion.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Dead Wrong
programme.desc: Hiding a body can be difficult; it's sometimes easier to obscure or disguise the circumstances of the death, turning murder into suicide, or pinning the blame on someone else. The truth is told through subtle clues taken from the crime scene.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Vanished
programme.desc: In New York, an ambitious college student has her whole life ahead of her, until she crosses the path of a killer. It's a random murder, the hardest kind to solve.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Tainted Blood
programme.desc: The forces of nature can reduce a body to bones in a matter of weeks. Using a unique combination of art and science, forensic anthropologists give victims a face long after they have been forgotten.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Lockdown: Norris Green Mansion Part 2
programme.desc: Ghost Dimension's Bex and Sean investigate Norris Green Mansion. A 17th Century building, which is believed to hold some of the most haunted spirits in Liverpool. Will they make contact its ghostly entities tonight?

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Lockdown: Soul Less House of Ghosts - Part 1
programme.desc: Bex and Sean are joined by a special guest as they investigate an abandoned home full of spirits in Liverpool.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Lockdown: Soul Less House of Ghosts - Part 2
programme.desc: Ghost Dimension encounter something paranormal in this exclusive unseen footage from their invetsigation of the Soul Less House in Liverpool.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension
programme.desc: Sean and Bex begin their chilling investigation at the historic Clifton Hall Masonic Temple. Hidden behind closed doors for over a century, this sacred space holds more than just ritual secrets. They explore the eerie corridors and lodge rooms.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension
programme.desc: The investigation continues as Bex and Sean split up to face the darkness alone inside Clifton Hall. From intelligent knocking and voices to the chilling sound of a child and unseen footsteps on the carpet.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension
programme.desc: In a church reborn as a gym, something old still lingers in the shadows. Sean and Bex investigate Dream Body Gym inside the former Manor Church — where whispers echo through stairwells, music box melodies drift through empty rooms.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: 16-Year-Old Surrogate Stole Our Baby
programme.desc: Sarah was Dawn and Derek's surrogate, but took off while five months pregnant. Sarah claims that they took advantage of her. Who are the baby's rightful parents?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: She's a Crazy Stalker
programme.desc: Victor met Jasmine a few years ago but claimed they never had sex. Jasmine claims that they fell in love and want him back! Who's telling the truth?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: These DNA Results Will Floor You
programme.desc: Joe met “Jessica” on a phone chat line. A few months later, she revealed she was pregnant. Then, Chastity claims that her ex Trent fathered her child. What will the DNA results reveal?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: I Punch a Woman like I Punch a Man
programme.desc: Chelse claims that her 19-month-old daughter is Malcolm's and that he beat her while pregnant. Amber and Phillip accuse each other of being abusive and want the polygraph tests to prove their claims!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: I Slept Around: Who's the Dad?
programme.desc: Tasha wants to prove to her ex Martin that he fathered her four-year-old. Martin's sister says that the child might belong to her boyfriend Terrence. Who's the real father?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Bullied Out of School
programme.desc: Aabrea and Jerae bullied a high school girl so badly that she dropped out. Can Steve help them resolve their differences and figure out why so many teens turn to bullying?

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Blood From A Stone
programme.desc: A bystander receives a deadly head injury during a roadside altercation, but the stakes are raised when his body disappears from the scene. When a toddler is kidnapped for ransom Kenda joins forces with an undercover team in a desperate race against time.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Eyes of a Child
programme.desc: A loving, churchgoing grandmother is found stabbed to death in her apartment, leaving Joe Kenda to wonder what sort of monster could do such a thing.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: City Of Fear
programme.desc: When a spate of violent robberies spreads terror across the city, Kenda and the major crimes unit are called in to bring the masked gunman to justice.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: The Setup
programme.desc: Douglas Warren stumbles into a downtown bar with a gunshot wound to the neck and bleeds out on the floor. Kenda must conduct a risky sting operation and launch an interstate manhunt.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Dead Weight
programme.desc: A seemingly random attack leaves Mary Moebus dead, and police flummoxed by a daunting field of suspects. But when Lt Joe Kenda uncovers a cache of new evidence, he realizes someone’s been lying.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner
programme.desc: Police make a grisly discovery: a woman’s battered and dead body. With little evidence and no witnesses, Dr. G must identify the body and determine the cause of death to catch her killer.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner
programme.desc: A neighbor hears odd sounds coming from the next apartment. When the police arrive, they find a man bruised and dead. When all signs point to foul play, it’s up to Dr. G to find proof of murder.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner
programme.desc: It’s up to Dr. G to determine if alcohol was to blame for a man's death or if there was a silent killer lurking in his body.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner
programme.desc: Parents rush their baby to the hospital, but she tragically dies in her mother’s arms. Now, Dr. G must help these devastated parents understand what happened.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: Too often, convicted felons learn new techniques and find new partners in prison. In 1982, a group of former inmates began a spree of kidnapping and robbery.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: The Dangers of EMF (Electro Magnetic Frequencies)
programme.desc: Can radiation from electrical appliances, power lines, microwave ovens, and wireless technology such as cell phones, baby monitors, alter our DNA, and cause illnesses?

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: Alien Abductions
programme.desc: Richard speaks with two alleged alien abductees about their claims they were taken aboard an alien space craft.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: Crop Circles
programme.desc: For centuries, farmers have been discovering strange, complex geometric patterns comprised of rings, circles and other intricate shapes in their fields.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: The Star Child Skull
programme.desc: Richard meets the owners of an abnormal humanoid skull allegedly discovered in Mexico in the 1930s and a researcher who has had the skull subjected to numerous tests including carbon-14 dating, and DNA in order to determine it’s origin.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: The Mystery of Oak Island
programme.desc: Richard investigates Canada's best-known mysteries, the Oak Island treasure. Also known as the money pit, the site has become one of the world's deepest and most costly archaeological digs.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: Energy Healing
programme.desc: Several energy healers claim they are able to produce spontaneous miraculous healing through a laying on of hands. Claims of similar such healing by a man in a remote village in Brazil, known as John of God are also examined.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: The Execution of MLK and The Framing of James Earl Ray
programme.desc: In this re-examination of the assassination of civil rights leader Martin Luther King, Richard meets several researchers who provide evidence that the convicted gunman, James Earl Ray was not the real triggerman.

programme.title: Past Hunters: Carnfield Hall
programme.desc: Carnfield Hall is a country house dating from the 15th and 16th Centuries. This private residence turn event hall is using its paranormal activity to draw in business. Are these spirits the old residents?

programme.title: Past Hunters: Tutbury Castle
programme.desc: The team head to Tutbury Castle in Derbyshire to investigate the paranormal reports at the location. Past Hunters appear to have caught the Tutbury Ghost on camera.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Irish Crown Affair
programme.desc: Sydney og Nigel drar til Dublin, Irland på jakt etter den manglende kronen til den siste kongen av Irland.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: A Vanishing Art
programme.desc: Ledsager Max tryllekunstneren, Sydney og Nigel reiser til Atlantic City, New Jersey på jakt etter Ungarns tapte og angivelig forbannede Royal Scepter.

programme.title: Andromeda: Frykt og avsky i Melkeveien
programme.desc: Gerentex er tilbake, og han krever at Trance og Harper hjelper ham med sitt nye opplegg: å finne Tarn-Vedra.

programme.title: Andromeda: Djevelen tar den bakerste
programme.desc: Dylan og Rev Bem hjelper et fredelig samfunn med å stå opp mot sine kommende slaver, men de må være forsiktige: hvis Dylan lærer dem å drepe, vil barna deres bli født og vite det.

programme.title: Andromeda: Honningstilbudet
programme.desc: Dylan prøver å bringe fred til to forskjellige Nietzschean-stolthetspunkter ved å eskortere prinsesse til den ene til hennes arrangerte ekteskap med prinsen til den andre

programme.title: Andromeda: Stjernekryss
programme.desc: Rommies avatar blir forelsket i det som viser seg å være avataren til et krigsskip ved navn Gabriel. Gabriel prøver å smitte Rommie med et virus som sender planene sine til krigsskipet

programme.title: On the Case: Almost Home
programme.desc: A young woman's battered body is found on the side of the road. The shocking evidence from the crime leads police down a trail of tragedy.

programme.title: On the Case: Profile of a Killer
programme.desc: When a beautiful young woman is found murdered in the basement of her brand new home, Police are forced to use cutting edge techniques to solve a terrifying mystery.

programme.title: On the Case: Deceiving Appearances
programme.desc: Police suspect a mysterious double homicide is not what it appears to be.

programme.title: On the Case: Mixed Signals
programme.desc: Cell phone records may help solve the disturbing murder of a popular teenager.

programme.title: On the Case: Unfinished Journey
programme.desc: Jamie Bowie disappears while driving from Phoenix to Los Angeles on Interstate 10, then her body is found near the highway a month later.

programme.title: On the Case: Deadly Predator
programme.desc: A sexual predator viciously murders a 16 year old girl. Can investigators catch him before he kills again?

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Bill Nye, Pilar's Pantry Party, In A Minute Drew's News Podcast Sneak Peak
programme.desc: Drew and Bill Nye The Science Guy are serving the news sunny-side up in an all new Drew's News. Then, Chef Pilar Valdes reveals five essential pantry items and turns them into a delicious dish.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Regina Hall, Drew's News, In a Minute Raffle
programme.desc: "Honk for Jesus" star Regina Hall joins Drew to chat. Drew and Ross Mathews are serving the news sunny-side up in an all new Drew's News. Plus, In A Minute Drew and Regina surprise one lucky audience member with a big prize!

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Cameron Diaz, Leftovers Makeover with Pilar, In a Minute with Pilar
programme.desc: It's an all-new Drewber, when actress and entrepreneur Cameron Diaz joins Drew in her minivan to chat while cruising around NYC. Then, Chef Pilar Valdes is sharing her delicious makeover recipe for one of the most common fridge leftovers, rice!

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Drew Gooder, Drew's News
programme.desc: In an all-new Drew Gooder Drew has a big surprise in store for Deloris "NuNu" and Patrick "PopPop" Hogan who run a safe and reliable 24-hour daycare to help the parents in their community.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Drew's News: Food News, Biggest Design Dilemmas with Mikel Welch
programme.desc: Drew and Ross Mathews are serving the news sunny-side up in an all new Drew's News: Food News edition covering everything!

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Drew's News: Dr. Drew-Little Edition, Mac N Cheese Cook Off
programme.desc: Drew and Ross Mathews dive into amazing animal headlines in an all-new Drew's News: Dr. Drew-Little Edition. Then, competing viewers face-off in a Mac N Cheese cook-off you won't want to miss!

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Celeste Barber, Danny Seo
programme.desc: Comedian Celeste Barber, known for her hilarious celebrity parodies, joins Drew and Ross Mathews at the news desk to cover the latest headlines including the one perk employees most wish their employer would offer and share Rihanna's latest collab.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Drew's News: Health & Wellness Edition, Eyebrow Makeovers
programme.desc: Drew & Ross Mathews cover woman's library wellness check & how cuddling helps health. 2 guests get eyebrow makeover tips while Danny Seo shares paper recycling tip on Drew's News.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Susan Sarandon, Drew's News
programme.desc: Actress Susan Sarandon joins Drew to chat about her new country music drama "Monarch." Plus, Susan joins Drew and Ross Mathews at the Drew's News desk to help serve the news sunny side up.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Drew's News Beauty News with Zanna Roberts Rassi, Drew-Gooder Makeover

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Abbi Jacobson
programme.desc: "A League of Their Own" star Abbi Jacobson opens up about her recent engagement, her bestie Ilana Glazer, what it was like co-creating, writing, producing and starring in "A League of Their Own" and more!

programme.title: 48 Hours: Caught in the Crossfire - Part 2
programme.desc: A report about Charla and Darren Mack, a married, childless couple who were swingers who liked to attend group sex parties. After their daughter Erika was born, Charla was no longer interested in swinging and their marriage began to crumble.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Perilous Journey

programme.title: 48 Hours: Wounded by Love

programme.title: 48 Hours: Murder on the Cape
programme.desc: An a-list fashion writer leaves her fast-track career and becomes a single mom, but she also becomes the only murder victim in 30 years in her serene Cape Cod town

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Biggest Gamble

programme.title: 48 Hours: Portrait of a Killer

programme.title: Cops: You Didn't Get Very Far
programme.desc: A man complains of heart trouble after running from police, a suspect in a stolen car leads officers on a wild chase, and police check on a disabled vehicle and its occupants.

programme.title: Cops: Cops Not My Text Messages
programme.desc: A man refusing to comply gets tased, recent texts on a suspect's phone paint a different story from what he's told officers, and a woman tries to hide evidence from police.

programme.title: Cops: Hands Off the Junk
programme.desc: The driver of a stolen car leads police on a winding chase, undercover officers run a prostitution sting, and a woman's domestic disturbance call leads to her own arrest.

programme.title: Cops: Dealt a Bad Hand
programme.desc: Suspects flee an overturned auto, a man is accused of battery with a chain leash, and an unlucky gambler is dealt another losing hand by police when he decides to drive drunk.

programme.title: Cops: Batter Up
programme.desc: A couple assaults a tow lot employee who won't release their car, a suspicious man catches a patrol's attention, and police detain a carload of suspected shoplifters.

programme.title: Cops: Mohawked Cleaning Service
programme.desc: A suspect resisting arrest draws a crowd, a homeless man decides to camp out in someone's house while they're in the hospital and a traffic stop results in a drug arrest.

programme.title: Cops: The Runaways
programme.desc: A driver pursued by police bails from her moving vehicle, a jaywalker decides to run from officers, and a patrol encounters a little boy who decided to run away from home.

programme.title: Cops: Perfume Takedown
programme.desc: A man caught shoplifting gets an earful from his fed-up mom, police use surveillance video to track down an armed robber, and deputies oversee a contentious custody exchange.

programme.title: Cops: Put Your Clothes Back On
programme.desc: A disoriented suspect would rather take a shower than comply with officers, a stolen vehicle sting nets a surprisingly young driver, and a traffic stop leads to a drug arrest.

programme.title: Cops: Tazed and Confused
programme.desc: A neighborhood patrol investigates a car with no plates, a man walking in the street takes off when approached by officers, and a man breaks down as police search his vehicle.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Mysterious Disappearences in Paris - Christelle Leroy
programme.desc: On March 21th 1991, Pascale Escarfail, 19 years old, is discovered dead at her studio in the 14th arrondissement of Paris, she was raped then stabbed multiple times.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Crime Scene Solvers: Killer Cop (Tavernier Case)
programme.desc: Firefighters in Barbizieux, Charente, are called to a fire in a large house in the village. They arrive to find the lifeless body of the owner, Claude Tavernier, 83, lying in a large pool of blood.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: A Fatal Student Night (Stéphane Kameugne Case)
programme.desc: On December 24, 2008, the body of Stéphane Kameugne was fished out from a canal in Châlons-en-Champagne. The young man had been missing for two weeks and no one had seen him since the evening of his graduation ceremony from his engineering school

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Crime Scene Solvers: A Deadly Date On the Internet (Ciampi case)
programme.desc: Marina Ciampi, 52, is found dead at her home in Marseille. The victim is naked on her bed, a plastic bag over her head. But no trace of a break-in is detected.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Crime Scene Solvers: Death Trap On the Road (Schaaf Case)
programme.desc: A damaged bike belonging to Karine Schaaff, 16, is found abandoned by the side of a road in Moselle.

programme.title: Svenske krimsaker
programme.desc: En ung mann blir funnet død på et jorde utenfor Enköping. Ved første øyekast ser det ut som om han har lagt seg ned for å hvile - men når politiet undersøker liket, oppdager de noe som antas å være et skuddsår.

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 506
programme.desc: 26. januar 2001 ble Benjamin Hermansen knivstukket til døde som følge av sin hudfarge. Drapet fikk hele landet til å delta i antirasistiske markeringer og protester.

programme.title: Svenske krimsaker
programme.desc: En familie som rammes av en husbrann klarer å unnslippe flammene, men alt de eier har blitt til aske. Det som først ser ut til å være en ulykke, viser seg å være mye mer komplisert.

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 105
programme.desc: Tina Jørgensen forsvant etter en kveld på byen i Stavanger. En måned senere finner politiet liket av en 20 år gammel kvinne. Hvem kan ha tatt livet av Tina og deretter dumpet henne langs en øde veistrekning?

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 301
programme.desc: Justisminister Tor Mikkel Wara blir i 2018 utsatt for en rekke alvorlige angrep på sitt private hjem. I flere måneder står politiet uten spor, helt til det kommer et sjokkerende gjennombrudd i saken.

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 404
programme.desc: I desember 2015 gjør gallerist Reidar Osen et ærend med varebilen sin da han blir kapret av ukjente gjerningsmenn, som truer ham på livet og krever to millioner kroner. Hvem står bak kidnappingen?

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: The Hollow Men
programme.desc: Vincent witnesses their latest murder and is unable to stop them.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: What Rough Beast
programme.desc: Catherine is attacked in the park by two men disguised as policemen.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Ceremony of Innocence
programme.desc: Following the death of investigative reporter, Bernie Spirko, Elliot Burch and Catherine set out to find the man who hired and killed Spirko.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: The Rest Is Silence…
programme.desc: Following the ordeal with Paracelcus, Vincent moves forward toward a stress-aggravated mental collapse. Vincent continues to come to terms with the beast in himself and finds himself losing control of his thoughts.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Though Lovers Be Lost...
programme.desc: Catherine reaches Vincent in the catacomb and rescues Vincent from his madness. However, as Vincent begins to recover, he realizes he has lost his bond with Catherine and is unable to sense when she is in danger.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: A Kind of a Stopwatch
programme.desc: Patrick Thomas McNulty, a long-winded and self-absorbed know-it-all, is given a fantastic device which brings literal meaning to the expression "stop the world; I want to get off."

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Last Night of a Jockey
programme.desc: A dejected jockey wants to be tall.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Living Doll
programme.desc: Erich is displeased when his wife buys an expensive doll for his step-daughter. He becomes even more displeased when the doll tells him it doesn't like him!

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Meet in the Middle
programme.desc: Lonely bachelor Phil (Jimmi Simpson) finds meaningful human connection when he discovers a telepathic link to a stranger named Annie (Gillian Jacobs). Their connection quickly sparks a romance.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Downtime
programme.desc: After a recent promotion to hotel manager, Michelle (Morena Baccarin) feels like she's on top of the world, but any cause for celebration is short lived when the nature of her reality is called into question. Colman Domingo and Tony Hale also guest star.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Old Man in the Cave
programme.desc: A mysterious guardian helps a tiny community survive after the Bomb destroys much of the Earth.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Uncle Simon
programme.desc: Barbara accidentally causes her cruel Uncle Simon's death. His will stipulates that she must care for his latest invention - a robot. The robot begins to take on Uncle Simon's traits.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Probe 7, Over and Out
programme.desc: The lone survivors of two annihilated worlds are stranded on a distant planet.

programme.title: JAG: Full Engagement
programme.desc: While on their day off, Harm takes Mac for a flight in his vintage airplane, only to be forced to make an emergency landing in a mountain clearing because of mechanical problems.

programme.title: JAG: Cowboys and Cossaks
programme.desc: Harm, Mac, and Bud are assigned sea duty to monitor a joint war games exercise between U.S. and Russian naval forces.

programme.title: JAG: The Guardian
programme.desc: Harm and Mac defend Bauwer, a former Navy Seal, now a homeless man, who's accused of using excessive force when he killed three men who tried to hold up a convenience store.

programme.title: JAG: Rendevous
programme.desc: Mac and Harm once again find themselves courtroom adversaries as Mac is assigned the difficult task of defending CPO Holst, an admitted wife abuser accused of murdering his wife's boyfriend.

programme.title: JAG: Ghost Ship
programme.desc: Harm and Mac investigate the discovery of a skeleton found hidden aboard a decommissioned aircraft carrier that is being cut up for scrap, and learn it is all that remains of a long-missing JAG officer.

programme.title: Happy Days: Open House
programme.desc: Over the protests of Richie, whose parents are out of town, Potsie invites three-stranded beauty pageant contestants to spend the night.

programme.title: Happy Days: Richie's Car
programme.desc: Richie persuades his father to let him have his own car and Fonzie comes up with just the car for him, a hot rod named "Love Bandit," which turns out to be hot in more ways than one.

programme.title: Happy Days: Not With My Sister You Don't
programme.desc: Richie's surprise over little sister Joanie's first real date turns to shock when he learns it's with Spike, a pint-sized replica of his Uncle Fonzie.

programme.title: Happy Days: Richie Moves Out
programme.desc: Hoping for more privacy, Richie moves out of the Cunningham home to share an apartment with his brother and soon discovers it's not the paradise he expected.

programme.title: Happy Days: You Go To My Head
programme.desc: Richie's fears get the best of him while he's reading a book on abnormal psychology and it drives him to secretly see a psychiatrist.

programme.title: Happy Days: Wish Upon a Star
programme.desc: Hollywood comes to Jefferson High when Richie wins a dance date with a beautiful movie star in a school raffle.

programme.title: Happy Days: Richie's Flip Side
programme.desc: Richie lets fame go to his head when he takes a turn as a disc jockey at the local radio station.

programme.title: Happy Days: Goin' to Chicago
programme.desc: While in Chicago with their high school choir, Richie, Ralph, and Potsie sneak by their chaperons, wind up on the wrong side of an unsympathetic downtown nightclub owner, and win the sympathy of a kind-hearted cocktail waitress.

programme.title: Happy Days: The Cunningham Caper
programme.desc: Richie is sick in bed with the flu and is bored with eating soup and doing crossword puzzles. But when his family leaves him alone in the house, pandemonium breaks loose when Fonzie, Potsie, Ralph, and a burglar join him.

programme.title: Hot Ones: DaBaby Crushes Ice Cream While Eating Spicy Wings
programme.desc: DaBaby is a breakout rap superstar with more than 20 songs on the Billboard charts in 2019.

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.desc: Cardi discusses the art of a rap intro song, her admiration for Rihanna and her undying love for FDR.

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.desc: Steph discusses NBA popcorn power rankings and memorable moments with Kobe Bryant.

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.desc: Ed Helms is an actor and comedian whose credits include "The Office" and the "The Hangover" trilogy.

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.desc: Amelia swaps plain nuggets for the wings of death and discusses the art of the red-carpet interview.

programme.title: Hot Ones: Ronda Rousey Splits Bones While Eating Spicy Wings
programme.desc: Ronda Rousey is a former bantamweight champion and the first woman to be inducted in the UFC Hall of Fame.

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.desc: Austin Butler is a Golden Globe-winning actor who is up for an Oscar in this year's Best Actor category.

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.desc: Keoghan discusses his love of wolves and why Ireland breeds so many great boxers.

programme.title: Hot Ones: Sasha Banks Bosses Up While Eating Spicy Wings
programme.desc: The Legit Boss herself‚ WWE superstar Sasha Banks‚ is no stranger to throwing down in the squared circle.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: To see how people, products, and more move around America, Adam Richman explores how a legendary long-hauler meticulously custom-builds each truck at Daimler.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Egyptian mummies speak from graves through state-of-the-art CT-scanning technology; explore 2,000-year-old child mummy, 70-day mummification process, King Tut's mysterious death investigation, and nitrogen-filled conservation cases preventing decay.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Ice traps a treasure of energy on the ocean floor and confounds scientists still trying to solve why it's so slippery.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Towering skyscrapers buzzing with life, intricate tunnels connecting entire communities, mighty dams that tame the wildest rivers--this is construction animal style.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Earth's non-human inhabitants use tools, build structures, create traps, and farm; Egyptian vultures crack ostrich eggs with stones, chimpanzees extract termites with tool kits, prairie dogs dig subterranean homes, and ants raise aphid herds.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Nuclear submarines carry more firepower than all bombs dropped in history; since the 1950s, these steel vessels became U.S. defense cornerstones, sparking Cold War underwater competition and creating engineering miracles for deterrence.

programme.title: Weapons That Changed the World
programme.desc: The Colt M1911, designed by John Moses Browning, is the 20th century's most influential pistol. Its .45 ACP cartridge made it the U.S. military's standard for 75 years. Wil Willis tests it to explore its stopping power.

programme.title: The Rise of the Nazi Party: Nazis Outfought
programme.desc: By 1944, Hitler's image as a victorious leader is crumbling. He faces a bomb plot led by Stauffenberg and Tresckow, intending to kill him and overthrow the regime. Hitler survives the bombing, triggering a brutal reprisal against conspirators.

programme.title: Secret War: The French Triple Agent
programme.desc: Operation Cockade, led by MI6's double agent Henri Dericourt in 1943, aimed to deceive Germans with sabotage. Despite efforts, Germans withdrew divisions unconvinced. Dericourt faced a post-war treason trial and died in a mysterious 1962 plane crash.

programme.title: Weapons That Changed the World
programme.desc: Host Wil Willis tests the Garand against the Arisaka Type 99, showcasing its impact in WWII and sniper rifles' deadly precision, from Carlos Hathcock to Craig Harrison. Witness the historic rifles that shaped warfare!

programme.title: The Rise of the Nazi Party: In Power
programme.desc: Adolf Hitler's secret agenda is to rid Germany of Jews. By 1938, after creating work schemes and rearming, he orchestrates "The Night of Broken Glass," burning 1,000 synagogues and killing 91 Jews, preparing for further aggression.
