programme.title: iCarly: Verden er rystet del 2
programme.desc: Jimmy Fallon inviterer iCarly-gjengen til å opptre live i programmet sitt i New York, men en stor klesmiss fra Gibby betyr store problemer for nettshowets fremtid.

programme.title: iCarly: Spencers venner
programme.desc: iCarly-gjengen vil finne venner til Spencer på hans egen alder. De finner noen gode muligheter, men vil vennskapet blomstre?

programme.title: iCarly: Den stjålne laptoppen
programme.desc: Når Sams laptop blir stjålet, prøver iCarly-gjengen å hjelpe henne med å oppspore tyven. Imens får Spencer vite at han ikke får komme inn i sin yndlingsspillehall hvis han ikke er i følge med et barn. Hellet snur når Guppy trenger barnevakt.

programme.title: iCarly: Farvel del 2
programme.desc: Carly er på vei til å akseptere at hun ikke kan gå på det årlige ballet, da faren hennes dukker opp og går sammen med henne. Kvelden tar en uventet vending når faren hennes stiller et livsavgjørende spørsmål.

programme.title: iCarly: Vårt eget webshow
programme.desc: Når Miss Briggs avviser alle yndlingsdeltagerne deres fra uttakene til talenshowet, bestemmer Carly og Sam seg for å lage sitt eget talentshow for klassekameratene gjennom iCarly på nettet.

programme.title: iCarly: Herr Nesten Perfekt
programme.desc: Carly er keen på en gutt på skolen som heter Jake. Han er råkul og kjekk, og fordi hun liker ham, inviterer hun Jake til å spille gitar og synge på sitt nye webshow. Men hun oppdager forsent at Jake synger helt forferdelig.

programme.title: iCarly: Jeg vil ha flere seere
programme.desc: Carly og Sam konkurrerer med Freddie og Spencer om å finne den beste planen for hvordan å få flere ungdommer til å se på iCarlys websendinger. Når alle planene deres slår helt feil, blir alt helt sprøtt.

programme.title: iCarly: En pågående kritiker
programme.desc: Carly, Sam og Freddie vil at web-showet deres skal bli anmeldt av 'Nevelocity', en populær webside for slike anmeldelser. Carly drar for å møte Nevel, og det viser seg at han er en irriterende gutt som vil date henne.

programme.title: iCarly: Jeg vil bli hos Spencer
programme.desc: Bestefaren til Carly og Spencer kommer på overraskelsesvisitt. Han tror at Spencer er for uansvarlig til å passe på Carly. Carly og vennene hennes må bevise overfor bestefaren at Spencer er i stand til det.

programme.title: iCarly: Rekordforsøket
programme.desc: Carly, Sam og Freddie prøver å slå verdensrekorden for den lengste sammenhengende nettvideovisningen. For å klare det, må iCarly gå i over 24 timer i ett kjør.

programme.title: iCarly: En date med Freddie
programme.desc: Valerie er iCarly-fan og ber Freddie på date. Daten går så bra at Freddie begynner å filme Valeries eget webshow. Men når hennes webshow kommer i veien for iCarly, får Freddie problemer.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Coming Home
programme.desc: Rookie waterbomber pilot Scott gets his first taste of action when Buffalo responds to an emergency callout to fight fires in Alberta. Mikey and Rod think they hit the jackpot when they buy a million dollar firefighting plane on eBay at a bargain price.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Dark Skies
programme.desc: When Yellowknife and the northern aviation community are rocked by three crashes in the space of a month, Joe places an extra emphasis on safety, which is why he only trusts himself to perform a dangerous-looking DC-3 stunt.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Shut Down
programme.desc: Joe receives a negative visit from Transport Canada when inspectors threaten to shut down the airline. Ray and the Electra crew fly to Sachs Harbour to pick up a unique load - the hides, wool, and meat of 250 musk oxen.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: A Tale of Two Pilots
programme.desc: Weighed down by the responsibility of training a new rampie, and struggling to get out of Joe's doghouse, DC-3 co-pilot Tyler gets a once in a lifetime opportunity to stunt fly in his Cessna 150 for a visiting film crew.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Ice Jam
programme.desc: After taking command of an intense airlift, and dealing with the ugliest Electra load he's ever seen, Scott takes a scary fall on the icy tarmac.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: A Very Buffalo Christmas
programme.desc: A week before Christmas, Buffalo agrees to lend a hand to an RCMP initiative to fly toys to isolated communities in the north. But a series of problems with the Electra leave the company in a jam.

programme.title: Cheers NO

programme.title: Cheers NO

programme.title: Cheers NO
programme.desc: Frasier klatrer ut på en hylle og truer med selvmord etter at Lilith avslører affæren.

programme.title: Cheers NO
programme.desc: Woody drar fordel etter å ha avslørt svigerfar i en merkelig affære.

programme.title: Cheers NO
programme.desc: John Hill konfronterer følelsene sine for Carla etter et hjerteinfarkt.

programme.title: Cheers NO
programme.desc: Rebeccas far besøker overraskende Cheers og vil at hun skal flytte hjem.

programme.title: Cheers NO
programme.desc: Sam synker dypt når han forsøker å kjøpe sin gamle bil tilbake.

programme.title: Cheers NO
programme.desc: Frasiers unge sekretær drar på date med ham for å hevne seg på foreldrene.

programme.title: Cheers NO
programme.desc: For å unngå å ikke bli tatt for skattesvindel, blir Norm presset til å ligge med skatterevisoren.

programme.title: Cheers NO
programme.desc: Robin kommer tilbake til Cheers uten et rødt øre, men Rebecca er overbevist om at han har millioner.

programme.title: Mike Judge's Beavis & Butt-Head: Nektet service / Balleskvis
programme.desc: Beavis prøver yogabukser og får dem ikke av. / Guttene oppdager at de har rett til å nekte service til kunder på Burger World.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: The Mystery of Morning Wood / U.S. History
programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-head try to stay awake all night, in an attempt to discover the secret behind morning wood. / For his oral report on an historical figure, Beavis recounts the valuable lessons he learned one night while eating at Burger World.

programme.title: Mike Judge's Beavis & Butt-Head: En spirituell reise
programme.desc: Beavis ser ansiktet til Jesus i en nacho-chips. Det sender ham på en episk reise for å finne svar på det store spørsmålet - "Hvorfor får jeg aldri pult?"

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Nose Bleed / Vaya Con Cornholio
programme.desc: Butt-head tries some sadistic home remedies in an attempt to stop Beavis's nosebleed. / When Beavis turns into Cornholio in Burger World, Immigration Officials take him in as a possible illegal alien and try to make sense of his gibberish.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Give Blood / Beware of the Butt (aka Drive-In #1)
programme.desc: Beavis & Butt-head explore the career possibilities in selling blood. / While causing mischief at a drive-in movie theatre, Beavis & Butt-head experience a new phase of the moon.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Sick / For Better or Verse (aka Haiku)
programme.desc: Suffering from nasty colds, Beavis & Butt-head visit a doctor in hopes of glomming a prescription remedy. / Beavis & Butt-head's school assignment is to write a poem in the venerated Haiku format.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Figure Drawing / Date Bait
programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-head get to look at real nudes. / The return of Lolita and Tanqueray! Beavis and Butt-head go on their first date, well, almost.

programme.title: Mike Judge's Beavis & Butt-Head: To teite menn / Fredagsgalskap
programme.desc: Middelaldrende Beavis og Butt-Head oppfyller sin samfunnsplikt som jurymedlemmer./ Beavis og Butt-Head tror feilaktig at de har byttet kropp.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Car Wash / Kidnapped
programme.desc: Beavis & Butt-head attempt to make some money washing cars. / Beavis & Butt-head decide that kidnapping Stewart would be a quick way to some cash.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Politically Correct / True Crime
programme.desc: To better understand their female classmates, Beavis & Butt-head must get in touch with their feelings. Huh huh, he said "touch." / Beavis & Butt-head unknowingly star in their favorite crime reenactment shows.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Dummy For Love
programme.desc: Sabrina takes advantage of Vice Principal Kraft’s attraction to Aunt Hilda.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Dante’s Inferno
programme.desc: Sabrina learns not to date outside of her realm after a bad evening with a witch boy.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: A Doll’s Story
programme.desc: Babysitting becomes a test of ingenuity when Sabrina’s bratty little cousin turns her into a doll.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Sabrina The Boy
programme.desc: The mysteries of men are revealed when Sabrina poses as a boy to figure out how they think.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: A River Of Candy Corn Runs Through It
programme.desc: Halloween is a scary night indeed when Sabrina and her aunts try to throw a normal party

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Witch Trash
programme.desc: A family feud erupts when hillbilly cousins (Loni Anderson and Alice Ghostley) arrive from the Other Realm.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: To Tell A Mortal
programme.desc: It’s Friday the 13th, and for one day only, Sabrina can tell her friends she’s a witch.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Oh What A Tangled Spell She Weaves
programme.desc: Sabrina’s lack of attention with detail causes bad side effects to her magic.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Sabrina Claus
programme.desc: A special visitor from the Other Realm helps Sabrina recapture the true spirit of Christmas

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Little Big Kraft
programme.desc: Tired of Mr. Kraft’s harsh rules, Sabrina concocts a potion to make him act like a teenager.

programme.title: Fem i familien: Citizen Keaton
programme.desc: Mallory decides to run for student body president.

programme.title: Fem i familien: Father Time (Part 1)
programme.desc: The Keatons get involved in Uncle Rob’s divorce.

programme.title: Fem i familien: Father Time (Part 2)
programme.desc: Uncle Rob’s daughter can’t cope with his divorce.

programme.title: Fem i familien: The American Family: Part 1
programme.desc: Lauren writes a paper on the Keaton family for her class.

programme.title: Fem i familien: The American Family: Part 2
programme.desc: Lauren writes a paper on the Keaton family for her class.

programme.title: Fem i familien: The Play's The Thing
programme.desc: Steven gets jealous of Elyse’s leading man in a local play.

programme.title: Fem i familien: Miracle In Columbus
programme.desc: A bearded visitor turns Alex into a believer at Christmas.

programme.title: Fem i familien: The Blues, Brother
programme.desc: Alex tries to help a struggling musician regain his fame.

programme.title: Fem i familien: The Spirit Of Columbus
programme.desc: Alex turns Nick into an assembly line artist.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Meegan & Andre Break Up
programme.desc: To venner kommer i klammeri på en klubb, Meegan og André har en seriøs samtale, en rapper går fra et intervju, Conrad flyr business class og Keegan har en ny bart.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Country Music
programme.desc: Sketsjene inkluderer Steve Jobs' efterfølger, Ice-T, som en uoppdragen valp og Rihanna og Chris Brown prøver igjen.

programme.title: Key & Peele: The Branding
programme.desc: Jordan og Keegan utforsker opplevelsen som sort collegestudent og snylterne som suksess medfører. Andre sketsjer inkluderer et nabolags reaksjon på et mystisk vesen, når man kan - og ikke kan - si et kontroversielt ord.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Alien Imposters
programme.desc: Romvesener invaderer jorden, en familie forliker seg med en slektnings homobryllup og noen rasister gir uttrykk for noen overraskende meninger.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Boarding Group One
programme.desc: Sketsjene inkluderer at Keegan ikke får lov å gå om bord i flyet sitt, en bølle som nekter å helle ut innholdet i spritflaska og en bokser som sviner til modstanderen sin.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Sexy Vampires
programme.desc: Sketsjene inkluderer en uhyggelig asiatisk spøkelsessamboer, kara ser på den lyse siden av tortur og Keegan opplever et hus fullt av sexy vampyrer.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Airplane Showdown
programme.desc: En flyvert må håndtere en passasjer som ikke vil ha på sikkerhetsbeltet, britiske oppdagelsesreisende diskuterer sine reiser, to par forsøker å unngå spoilere på en dobbeltdate og en bibelgruppe opplever en guddommelig intervensjon.

programme.title: Key & Peele: MC Mom
programme.desc: En gangster deltar i et skuddrama, en mor skriver en sang til sønnen sin, to bondefangere konkurrerer, Big Boi møter André 3000 og to karer kommer ut for en bilulykke.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Scariest Movie Ever
programme.desc: En vampyr avslører seg selv, en seriemorder blir forhindret og et barn får ønsket sitt oppfylt.

programme.title: Key & Peele: A Cappella Club
programme.desc: En PSA jobber med barnesoldater i Afrika, en college-a-cappella-gruppe får et nytt medlem, Meegan og André går på sin første date, en terrorgruppe har en matbil og to gamle menn diskuterer popmusikk.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Cunnilingus Class
programme.desc: Sketsjene inkluderer at Mr. T lærer oss livsleksjoner, Wendell har bruk for en ny seng og en fornærmelse som går over streken.

programme.title: Broad City: Friendiversary
programme.desc: Jentenes 'Friendiversary' utvikler seg i en farlig retning når de blir vitne til noe forferdelig.

programme.title: Broad City: Stories
programme.desc: Abbi og Ilana farer fra toppen av Manhattan til bunnen for å feire Abbis 30-årsdag, og treffer på både gamle og nye venner på veien.

programme.title: Broad City: Shework and S**t Bucket
programme.desc: Ilana gir seg i kast med sin seneste mulighet til å tjene penger da hun en åpner et utendørs kontorlandskap for New Yorks røykere; Abbi konfronterer husverten sin da han nekter å modernisere sanitæranlegget hennes.

programme.title: Broad City: Bitcoin & the Missing Girl
programme.desc: Ilana besøker en gammel flamme for å få sin del av en Bitcoin-formue; Abbi glemmer klesvasken sin for første gang, og mister favorittgenseren sin.

programme.title: Broad City: Make the Space
programme.desc: Ilana oppdager en skremmende hemmelighet om Jaimé; Abbi prøver å avansere fra genserbretter til vinduskunstner på Anthropologie.

programme.title: Broad City: Artsy Fartsy
programme.desc: Abbi inviteres til et fancy kunstarrangement på MoMA; Ilana og Lincoln analyserer det første året de har vært sammen.

programme.title: Broad City: Lost and Found
programme.desc: Jentene møter Ilanas femtenmenning, som overlevde Holocaust, og tar ham med på en kjedelig brunch; Abbi prøver en ny look.

programme.title: Broad City: Shenanigans
programme.desc: Ilana rekrutteres som hårmodell; Abbis nye flamme forteller henne at hun ikke er moden nok.

programme.title: Broad City: Sleep No More
programme.desc: Abbi og Ilana besøker 'Sleep No More', og Abbi prøver å finne rett tidspunkt for å fortelle Ilana noe som vil forandre livet hennes radikalt.

programme.title: Broad City: Along Came Molly
programme.desc: Abbi, Ilana og Bevers selger Abbis eiendeler i New York; Abbi får billetter til en Lil Wayne-konsert, og jentene tar en 'tripp'.

programme.title: RENO 911!: Clementine and Garcia are Dating
programme.desc: After getting it on with nearly every other man in Reno, Johnson finally hooks up with Garcia, and Dangle breaks out his chimney sweep costume.

programme.title: RENO 911!: Undercover Drug Bust
programme.desc: Jones and Garcia enjoy their undercover stakeout a little too much, and Dangle and Clemmy start the department's first rock band.

programme.title: RENO 911!: President Bush in Reno
programme.desc: Reno's finest take on traffic control for President George W. Bush's motorcade, and Jones and Garcia reenact the Civil War at a pizza parlor.

programme.title: RENO 911!: Accidental Marriage
programme.desc: Garcia shoots a Dungeons & Dragons player, and Junior accidentally gets married during a sting operation.

programme.title: RENO 911!: Milkshake Man's Death
programme.desc: Reno District Attorney Mike Powers investigates the Sheriff's Department.

programme.title: RENO 911!: Investigation Concluded
programme.desc: District Attorney Mike Powers concludes his investigation of the Sheriff's Department, while Terry the prostitute takes off in Reno's police helicopter.

programme.title: RENO 911!: Released from Prison
programme.desc: Members of the Reno Sheriff's Department start new lives after getting kicked off the force.

programme.title: RENO 911!: Revenge of Mike Powers
programme.desc: The deputies enjoy their new lives in the private sector, but a specter from their past continues to haunt them.

programme.title: RENO 911!: Cop School
programme.desc: Some promising new recruits intimidate the team with their skills, and Wiegel has trouble making magic with her incarcerated boyfriend.

programme.title: RENO 911!: SARS Outbreak
programme.desc: Dangle, Jones and Wiegel lose it in quarantine after exposure to SARS, while the rest of the sheriffs hang out with kids' show host Reading Ron.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: True Hollywood Stories: Prince & Red Balls Energy Drink
programme.desc: Negrodamus answers questions, and Charlie Murphy plays basketball with Prince.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: The Internet & Moment in the Life of Lil Jon
programme.desc: Dave walks in Lil Jon's shoes and considers the Internet's sleaziness.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: World Series of Dice & Mooney on Movies
programme.desc: The Marcy Projects hosts a champion shooter contest, and Paul Mooney talks "Gone with the Wind."

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: I Know Black People & Keeping It Real Goes Wrong
programme.desc: Dave asks contestants how much they know about black American culture.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: Oprah's Baby Daddy & Jury Duty
programme.desc: Dave gets Oprah pregnant and recalls being a member of the O.J. Simpson trial jury.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: Kneehigh Park & Making da Band
programme.desc: P. Diddy gives unusual requests, and Snoop Dogg visits Kneehigh Park; appearances by Q-Tip and Wyclef Jean.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: Mandela Boot Camp & The Time Haters
programme.desc: Dave reveals sketches that are too hot for television.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: Wayne Brady & Tyrone Biggums's Fear Factor
programme.desc: Dave gives up his show to Wayne Brady, and Tyrone Biggums returns as a guest on "Fear Factor."

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: Lil Jon on Lil Jon & Black Bush
programme.desc: Dave considers how recent events would have played out if President Bush were black; special guests Jamie Foxx, Lil John, and music from Outkast's Big Boi.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: PopCopy & Clayton Bigsby
programme.desc: A blind white supremacist unleashes hate, and Dave unveils Nat King Cole's booty videos.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: Tyrone Biggums at School & Wrap It Up Box
programme.desc: Crack addict Tyrone Biggums visits an elementary school.

programme.title: Tosh.0: 'Men's Rights Lawyer'
programme.desc: Daniel hyrer juristen som er feministenes verste mareritt, blir kjent med landets mest gassfylte jente, og spriter opp tegngivingen for støtende ordbruk.

programme.title: Tosh.0: Mini Bike Jump
programme.desc: Daniel gir oppreisning til ei bikerdame som hoppet for nær solen (og ble brent), leker den eneste lek som gjør oss kvitt bigotteri og hat og viser det mest sexy siden noen viste brødene.

programme.title: Tosh.0: '7'
programme.desc: Daniel finner ut om en hard kropp har en myk side, beviser at andre kulturers bryllupstradisjoner er like fæle som amerikanske tradisjoner og avslører hvorfor han er den perfekte sengepartneren i nødssituasjoner.

programme.title: Tosh.0: '8'
programme.desc: Daniel tar et langt skritt tilbake til da han brukte rød og svart tømmerhoggerjakke (med matchende lue) og introduserer en ny spesialstyrkeingeniør-kandidat til det republikanske partiet.

programme.title: Tosh.0: 'Catcaller'
programme.desc: Daniel tar igjen mot gatesjikane og frigjør toalettene fra sexistiske kjønnsnormers tyrrani.

programme.title: Tosh.0: 810
programme.desc: I sesongens siste episode før Daniel tar vårferie, får han undervisning i livet av en tysk party-prins, går inn på tv-spillmarkedet og tar farvel med tømmerhuggermoten.

programme.title: Tosh.0: 811
programme.desc: Daniel gir en veldig vokal Hillary Clinton-supporter gjenoppreisning, terroriserer Broadway og gir fansen en sjanse til å skrive en hilsen i årboka si.

programme.title: Tosh.0: 812
programme.desc: Daniel får litt hjelp av Dr. Pimple Popper og fortsetter å knuse oppdiktede verdensrekorder.

programme.title: Tosh.0: Queenzflip
programme.desc: Daniel sitter på i bilen til Queenzflip, frolfer på frontoret og møter vapings svar på Vincent van Gogh.

programme.title: Tosh.0: Tiamat the Dragon
programme.desc: Daniel leker i høsttåken med en magisk drage, avslører den sanne identiteten til Pasadena Piper og tar farvel med sportens dårligste prognosemaker.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: The cabbies embark on a frantic race against time when they team up in a wild nonstop drive from New York to Miami so that Alex can see his long-lost daughter on her twenty-minute layover at the airport in the premiere episode of Taxi.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Alex’s romantic instincts are triggered by the sexy voice at the answering service. Her alluring manner prompts him to arrange a dinner date that turns into a big surprise on Taxi.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: A pretty girl has John in a whirl, and his determination to meet her prompts the taxi gang to come up with a surefire line that would unfreeze any woman on earth in Taxi.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Elaine fears the worst when the cabbies invite themselves to her party for her highbrow art world friends who have no clue that she moonlights as a cab driver.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: The high-spirited taxi gang helps a jittery Bobby fight potential disappointment when he decides that he will end his stage career if he doesn’t get an acting job before midnight.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Mechanic Latka Gravas faces deportation unless he marries a U.S. citizen. The taxi gang comes to his rescue by pitching in and hiring a local working girl to be his bride.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: John and his new wife, Suzanne, reach a crisis point in their marriage when one of them must drop out of college due to financial woes.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: A Christmas party at the garage is interrupted when Louie, the dispatcher teams up with Alex in a game of high-stakes poker against his cardshark brother Nick.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: The taxi gang scrambles to come up with a scheme aimed at ending a one-sided romance when a determined, pretty cabbie sets her cap for Tony and joins the Sunshine Cab Co. to be near him.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: At the office, Margaret reveals to Linda that it's her ten-year anniversary of working for Dr. Becker.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: At the diner, John expresses his repulsion for all the Christmas decorations.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Becker is upset when a patient substitutes his Christian Science faith for medical treatment.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: One of John's patients, a high school student named Brad, comes in for a physical and John learns that the guy's sexually active, but isn't practicing safe sex. John performs an HIV test on Brad and tries to convince him to begin practicing safe sex.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: John's at the end of his rope with his hectic practice and makes a call, which Linda overhears, telling the person on the other end that he can't take another day.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: John helps his elderly neighbor, Mrs. Firth, get into her apartment and she repays him by making homemade chicken noodle soup.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Bob is distraught because a thirty-something guy at his gym died while on the treadmill, and he's certain that he's headed for the same fate.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: When a customer leaves the diner because of John's cigarette smoke, Chris puts her foot down and tells him that it is now a "smoke-free" restaurant.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: John arrives at the diner and announces that he has quit smoking.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: John walks into the diner and sees Chris, Bob, and Jake standing around a booth.
